Friends,

If Joe Biden were a Republican, he'd be held accountable...

If Hunter Biden were a Republican, he'd be held accountable...

The blatant politicization of federal law enforcement agencies only benefits the political elites in Washington--namely, Joe Biden and his family.

There is a MOUNTAIN of evidence implicating Hunter and other Biden family members of crimes that would have put the average American behind bars for YEARS.
And even though his answers change and he cannot remember the question that is asked of him - Joe Biden remains untouchable.

Hoisted up by the Far Left & kept there to do their bidding as a figurehead.

clean_body: You Can't Make This Up | Friends, If Joe Biden were a Republican, he'd be held accountable... If Hunter Biden were a Republican, he'd be held accountable... The blatant politicization of federal law enforcement agencies only benefits the political elites in Washington--namely, Joe Biden and his family. There is a MOUNTAIN of evidence implicating Hunter and other Biden family members of crimes that would have put the average American behind bars for YEARS. And even though his answers change and he cannot remember the question that is asked of him - Joe Biden remains untouchable. Hoisted up by the Far Left & kept there to do their bidding as a figurehead. We need accountability, and we need it now. | Thank you, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Sen. Chuck Schumer
subject: Ted Cruz is a threat to our future

Colin Allred needs your help to defeat Ted Cruz and help protect our critical Senate majority.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81485229/462590803/-1809172739?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-22_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMTNkODg3LWE4ZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e6ck1OLoIB6S_3S2XtUjHKvBPYwnDRiyUxdBGQU1Wkc=)

Peter, it's Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and[ _**I'm reaching out because Colin Allred _officially_ just became the Democratic nominee to run against and defeat Ted Cruz, and I need you to donate $5 to help him and Fight for Progress win.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81485230/462590809/789451736?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-22_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMTNkODg3LWE4ZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e6ck1OLoIB6S_3S2XtUjHKvBPYwnDRiyUxdBGQU1Wkc=)
| [DONATE → ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81485231/462590820/-1809172739?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-22_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMTNkODg3LWE4ZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e6ck1OLoIB6S_3S2XtUjHKvBPYwnDRiyUxdBGQU1Wkc=)
---
Let me tell you why your support is so important. The race to defeat Ted Cruz doesn't just concern Texans – **it concerns the future of our democracy.**

Our country can't handle six more years of Ted Cruz, his attacks on reproductive freedoms, his dismantling of our fundamental voting rights, and his endless self-centered antics. He's proven time and time again that his only loyalty is to himself, not the people he's supposed to represent.

It's time to send him packing. Not only because Texans deserve so much better – **but because if Colin wins, Democrats are _virtually_ guaranteed to retain control of the Senate, which is our last line of defense against the far right.**

_Colin can win this_ – Cruz won by just 2.6% of the vote in 2018. Election experts know it, and recent polling numbers show them TIED. But he'll need a massive movement of grassroots supporters behind him to help him reach voters, pull ahead, and win.

**That starts today with you, Peter. Colin needs to raise $65,000 by midnight tonight so that he can stay on track to reach enough voters and win in November. That's why I'm personally asking:[_Will you donate $5 right now to power Colin and Fight for Progress to victory and defeat Ted Cruz? With your help, we can finally give Texans the leadership they deserve and protect the future of our democracy._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81485233/462590834/-1809172739?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-22_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMTNkODg3LWE4ZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e6ck1OLoIB6S_3S2XtUjHKvBPYwnDRiyUxdBGQU1Wkc=)**

The race to defeat Ted Cruz doesn't just concern Texans – it concerns the future of our democracy. Our country can't handle six more years of Ted Cruz, his attacks on reproductive freedoms, his dismantling of our fundamental voting rights, and his endless self-centered antics. He's proven time and time again that his only loyalty is to himself, not the people he's supposed to represent. It's time to send him packing. body:
They're trying to buy this Senate seat
| | |
---
Friend, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: **We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Bernie Moreno, in the race experts say could decide Senate control.**
And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red – they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage.
**So I'm personally asking:[Please, will you split $5 or more now between my campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's to help me defend Ohio's critical seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81485813/462595593/1885005583?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk983-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzAwZTg3YWYtYTllOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ONTE4FGUHQMewOBT5d_eihabz60AofR9lOpSXQhLCXY=)**
In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different:

name: Joe Kent
subject: Did you see me on Jesse Watters’ show?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
Last night, I went on Jesse Watters Primetime to discuss how the Biden administration and Marie Perez are allowing our country to be invaded by refusing to secure our southern border.
You can watch my interview here: [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/joe-kent-discusses-the-border-crisis-on-jesse-watters-primetime/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/HXcfFkBadWssJAKw5c3nSQ/Gw763AsWc6Il3vfgueqmDUwg)
The border crisis is only growing worse, and Democrats are doing nothing to secure our southern border. Marie Perez voted against legislation to build the wall and ensure that Border Patrol has the necessary resources to do their job.
Democrats are allowing lethal drugs like fentanyl to pour into our communities, and they are empowering the cartels with their open-border policies. The dangerous narcotics coming through the southern border are making their way up to Washington's Third District.
I've been to the border, and I saw firsthand the invasion that the Democrats are allowing. We need common-sense Republicans who will fight to secure the border and protect our communities from crime and drug trafficking.
Marie Perez is no moderate, and she is fully on board with the Democratic Party's open borders agenda. We cannot afford another two years of Biden and Perez.
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
PS - Watch my interview with Jesse Watters here at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/joe-kent-discusses-the-border-crisis-on-jesse-watters-primetime/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/HXcfFkBadWssJAKw5c3nSQ/Gw763AsWc6Il3vfgueqmDUwg).
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

clean_body: Dear Peter, Last night, I went on Jesse Watters Primetime to discuss how the Biden administration and Marie Perez are allowing our country to be invaded by refusing to secure our southern border. You can watch my interview here: The border crisis is only growing worse, and Democrats are doing nothing to secure our southern border. Marie Perez voted against legislation to build the wall and ensure that Border Patrol has the necessary resources to do their job. Democrats are allowing lethal drugs like fentanyl to pour into our communities, and they are empowering the cartels with their open-border policies. The dangerous narcotics coming through the southern border are making their way up to Washington's Third District. I've been to the border, and I saw firsthand the invasion that the Democrats are allowing. We need common-sense Republicans who will fight to secure the border and protect our communities from crime and drug trafficking. Marie Perez is no moderate, and she is fully on board with the Democratic Party's open borders agenda. We cannot afford another two years of Biden and Perez. Respectfully, Joe Kent PS - Watch my interview with Jesse Watters here at . Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Aluminum foil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

name: Travis Bull Johnson
subject: Professional Politicians? No thanks! 🇺🇸
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDQxNzcwMTMyNzQ2Mjc5MDE4JmM9ajJjNCZlPTAmYj0xMjk5NDU1NTE3JmQ9dDBrOXI1YQ==.Y2T_-nZecMZPER-Y4ilzSFZydHaG3JKv1EVljGt5-uI)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDQxNzcwMTMyNzQ2Mjc5MDE4JmM9ajJjNCZlPTAmYj0xMjk5NDU1NTI2JmQ9dDVsNm83cw==.M-tq_bv0i-1q-MwerMZGK0Y3un53sgzuLUXN0gQ4a0w)
---
| March 22, 2024
---
Professional Politicians?
Wow! The last few weeks have been a whirlwind of activity. Attending meetings and conventions, while keeping up with normal day-to-day activities on the farm has kept us busy. **Thank you for giving Steve and I a warm welcome at your conventions.** As I mentioned during those events, the difference between Steve and myself is our demeanor–our willingness to stand up and fight for our beliefs. Our policies and beliefs look very much the same on paper. The question is, how hard will each of us fight for those policies and beliefs?

| |
---
| |
---
**I believe I have demonstrated my willingness to fight and stand up for what I believe in.** That doesn’t always make me popular with the “go along to get along” crowd, but I’m OK with that.
---
| | | At the Red Lake County Convention, Steve said something that highlighted another difference that really had not come up before. He mentioned his willingness to spend the next decade in St. Paul in the legislature. I looked around the room and at that point I could see he had lost quite a few people. Conversations after the convention highlighted that fact. I have been told I could not read a room, but I think this was one case where Steve misread it when he said the quite part out loud. I do not believe the people want professional politicians, people who go to the capital and stay. The longer a representative stays in the legislature, the more they become entrenched in the swamp and the less they can relate to the voters. They forget where they came from and why we sent them there. It is a big reason **I am a fan of term limits and will pledge not to spend more than three terms in the house if elected** , then it will be time for new blood. Even that may be too long. **** Political parties have a strong aversion to term limits. It takes a lot less money to keep an incumbent in office than it does to win an election from scratch. Why muck up a 95% re-election rate? We the People have a keen understanding of the negative impact of such notions.
---
| |
---
| |
---
**Politicians are akin to underwear, they need to be changed frequently.** I believe this is something our forefathers, as “citizen statesmen,” intended.

---
| | | I would be honored to receive your vote, and I’m happy to put in the work to earn it! Please reach out at any time to discuss my campaign, or share any any questions or concerns you may have. Thank you for your time. In Liberty,

---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDQxNzcwMTMyNzQ2Mjc5MDE4JmM9ajJjNCZlPTAmYj0xMjk5NDU1NTM2JmQ9YzFkNGs2bQ==.5Gc1tbfPxtMxJPhyzZZQQ7NxJiHdchOuJzhrdHYXzz4)
---
| Support The Campaign
---
| Sign up to volunteer, support the campaign financially, or both! We are only $1000 away from our $3000 goal for March. Will you. help us reach it?_
__**NOTE: Our campaign is eligible for the Political Campaign Reimbursement program from the state. Need more info? Let me know.**_
---

---
| |
---

name: Jon Tester
subject: I know you have better things to do than read these emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I hate asking for money, folks. I know you have better things to do than read these emails. But can I explain?

Campaigns cost money. _A lot of money._ I wish they didn’t, but this is what we’re working with. And if we want to continue getting stuff done in the Senate, then I need to win this election. Plan and simple.

The GOP is already hammering me with vicious attacks. They’re trying to turn me into someone I’m not—**because they can’t beat who I am.**

That’s where you come in. Your donation helps us respond to dishonest attacks, fund our TV ads, and invest in voter outreach efforts. It makes a real difference in this race.

**So if you can,** [**will you split a donation before the end-of-quarter FEC deadline between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project? I appreciate whatever you can give because every dollar helps. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64897?t=6&akid=13586%2E878179%2EWj-L6T) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64898?t=7&akid=13586%2E878179%2EWj-L6T)

Jon

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13586%2E878179%2EWj-L6T). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13586%2E878179%2EWj-L6T).**

Joe Biden is literally opening the flood gates to illegals. And, he is
unlawfully hiding records about this escapade.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31688&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWJvcmRlci1wYXRyb2wtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNzQyL11sYXdzdWl0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5dc11d7b689ac987fb75eee9dae7df5830aaaeb215325260f11328846c597dfc
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWJvcmRlci1wYXRyb2wtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNzQyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b193682fa9afe97d75d38088d0b224955730bc03fc507eb7c45cffd6b95c0623]
against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for all records about
Customs and Border Patrol (CBP) agents welding open “flood gates”
in the border wall in Arizona (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of
Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWJvcmRlci1wYXRyb2wtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNzQyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b193682fa9afe97d75d38088d0b224955730bc03fc507eb7c45cffd6b95c0623]
(No. 1:24-cv-00742)).

We cite an August 22, 2023,
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31689&F=T&&hash=9ffe800e8f1455f41e8a5dde329783fe7e2787d8c423d0d587e5d5df8e96a1ca
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31669&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjMvMDgvMjIvYm9yZGVyLXBhdHJvbC1hZG1pdHMtaXRzLXJlc3BvbnNpYmxlLWZvci1vcGVuLWZsb29kZ2F0ZXMtaW4tYXJpem9uYS1ib3JkZXItd2FsbC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4c5d0ff5abbe7ca528d4b6fb2376fb605db352eda82c336fa3e5eba6155b46d3]
by the _New York Post_ in which the U.S. Border Patrol admits it was
responsible for a decision to weld open more than 100 “flood
gates” in the wall at the U.S. southern border in Arizona, allowing
access points for illegal aliens to unlawfully enter the U.S.

According to the _Post_, the storm gates are normally kept shut but
are opened during the annual monsoon season, which Arizona is
currently experiencing, to prevent the border wall from being damaged.

We sued after the Department of Homeland Security failed to comply
with an August 28, 2023, FOIA request for: All documents and
communications from August 25, 2022, to August 25, 2023, relating to
welding open 114 flood gates in the border wall in Arizona.

The _New York Post’s_ report cites Border Patrol data showing the
border sector at Tucson, which includes the area with the open flood
gates, had become the busiest in the country with the Border Patrol
encountering 42,561 individuals trying to cross legally and illegally
into the country in July 2023.

The report states: “About 1,400 migrants a day from as far away as
China and Egypt as well as Central and South American countries are
walking through the open gates, then looking for a Border Patrol agent
to
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31690&F=T&&hash=c0ccbf3702b6faa4ef294b26b80200edf0a48b26f4903074a04c243ed839259d
to and claim asylum
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31670&F=T&&hash=7be52418c094cf1e524ca17453ca46e6ab9c2e939f017c54b5329364152ae54b

In November 2022, we
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31691&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWRtaW4tZmxpZ2h0cy1zdG9wcGluZy1pbi1jaXRpZXMvXXB1Ymxpc2hlZD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a624b86f77571d9f4ac47d05cd9f499d5159e621798180865043fb51579a8c05
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=28637&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWRtaW4tZmxpZ2h0cy1zdG9wcGluZy1pbi1jaXRpZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5d92b0e1fc06a20104b1005c77d8c6371120d3e8e4083c7e889bb90c89e810a2]
records of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS)
detailing the nighttime transportation of unaccompanied alien children
(UAC) by air from Texas to Tennessee, as well as two other flights

police agency failed to comply with March 1 and March 14 Georgia Open
Record Act requests, claiming that the records requested were exempt
because they are “records of law enforcement in pending
investigation of prosecution.”

> The audio recording of the 911 call reportedly made by Laken Riley

released to the public as long as redactions are made of any names,
addresses, or telephone numbers of the person placing the call to the
public safety answering point.” Initial arrest and incident reports
are also required to be disclosed to the public under Georgia law.

There are many political forces that wish to suppress the truth about
what happened to Laken Riley, but we will insist on transparency under
law for the public interest and public safety.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31698&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvc3RvcmFnZS9yZXBvcnQtZnJvbS1zcGVjaWFsLWNvdW5zZWwtcm9iZXJ0LWstaHVyLWZlYnJ1YXJ5LTIwMjQucGRmXXJlbGVhc2VkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=381bbf538bcdee08126c0d2ca974f429d6c21922a42fcac44de529eff874e96b
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67562&L=31466&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvc3RvcmFnZS9yZXBvcnQtZnJvbS1zcGVjaWFsLWNvdW5zZWwtcm9iZXJ0LWstaHVyLWZlYnJ1YXJ5LTIwMjQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=06a6d548e618f1e7fc59649f0b7384a7c832a2ab167880afc3f21250cdc0d0d0]
his report on the Biden records scandal, which calls into question the
representations by the university that no state tax dollars were used
to manage the Biden Senate papers (which Hur found to have contained
unlawfully retained classified information).

Our filing states:

> The [university’s affidavit] provides, in relevant part, that no
> consideration was paid to President Biden, “State funded or
> otherwise,” in connection with the Senatorial Papers. To the
> contrary, the Special Counsel Report found that “Mr. Biden asked
> two of his former longtime Senate staffers to review his boxes in
> courtesy storage,” and that “[t]he staffers were paid by the
> University of Delaware to perform the pre-gift review....”
> “These former staffers reviewed and catalogued the boxes and
> recommended to him which papers to donate....” One staffer emailed
> President Biden: “I have not forgotten about the boxes and files
> at your house. I am looking to start on those just after
> Thanksgiving” — another email notes that a staffer was
> “looking through about 20-25 boxes in the garage ... From that
> group, he has about 2 boxes of Senate material so far....” The
> search for Senate documents took place at Mr. Biden’s direction,
> required the participation of many, and was paid for by the
> University. Even the University General Counsel was involved in
> coordinating with Mr. Biden’s Chief of Staff....
>
> In sum, the Report shows that President Biden directed his former
> staffers’ work in reviewing and cataloguing the Senate Papers,
> received the benefit thereof—and the University paid for it. Such
> payments constitute consideration paid on President Biden’s behalf
> in connection with the donation of Senatorial Papers to the
> University—contrary to the representations [of the university].
Our filing points out:

> On February 20, 2024, Petitioners wrote to counsel for the
> University seeking clarification and additional information
> regarding the discrepancies between the Special Counsel Report and
> the Supplemented Affidavit...
>
> On March 13, 2024, the University responded, dismissing
> Petitioners’ concerns and doubling down on the representation that
> “no consideration was paid to Mr. Biden for the gift of his Senate
> Papers ...” and that “[y]our apparent assertion that payment for
> services provided to the University by _former_ Biden staffers who
> were independent contractors, constitutes a payment of consideration
> to Mr. Biden for the gift of his Senate Papers, is simply
> false....” (emphasis in original). Counsel’s assertion, however,
> directly contradicts the Special Counsel Report, which found that
> (1) Mr. Biden solicited and directed his former staffers’ work,
> (2) the former staffers performed the work for Mr. Biden—rather
> than the University, and (3) the University paid the former
> staffers.
“The stunning revelations from the Hur report extend beyond the
president’s memory lapses and mental state. The court needs to
reopen this case to determine whether the University of Delaware
lied,” said Michael Bastasch, editor-in-chief for the Daily Caller
News Foundation.

(Judicial Watch and the Daily Caller News Foundation are being
represented by Delaware lawyers Ted Kittila and Bill Green of Halloran
Farkas + Kittila LLP.)

targeting of former President Trump.

against the
National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) for records of the
Archives’ role in President Trump’s White House records
controversy; whether it offered Trump a secure storage location other
than the National Archives; and if the Archives consulted with the
Office of the Director of National Intelligence regarding the
classification or declassification procedures of any of the alleged
classified documents found at Trump’s Florida residence.

be turned off before the raid.

clean_body: Another Email Scandal!? [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Biden Agency’s Welding Open Border Wall Flood Gates [] Joe Biden is literally opening the flood gates to illegals. And, he is unlawfully hiding records about this escapade. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) [ [] against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for all records about Customs and Border Patrol (CBP) agents welding open “flood gates” in the border wall in Arizona (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:24-cv-00742)). We cite an August 22, 2023, [ [] by the New York Post in which the U.S. Border Patrol admits it was responsible for a decision to weld open more than 100 “flood gates” in the wall at the U.S. southern border in Arizona, allowing access points for illegal aliens to unlawfully enter the U.S. According to the Post, the storm gates are normally kept shut but are opened during the annual monsoon season, which Arizona is currently experiencing, to prevent the border wall from being damaged. We sued after the Department of Homeland Security failed to comply with an August 28, 2023, FOIA request for: All documents and communications from August 25, 2022, to August 25, 2023, relating to welding open 114 flood gates in the border wall in Arizona. The New York Post’s report cites Border Patrol data showing the border sector at Tucson, which includes the area with the open flood gates, had become the busiest in the country with the Border Patrol encountering 42,561 individuals trying to cross legally and illegally into the country in July 2023. The report states: “About 1,400 migrants a day from as far away as China and Egypt as well as Central and South American countries are walking through the open gates, then looking for a Border Patrol agent to [ to and claim asylum [ In November 2022, we [ [] records of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) detailing the nighttime transportation of unaccompanied alien children (UAC) by air from Texas to Tennessee, as well as two other flights making multiple stops across the country. In September 2021, we [ [] HHS documents that list 33 separate incidents of alleged sexual abuse in a one-month time period tied to unaccompanied alien children shelters. I’ll be sure to let you know if we get anything substantial in about this “flood gate” outrage portion of the Biden border invasion crisis. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR 911 CALL, ARREST REPORTS IN LAKEN RILEY’S MURDER Laken Riley, a 22-year-old nursing student at Georgia’s Augusta University, [ killed [] while jogging in a park on the University of Georgia campus. Her alleged killer is illegal alien Jose Antonio Ibarra from Venezuela. This case has gained national attention. We filed a Georgia Open Records Act [ [] against the University of Georgia Police Department for audio of any 911 call about the assault and murder. Our lawsuit also demands the initial arrest report of Ibarra for the February 22, 2024, murder of Riley (Judicial Watch v. Jeff Clark, in his official capacity as Chief of Police of the University of Georgia Police Department [] (SU24-cv-0106)). We filed the lawsuit in the Superior Court of Clarke County after the police agency failed to comply with March 1 and March 14 Georgia Open Record Act requests, claiming that the records requested were exempt because they are “records of law enforcement in pending investigation of prosecution.” We are requesting: The audio recording of the 911 call reportedly made by Laken Riley while she was allegedly being assaulted by Jose Antonio Ibarra on February 22, 2024. The initial arrest report of Jose Antonio Ibarra for the February 22, 2024, homicide of Laken Riley. The initial incident report relating to the death of Laken Riley. Our lawsuit states: “911 records are public records that can be released to the public as long as redactions are made of any names, addresses, or telephone numbers of the person placing the call to the public safety answering point.” Initial arrest and incident reports are also required to be disclosed to the public under Georgia law. There are many political forces that wish to suppress the truth about what happened to Laken Riley, but we will insist on transparency under law for the public interest and public safety. (Judicial Watch is being ably assisted in this important lawsuit by attorney John R. Monroe of John Monroe Law, P.C.) JUDICIAL WATCH MOVES TO REOPEN BIDEN SENATE RECORDS LAWSUIT Judicial Watch and the Daily Caller News Foundation (DCNF) [ [] the Superior Court of the State of Delaware to reopen their case for the release of Joe Biden’s Senate records kept at the University of Delaware in light of the findings of Special Counsel Robert Hur that contradict representations made under oath made by the University of Delaware that no taxpayer money was used to process Biden’s records. The Hur report provides disturbing evidence that the University of Delaware misled the courts in order to hide Biden’s Senate papers. In July 2020, we initially filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) [ [] against the University of Delaware for former Vice President Joe Biden’s Senate records, which are housed at the university’s library (Judicial Watch Inc. and The Daily Caller News Foundation v. DE Department of Justice and University of Delaware [] (No. N20A-07-001 CEB)). The lawsuit was filed in the Superior Court of the State of Delaware. In July 2023 the Delaware Supreme Court [ [] with the University of Delaware, denying the release of the records because the university stated to the courts no tax dollars were used to manage the records. On February 5, 2024, Hur [ [] his report on the Biden records scandal, which calls into question the representations by the university that no state tax dollars were used to manage the Biden Senate papers (which Hur found to have contained unlawfully retained classified information). Our filing states: The [university’s affidavit] provides, in relevant part, that no consideration was paid to President Biden, “State funded or otherwise,” in connection with the Senatorial Papers. To the contrary, the Special Counsel Report found that “Mr. Biden asked two of his former longtime Senate staffers to review his boxes in courtesy storage,” and that “[t]he staffers were paid by the University of Delaware to perform the pre-gift review....” “These former staffers reviewed and catalogued the boxes and recommended to him which papers to donate....” One staffer emailed President Biden: “I have not forgotten about the boxes and files at your house. I am looking to start on those just after Thanksgiving” — another email notes that a staffer was “looking through about 20-25 boxes in the garage ... From that group, he has about 2 boxes of Senate material so far....” The search for Senate documents took place at Mr. Biden’s direction, required the participation of many, and was paid for by the University. Even the University General Counsel was involved in coordinating with Mr. Biden’s Chief of Staff.... In sum, the Report shows that President Biden directed his former staffers’ work in reviewing and cataloguing the Senate Papers, received the benefit thereof—and the University paid for it. Such payments constitute consideration paid on President Biden’s behalf in connection with the donation of Senatorial Papers to the University—contrary to the representations [of the university]. Our filing points out: On February 20, 2024, Petitioners wrote to counsel for the University seeking clarification and additional information regarding the discrepancies between the Special Counsel Report and the Supplemented Affidavit... On March 13, 2024, the University responded, dismissing Petitioners’ concerns and doubling down on the representation that “no consideration was paid to Mr. Biden for the gift of his Senate Papers ...” and that “[y]our apparent assertion that payment for services provided to the University by former Biden staffers who were independent contractors, constitutes a payment of consideration to Mr. Biden for the gift of his Senate Papers, is simply false....” (emphasis in original). Counsel’s assertion, however, directly contradicts the Special Counsel Report, which found that (1) Mr. Biden solicited and directed his former staffers’ work, (2) the former staffers performed the work for Mr. Biden—rather than the University, and (3) the University paid the former staffers. “The stunning revelations from the Hur report extend beyond the president’s memory lapses and mental state. The court needs to reopen this case to determine whether the University of Delaware lied,” said Michael Bastasch, editor-in-chief for the Daily Caller News Foundation. (Judicial Watch and the Daily Caller News Foundation are being represented by Delaware lawyers Ted Kittila and Bill Green of Halloran Farkas + Kittila LLP.) JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR EMAILS FROM PRIVATE ACCOUNTS OF TOP BIDEN JUSTICE DEPT OFFICIAL One thing I love about Judicial Watch is how we are able to find leads and pull threads leading to potentially bigger scandal. In June 2023, we received Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) [ [] from the Justice Department that showed top officials of its National Security Division discussing the political implications of former President Trump allowing CNN to use closed-circuit TV footage of the raid on his Mar-a-Lago home. The records included an email exchange in which Principal Deputy Associate Attorney General Marshall Miller appears to forward information to Deputy Attorney General Lisa Monaco’s personal account. We just followed up with a FOIA [ [] against the Department of Justice for work-related emails on Monaco’s nongovernment email accounts (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-00527)). This new lawsuit comes after the Justice Department completely ignored our follow-up June 22, 2023, FOIA request for “all work-related emails sent to and from Deputy Attorney General Lisa Monaco using non-.gov email accounts from January 20, 2021, to [June 2023].” Judicial Watch caught Monaco using her personal email accounts for sensitive government business – including the unprecedented targeting of President Trump. And, in further echoes of the Hillary Clinton email scandal, the Justice Department is trying to cover it up. In addition to having [ [] the Clinton email scandal, Judicial Watch is in the forefront of the court battles for transparency regarding the Biden administration’s targeting of former President Trump. In August 2023, we filed a [ [] against the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) for records of the Archives’ role in President Trump’s White House records controversy; whether it offered Trump a secure storage location other than the National Archives; and if the Archives consulted with the Office of the Director of National Intelligence regarding the classification or declassification procedures of any of the alleged classified documents found at Trump’s Florida residence. In June 2023, we obtained [ records [] that showed top officials of the National Security Division discussing the political implications of Trump allowing CNN to use closed-circuit TV (CCTV) footage of the raid on his Mar-a-Lago home. The documents confirmed that the Justice Department had asked that Mar-a-Lago CCTV be turned off before the raid. A separate Judicial Watch FOIA [ [] against the National Archives and Records Administration resulted in the release of records about the unprecedented document dispute between Archives and President Trump. Click [ [] or [ [] to review the records. In August 2022, we successfully [ to unseal [] [ search warrant affidavit [] used to justify the unprecedented raid on the home of former President Trump. In September 2022, we [ [] lawsuits against the DOJ for its records and the FBI’s records about the Mar-a-Lago raid search warrant application and approval, as well as communications about the warrant between the FBI, Executive Office of the President and the Secret Service. In October 2022, we [ [] the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all communications of the U.S. Secret Service internally and with the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) regarding the raid on Trump’s home and for any video or audio recordings made during the raid. In November 2022, we [ [] the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all communications between the Secret Service and Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) regarding the search warrant that precipitated the raid on former Trump’s Florida residence at Mar-a-Lago. Until next week... body:

---

|
Peter -- this is big -- after weeks of intense campaigning, the House just narrowly passed a bill, without poison pill riders, to avert a government shutdown, hours before the funding was set to expire.**Yet, MAGA extremists in the U.S. House are already looking for new ways to force anti-environmental policies through -- threatening our air, water, and safety.**
But it's important to recognize -- _our fight isn 't over_. With the spending bill passed, House Republicans are now working to pass new bills gutting funding for climate action and reductions in methane gas pollution, blocking protections for wild lands in Alaska, pushing fracking, scaling UP forever chemicals, attacking clean water, and pushing new giveaways to Big Oil.

LCV teams are on Capitol Hill meeting with lawmakers NOW. We need to make sure these bills don't move any further. **Peter, this is a moment when we need every LCV member to step up. **

[I really can't overstate how important this is -- and how much we need you to renew your LCV membership right away while a triple match offer means anything you give will go THREE TIMES AS FAR. Even $5 will have a huge impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_)

Peter, Republicans will let nothing get in the way of serving the interests of their polluter donors.

We've stopped them before, and we know what to do. **But the truth is, after months of intense campaigning -- and a new slew of anti-environmental bills getting pushed through -- WE NEED YOU TO SUCCEED.**

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle
subject: She’s the REAL DEAL, people!
body:
Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697275%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kw%2fmSiga%2fCjr9%2bhfnT9EAQ&sysid=1 "Kimberly Guilfoyle")
---

I’ll tell you what I said on my show:

**MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATOR FROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE!**

She’s a leader of our MAGA movement. She’s a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she’s a wall standing in the way of Joe Biden’s radical agenda.

She’s also up for re-election in November. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she’s a top ally of President Trump... but unfortunately, we have a problem.

Chuck Schumer recruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt to destroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha.

In fact, Marsha’s opponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge her negative campaign to flip Tennessee.

Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

_If this radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back the Senate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH. _

_**[So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn’s re-election campaign.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697276%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XVpmS3miI%2bM2rRMqv0B20g&sysid=1 "So, with all that being
said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha
Blackburn’s re-election campaign.")**_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697277%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2VZTOdMOtdfzGJ93wmQHFA&sysid=1 "PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW")
---
I don’t send these types of emails very often.

If you’re like me, these types of political emails kind of drive you crazy. But this is no ordinary request.

**Marsha Blackburn is exactly the kind of strong, patriotic conservative President Trump needs in the U.S. Senate. **

No surprise here, but Marsha’s socialist opponent turned to big liberal names to help bankroll her campaign. Luckily, we have you on our side. If just 30% respond to my email, Marsha’s socialist opponent will have no shot at EVER flipping this key Senate seat.

But first, I need your help right now. Please. I’m personally asking for your help.

_**[So, I hope that’s enough to convince you. If it’s not, I fear we could lose Tennessee- and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c697278%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RKCuPHABRXEZV2S1N%2fRh%2bQ&sysid=1 "So, I hope that’s enough
to convince you. If it’s not, I fear we could lose Tennessee – and the
ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.")**_

For America,
Kimberly Guilfoyle

---
|
---
| Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.

---

Brentwood, TN 37024

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Stop Censorship of Conservatives
body:
We announced our case on Tucker Carlson Tonight but let me quickly give you the details:

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, When conservative Rogan O’Handley dared to voice the same questions every single one of us had over the 2020 election, **the Left used everything it had to shut him up.** But he refused to go down without a fight and now nearly three years later, Rogan is STILL battling tooth and nail for his rights – and yours – to question our government, to speak freely, and to protect fair and honest elections in America.I’m writing you today because the time has come when Rogan needs your help in this historic battle for Free Speech. **[Will you make an emergency tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to help win Rogan’s case at the U.S. Supreme Court?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqsagjot6acsksd82pk3g2csvtiu0lb4j9u2d0h8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o31cdh2bs)** We announced our case on Tucker Carlson Tonight but let me quickly give you the details:In February 2021, long before Elon Musk took over Twitter, the leftists there shut down Rogan’s Twitter account claiming he had “violated rules about election integrity” by merely asking for an audit of the 2020 election.Later, we found out the government employees working for Alex Padilla (now a U.S. Senator) messaged Twitter on December 30th asking them to immediately take down Rogan’s election-related tweet.The very next day Twitter responded: **_“Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don’t hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do.”_**That’s right – leftist government officials used government property to get Big Tech to censor speech they disagreed with! Then this unholy alliance shut down and silenced Rogan’s account completely. My friend, the collusion between leftist politicians and Big Tech must be stopped before our nation looks more like China or North Korea.The good news is the email exchange above gives us the proof we will need to win this case before the U.S. Supreme Court – but getting there is an all hands-on-deck situation. **[That’s why I’m asking you to donate $25 or more to help us win Rogan’s case at the Supreme Court.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znrpvdspn5l9lgnniadmavj4u0654sl16feh19s8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o31cdh2bs)** Many just sit back and complain about the censorship coming from Big Tech and leftist government officials. But Rogan O’Handley is fighting back against Big Government and Big Tech working hand-in-glove to silence folks like you and me.I think you want to fight back as well – and this is your chance. **[**So will you make an urgently-needed tax-deductible donation of $25 or more today?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztgoo321298le2dtjdio240vk4mae4of06ch8ulo_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o31cdh2bs)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I’m the Founder and CEO of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from my numerous appearances on Newsmax and Fox News with **Laura Ingraham** , **Tucker Carlson** , **Shannon Bream** and **Fox and Friends** talking about our cases and how help from patriots just like you helped us win huge victories against the radical Left — including THREE Supreme Court cases.
---
* We’ve blown the lid off of radical doctors and hospitals who mutilate children in the name of profit and gender-affirming “care.”
* We’re suing school districts who strip parents and grandparents of their rights and indoctrinate our children and grandchildren.
* And now, with your help, we’re taking on Big Tech and Big Government censorship.

---
And now, with your help, we’re taking on Big Tech and Big Government censorship.As I’m sure you know, escalating this case to the U.S. Supreme Court is not going to be an easy fight. **But if we do nothing, conservatives will continue to be silenced...** No questioning shady election practices, not criticizing public officials, no freedom of speech for anyone who disagrees with the Left’s increasingly radical agenda. I hope you see that we have to go all the way on this one. And we can’t do it without you. **[To win this Free Speech battle for all of us, please follow this link right now to make your urgently-needed tax-deductible donation of $25 today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpq4bh3dejdibrhh78rk2t2solbftf07934uq0r0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o31cdh2bs)** If you can give more today – say $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – please do it.Once we win here, Big Government and Big Tech liberals will not be able to shut down and silence conservatives again. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
|
---
| | God bless,
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl5ann282snumfuu5rdafro21fqng249d66qdk6o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o31cdh2bs)
---
Harmeet K. DhillonFounder & CEO
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvi1e8k1g070s5565scnnisd0ce6ht16274e4qs8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o31cdh2bs)
---
| | P.S. We’re taking our massive lawsuit against the Big Government and Big Tech censors all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court. These tyrants who think they can steamroll and silence conservatives like you and me have got another thing coming. But, to win this case against the rich and powerful politicians and the Big Tech liberals, we need you! **[**Please follow this link to make an emergency tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more and help us beat these tyrants in court.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8mkpmqhrc1h3ptqor4b53m3reigtrgvqphm0tno_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o31cdh2bs)** Thank you!

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0i79mfo1amplfsmmbg8455qjmdhljqu45iei7q0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o37c3h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. You can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6rh9love4lnj5eur3bkr6rvvnaf7vbcmhpa13vg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o37c3h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education** , including **a required course on the Constitution**
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjmjpe58binjk6afgkerm2q593j8u5ii2bghv4k0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o37c3h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, **I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today**. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice, which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4oav0u4eb08ci48lvrlrfvi2e3dnk6m3h7jf52o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chge1o37c3h2bs)** |
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle
subject: She’s the REAL DEAL, people!
body:
Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31012%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wg%2b%2bz1Es9FQ%2bdDkkV6L1Lw&sysid=1 "Kimberly Guilfoyle")
---

I’ll tell you what I said on my show:

**MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATOR FROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE!**

She’s a leader of our MAGA movement. She’s a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she’s a wall standing in the way of Joe Biden’s radical agenda.

She’s also up for re-election in November. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she’s a top ally of President Trump... but unfortunately, we have a problem.

Chuck Schumer recruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt to destroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha.

In fact, Marsha’s opponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge her negative campaign to flip Tennessee.

Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

_If this radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back the Senate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH. _

_**[So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn’s re-election campaign.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31013%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cHxB2KJz6pzxuTFxr1mWOg&sysid=1 "So, with all that being
said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha
Blackburn’s re-election campaign.")**_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31014%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bgjd4UaztOI%2boHvBnXFp0g&sysid=1 "PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW")
---
I don’t send these types of emails very often.

If you’re like me, these types of political emails kind of drive you crazy. But this is no ordinary request.

**Marsha Blackburn is exactly the kind of strong, patriotic conservative President Trump needs in the U.S. Senate. **

No surprise here, but Marsha’s socialist opponent turned to big liberal names to help bankroll her campaign. Luckily, we have you on our side. If just 30% respond to my email, Marsha’s socialist opponent will have no shot at EVER flipping this key Senate seat.

But first, I need your help right now. Please. I’m personally asking for your help.

_**[So, I hope that’s enough to convince you. If it’s not, I fear we could lose Tennessee- and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31025%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0SKKarVNQWEmy3uxXjrYCA&sysid=1 "So, I hope that’s enough
to convince you. If it’s not, I fear we could lose Tennessee – and the
ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.")**_

For America,
Kimberly Guilfoyle

---

**_A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP_**

Friend,

The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic.

**_And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list._**

During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but __you__ , Friend.

We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Do this one thing to stand for life today
body:
highlight-blue {background-color: #648fc6;}
Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception.

|
---
| | From the Desk of Marjorie Dannenfelser Hello, In our fast-paced world, it's easy to lose sight of fundamental principles, especially when it comes to complex issues. Rather than trying to understand or get involved, so often I find it's easier for people to turn a blind eye. Recently, I feel like the culture in our country has forgotten - or ignored - the most basic lessons. I've felt a growing concern about how our society perceives and values life, particularly when it comes to the development of human life. Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. We know exactly when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, can wiggle their toes, and even hear their mother's voice. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are treated as though they are not alive or even human in our society. **After speaking to the experts and talking to mothers for over 30 years as a pro-life activist, I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhvulh35rugkd2dhj3j2g6a4lp7gpuaessp9690o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chie8or6c3h2bs)
_Marjorie Dannenfelser
President SBA Pro-Life America_ Our Creator has given us life as a precious gift. No person is disposable, and every life has value because we are made in His image. I believe that everyone deserves life, despite what our society, schools, or government say. I believe that together we can make a difference in our culture that has drifted off course. I believe we can bring dignity and a voice to the voiceless. I also strongly believe I'm not alone in my convictions. I believe that you believe this too. SBA Pro-Life America works everyday to bring the truth about abortion to light and shine a ray of hope into our culture. We want to give the next generation of Americans a bright future. But this future will require commitment from people like you. The first step we must all take is clearly stating what we believe and what we're willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me and be a voice for the voiceless? Will you stand up for those that cannot do it for themselves? I've created a pro-life pledge and I'd love your support. You can join over 1 million pro-life supporters - people like you - that want to see the unborn protected, valued, and cherished. [https://action.sbaprolife.org/stand-for-life-with-me](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z930fntf4kgted68v75ektapuldarl8c63delisg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chie8or6c3h2bs) For Life,
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
---
---
| |
---
---

clean_body: highlight-blue {background-color: #648fc6;} Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. | | | From the Desk of Marjorie Dannenfelser Hello, In our fast-paced world, it's easy to lose sight of fundamental principles, especially when it comes to complex issues. Rather than trying to understand or get involved, so often I find it's easier for people to turn a blind eye. Recently, I feel like the culture in our country has forgotten - or ignored - the most basic lessons. I've felt a growing concern about how our society perceives and values life, particularly when it comes to the development of human life. Science and research tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. We know exactly when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, can wiggle their toes, and even hear their mother's voice. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are treated as though they are not alive or even human in our society. After speaking to the experts and talking to mothers for over 30 years as a pro-life activist, I can assure you that they are very much alive. Marjorie Dannenfelser President SBA Pro-Life America Our Creator has given us life as a precious gift. No person is disposable, and every life has value because we are made in His image. I believe that everyone deserves life, despite what our society, schools, or government say. I believe that together we can make a difference in our culture that has drifted off course. I believe we can bring dignity and a voice to the voiceless. I also strongly believe I'm not alone in my convictions. I believe that you believe this too. SBA Pro-Life America works everyday to bring the truth about abortion to light and shine a ray of hope into our culture. We want to give the next generation of Americans a bright future. But this future will require commitment from people like you. The first step we must all take is clearly stating what we believe and what we're willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me and be a voice for the voiceless? Will you stand up for those that cannot do it for themselves? I've created a pro-life pledge and I'd love your support. You can join over 1 million pro-life supporters - people like you - that want to see the unborn protected, valued, and cherished. For Life, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, SBA Pro-Life America | | Your donation to SBA Pro-Life America helps us to focus on our mission of combining politics with policy, investing heavily in voter education to ensure that pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn, and in issue advocacy, advancing pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. | | Copyright(C) 2024 SBA Pro-Life America, All rights reserved. American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “...Sentenced to prison”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Our once Free Republic is DEAD...

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bh8vSojx6smUEAH6GaEeKA&sysid=1)
---
**_A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP_**
---
Friend,
---
There’s no other way to say this... **You may truly be my only hope.**
---
**_The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON!_**
---
The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic.
---
**_And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list._**
---
During these dark times in Biden’s America, there is nowhere else to turn but __you__ , Friend.
---
We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust - the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund - to help me fight for my freedom and justice as the Deep State tries to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31024%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rgU9vetFQl%2fckk%2b9TeI8Wg&sysid=1)

---

**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment shortly after Joe Biden seized control of the White House, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
But no one had any idea how much worse it was going to get...
---
_The ruling regime is attempting to turn its leading opponent and his allies into political prisoners to remain in power forever._
---
Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what’s happened to the greatest and freest nation in history.
---
_But just like President Trump, I’m not giving up on America._
---
I didn’t give up when my home was raided or when I was wrongfully arrested and had my MUGSHOT taken in Fulton County - _and there’s no way I’m backing down now._
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bh8vSojx6smUEAH6GaEeKA&sysid=1)

But I humbly admit I cannot win this fight all on my own.
---
I’m counting on generous patriots like _YOU_ to defend me at this pivotal moment.

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: State Department rule violates religious beliefs
body:
Christian relief organizations are in the crosshairs of the U.S. State Department ... BECAUSE of their Christian faith!

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf82fqpaqpvfjq0g85q6cnpil90uep0d4e7iget8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chieaoj4c3h2bs)
---
Friend, Christian relief organizations are in the crosshairs of the U.S. State Department ...__**_BECAUSE_ of their Christian faith!** **[**Will you stand with Christian Legal Society in support of faith-based relief organizations today? Add your name to our urgent open letter to the U.S. State Department.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrfbvjqb4hu4hrn82hhfrm1k10stlk657t8aq17o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chieaoj4c3h2bs)**
---
[Say NO to the State Department targeting Christian](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgbvjbduak23453cgv6c4nldcofnkv3qqgkqffvg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chieaoj4c3h2bs)
---
The U.S. State Department has just proposed new regulations that _will cut off grants and contracts_ to Christian—and all faith-based—relief organizations that require their employees to share their faith and their religious values. That means that relief organizations like **Samaritan's Purse** , a Christian ministry that has helped millions worldwide since its founding in 1970 ... Humanitarian organizations like **World Vision** , which has supported children in need and empowered millions of people out of poverty for more than 70 years ... And many thousands more **faith-based ministry, relief, and aid organizations** of all sizes that do immeasurable good work in God's name across the globe ...
**May be forced to SCALE DOWN—or SHUT DOWN—their operations, as they are unconstitutionally targeted for de-funding because of their Christian faith.** **[**Friend, Christian Legal Society is standing alongside religious groups and ministries to oppose this unconstitutional and immoral regulatory change from the U.S. State Department. Will you add your name to our open letter to join in this fight?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2rqrrmaejkgr61obnf1gn82khcsu1ik5v7d79g_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chieaoj4c3h2bs)**
---
[Say NO to the State Department targeting Christians](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zltt9jhru7lc7bh2qju2gc2rl9tu7th3eh000on0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chieaoj4c3h2bs)
---
Friend, no faith-based organization in America today should be forced to reject biblical principles ... and embrace the government's currently preferred social ideology ... or risk scaling down or shutting down their operations. Yet under the regulatory change that the U.S. State Department has proposed, funding and contracts could be denied to ANY group that has a statement of faith or policies that are true to biblical values but counter to today's predominantly "woke" social climate. That means organizations that protect life instead of promoting abortion, advocate for traditional marriage and family, or follow biblical teaching on biological sex rather than "gender ideology" are at risk of being targeted—and punished!—by the U.S. government. **[**Please stand with Christian Legal Society to express your strong opposition to the U.S. State Department targeting Christian and all faith-based relief organizations _on the basis of their religious beliefs!_ Add your name to our urgent open letter now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zog479e84jffijja2kc5bes7kfa8h8ofedclkfn8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chieaoj4c3h2bs)**
---
[Say NO to the State Department targeting Christians](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24t8obc1ih6slna8p6o8cgiho6sej18an9k6lqg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chieaoj4c3h2bs)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society’s Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **This is one of the most urgent—and important—fights that we face for religious freedom this year,** and I am grateful for concerned Americans like you coming alongside us to defend Christian and all faith-based relief organizations in the battle today. Thank you for your prayers and for your consideration. David NammoExecutive Director & CEO Christian Legal Society
---
Christian Legal Society
P.O. Box 7712
McLean, VA 22106-7712
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Dick Campbell
subject: Soboleski Leads on Defeating the EV Mandate
body:
Leadership on Defeating the EV Mandate
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U5PugeIyn4Gha43QLxiJKfo-3SkJNhG2MOn7mTpHqFVgiNNBZA7oRO8D9yU5SjfVCFdviyJtTfF_1e7bXCIJMjLmW46FY5qmS0JhXsbhVBUdkeeTHV1-x0m4vYXu5M5Mbzl7WbhVA1auDt9_SF9kXg==&c=pOVB8G6_zP5WR_l-9NR-mIOBSpoECrSGF-ZC96tcHb9nNLhB7pxjKw==&ch=FHL3FBYhC5w17KcD8KAUSZbiQr2Yz6SWehC49UdkTJa7N57xxH9pIw==)
---
---
| Friends,
You've all heard the good news: the electric vehicle mandate was blocked in a 4-2 vote by the Maine Board of Environmental Protection this week.
I am writing because it's important for you to know that this victory could not have happened without my colleague Mike Soboleski's leadership and work with the Environment & Natural Resource Committee over the last seven months.
Mike testified before the committee for a third time on Wednesday, explaining very well why the members should vote down these California EV rules.
[Bangor Daily News: Maine board defeats rule to phase out sales of new gas-powered vehicles](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U5PugeIyn4Gha43QLxiJKfo-3SkJNhG2MOn7mTpHqFVgiNNBZA7oRJ6O522ubdgrVYmblAXtNJn_CEu-YXEamfegK19EZbQn8yy6Va50wUZiKoTvsL5pVwU-UOGi-ubiYG1RU1x1IXjjIodfFKBrBOJcmrQQyYFJEKW-xKfMj5d4i70nlG0I685Y1nowkC11nrcqDULGnu5mEUC_sAD9e6JhxHBBHXPEk7lBVdhAeNwmrB2bnv2_bdByOJpG-5xtrL0ahcoIKn_D4DmDYhbHdffGHlTvXnNu&c=pOVB8G6_zP5WR_l-9NR-mIOBSpoECrSGF-ZC96tcHb9nNLhB7pxjKw==&ch=FHL3FBYhC5w17KcD8KAUSZbiQr2Yz6SWehC49UdkTJa7N57xxH9pIw==)
Thanks, Mike, for your dogged leadership on this over-the-top rule making process, presented with only 150 certified signatures and outside the Legislative process.
But he didn't stop there! Mike's bill, "An Act Designating New Motor Vehicle Emissions Rules as Major Substantive Rules", unanimously voted on Thursday, ensures emissions laws will remain under the purview of the Legislature and prevent anyone attempting to use the same tactic to alter our emissions laws without legislative approval ever again.
[Portland Press Herald: Proposal to give lawmakers final say over Maine's electric vehicle standards sails through committee](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U5PugeIyn4Gha43QLxiJKfo-3SkJNhG2MOn7mTpHqFVgiNNBZA7oRJ6O522ubdgrP5hBkLyhrm_vbEucnN3ehBH6BBKJA9-dB6vFFvn4--_BhbRjpEkxCsl77wideXpwobspJlPmXQjHRlgm17nTYuA600Q78wtbc1Iir8Q_AIEKb172G6O6nN7t3I3wHTesun0AmCY8enjrrX9atzc0NVYffNKwVx5L_jmmCnXbKcxyVDYH-GIEsvqmRKyHwkIUMDj6-3ZLBp5kDOTH1l1kpyD2ZQapT9aJtP3cWSlXTuI_AWqXJyv3Jg==&c=pOVB8G6_zP5WR_l-9NR-mIOBSpoECrSGF-ZC96tcHb9nNLhB7pxjKw==&ch=FHL3FBYhC5w17KcD8KAUSZbiQr2Yz6SWehC49UdkTJa7N57xxH9pIw==) Today, the Biden administration's EPA pushed similar overreaching emissions mandates through at the Federal level. We need a problem solver like Mike in Congress to fight the Biden administration and reckless progressive Democrats who are destroying this country and our way of life.
I am proud to work with Mike and have endorsed his campaign for Congress.
Please join me in supporting Mike by contributing to his campaign. We need to make sure voters across the Second Congressional District know that Mike is the man to defeat Jared Golden and represent us in Washington DC.
---
| [SUPPORT MIKE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U5PugeIyn4Gha43QLxiJKfo-3SkJNhG2MOn7mTpHqFVgiNNBZA7oRLwEt6kXZ_w5sRuqIbm18iUwy5ZaBx9QU5gtD_C3qygLxn3CCLnNZpDPc1-dQVjg9cokUSpJJxCt25zNleyeXdJFF49EEEKWGds2MCploFIVPfStZAz2UfKKMg2jJ4L08w==&c=pOVB8G6_zP5WR_l-9NR-mIOBSpoECrSGF-ZC96tcHb9nNLhB7pxjKw==&ch=FHL3FBYhC5w17KcD8KAUSZbiQr2Yz6SWehC49UdkTJa7N57xxH9pIw==)
---
| Thank you!
Representative Dick Campbell Orrington, ME

---
---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U5PugeIyn4Gha43QLxiJKfo-3SkJNhG2MOn7mTpHqFVgiNNBZA7oRLwEt6kXZ_w5sRuqIbm18iUwy5ZaBx9QU5gtD_C3qygLxn3CCLnNZpDPc1-dQVjg9cokUSpJJxCt25zNleyeXdJFF49EEEKWGds2MCploFIVPfStZAz2UfKKMg2jJ4L08w==&c=pOVB8G6_zP5WR_l-9NR-mIOBSpoECrSGF-ZC96tcHb9nNLhB7pxjKw==&ch=FHL3FBYhC5w17KcD8KAUSZbiQr2Yz6SWehC49UdkTJa7N57xxH9pIw==)

I stand for our national anthem & face the AMERICAN FLAG- not an African flag.

I stand and pledge allegiance to the flag of the United States of AMERICA & I kneel before nobody but God almighty.

I believe ALL LIVES MATTER.

The liberal media will tell you that makes me a racist & woke Democrats will call me an 'Uncle Tom.'

Nothing angers a woke liberal more than a black man that has determined his own destiny, except a black man that has done so as a proud conservative.

**My name is Mark Robinson & I am officially the GOP nominee for Governor of North Carolina.**

This is the most important race in America & if we succeed, I'll be the first black man ever elected to the office.

I'm the liberal elite's worst nightmare. Who I am and what I believe in blows a massive hole in their woke narrative & Joe Biden is spending millions to punish me for it.

**_[So, I'm humbly asking you if you'll stand with me today as we embark on this historic journey.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cuU_OUTCysWnNOnxz_Hsow~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4SUoP0TtaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9tYXJrLXJvYmluc29uLWZvci1uYy93aW4tdGhlLWdlbmVyYWwtcC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTMwJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDMyMV9QQS1VU0NOMS4xMTM3MzFfdDE0NjQzNjAtMjcyNyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNDAzMjFfUEEtVVNDTjEuMTEzNzMxX3QxNDY0MzYwLTI3MjcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtdWNuLTIwMjQwMzIzJnh1bnY9dHYtdWNuLTIwMjQwMzIzVwNzcGNCCmX8vZb-ZWPrxRxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "So, I'm humbly asking you if you'll stand with me today as we embark on this historic journey.")_** | | | [**STAND WITH MARK ROBINSON**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cuU_OUTCysWnNOnxz_Hsow~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4SUoP0TtaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9tYXJrLXJvYmluc29uLWZvci1uYy93aW4tdGhlLWdlbmVyYWwtcC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTMwJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDMyMV9QQS1VU0NOMS4xMTM3MzFfdDE0NjQzNjAtMjcyNyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNDAzMjFfUEEtVVNDTjEuMTEzNzMxX3QxNDY0MzYwLTI3MjcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtdWNuLTIwMjQwMzIzJnh1bnY9dHYtdWNuLTIwMjQwMzIzVwNzcGNCCmX8vZb-ZWPrxRxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Nothing angers a woke liberal more than a black man that has determined his own destiny, except a black man that has done so as a proud conservative. My name is Mark Robinson & I am officially the GOP nominee for Governor of North Carolina. This is the most important race in America & if we succeed, I'll be the first black man ever elected to the office. I'm the liberal elite's worst nightmare. Who I am and what I believe in blows a massive hole in their woke narrative & Joe Biden is spending millions to punish me for it. "So, I'm humbly asking you if you'll stand with me today as we embark on this historic journey." | | | In God we trust & in God we must. Let's make history! -Mark Robinson | | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson Business donations are not allowed. Donations must be made by individuals and cannot exceed $6,400 for the cycle. Donations are not tax-deductible. By adding your name and providing your email and phone number, you agree to receive emails and/or text messages about how you can contribute to or get involved with Friends of Mark Robinson. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency varies. PO Box 1350 Norwood, NC 28128 ~ US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_
