name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8GyPFgqAutlVJ-5OL_UpWA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TL8P0SraHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UFNUX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQwMzIzVwNzcGNCCmX7IJf-ZR5hj6BSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. You can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8GyPFgqAutlVJ-5OL_UpWA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TL8P0SraHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UFNUX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQwMzIzVwNzcGNCCmX7IJf-ZR5hj6BSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education** , including **a required course on the Constitution**

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8GyPFgqAutlVJ-5OL_UpWA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TL8P0SraHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UFNUX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQwMzIzVwNzcGNCCmX7IJf-ZR5hj6BSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, **I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today**. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice, which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8GyPFgqAutlVJ-5OL_UpWA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TL8P0SraHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UFNUX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQwMzIzVwNzcGNCCmX7IJf-ZR5hj6BSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** |
---

_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WRki19Z-Ndy2UX0kckS9Ag~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TL8P0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpl-yCX_mUeYY-gUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ro8WY9Ye-e0v6whVrrN-Dw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TL8P0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpl-yCX_mUeYY-gUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n4qt5zi30FX5d8pA3CutVg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TOSP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UFNUX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDMyM1cDc3BjQgpl_CSX_mVCf_xJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. You can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n4qt5zi30FX5d8pA3CutVg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TOSP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UFNUX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDMyM1cDc3BjQgpl_CSX_mVCf_xJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education** , including **a required course on the Constitution**

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n4qt5zi30FX5d8pA3CutVg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TOSP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UFNUX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDMyM1cDc3BjQgpl_CSX_mVCf_xJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, **I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today**. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice, which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n4qt5zi30FX5d8pA3CutVg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4TOSP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UFNUX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDMyM1cDc3BjQgpl_CSX_mVCf_xJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** |

name: The Flyover
subject: Deadly Attack in Moscow, Princess Kate Diagnosed with Cancer, and WW2 Ghost Soldiers

Gunmen killed [at least 40 people](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQAL_G7ohgwcYuKK5Jl2uvtNawxBthiIAkur8_5epXjqYZzZ_bdkNOnO-_8STXY9nQd37TpgVoAWYzY3CRCEiP5JRVCqRcrBoPF3fpUduZPC2AS9BzBLVOdlawLJFwZAcSjNSg5TrNIC8qamMnWHWwftV2HYykwL3Uy6Nw7gfF9Le8qV58Ocfkjt6fbdC_BrgOcMVnpk_7qi_Uzj7RANf6ao1RnKX58hH3Vz4pC1-yp9rFgSkJzo9XZWoikg37tO8GgwlR2X32e5AGNUwyIqqxuvD8cErcZjsYeT-R0_-W_uOZfwEAAP__zGpk5w) and wounded more than 140 in an attack on a Moscow concert hall Friday night that authorities are investigating as terrorism.

# Saturday, March 23, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1994, Wayne Gretzky scored his 802nd goal in the second period and passed Gordi Howe as the NHL's all-time leading goal scorer. At the time, it was his 62nd NHL record. ([Video and More Info](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u9CAQAJ_GdGvBrn_OBcXXXHdfm9JCZrFJOLAAHXKePrrUaWeKkebjsT6MDz7u_82TdXVpNVv1L14JkACHdRBWO2ZkEqzVrBRKeZuVOPQ4Tmq0aJTcFE1mw-1mcZwsERHKmxNeo8RBEpJcxgllrxwN84gL2XlbaF66QbL1NeX-M_lYD3bhSi_O_ZaeIuij1rN09K_De4f31lofj_B2Hd4jt_KG5ooMe-b6_XXBaUphC3vK1jMcqTG4lMH5XCqkCPEIsCcTIPhSgSRcbHIBsyeRtT2bD8GXae4GuT-N_02J-ueUnwAAAP__MBxjdQ)) Unlike the Editor, some of us need a break from March Madness, and this week's new streaming options are the timeout we need. Oscar-winning film _Anatomy of a Fall_ debuted on Hulu, and Jake Gyllenhaal's remake of _Road House_ is now available on Prime Video. Also, the premiere episode of _Top Chef 's_ 21st season is now streaming on Peacock. Happy viewing. ## Terror Attack on Moscow Kills 40, Injures 140
Gunmen killed [at least 40 people](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQAL_G7ohgwcYuKK5Jl2uvtNawxBthiIAkur8_5epXjqYZzZ_bdkNOnO-_8STXY9nQd37TpgVoAWYzY3CRCEiP5JRVCqRcrBoPF3fpUduZPC2AS9BzBLVOdlawLJFwZAcSjNSg5TrNIC8qamMnWHWwftV2HYykwL3Uy6Nw7gfF9Le8qV58Ocfkjt6fbdC_BrgOcMVnpk_7qi_Uzj7RANf6ao1RnKX58hH3Vz4pC1-yp9rFgSkJzo9XZWoikg37tO8GgwlR2X32e5AGNUwyIqqxuvD8cErcZjsYeT-R0_-W_uOZfwEAAP__zGpk5w) and wounded more than 140 in an attack on a Moscow concert hall Friday night that authorities are investigating as terrorism. Authorities said at least five gunmen dressed in camouflage entered the Crocus City Hall, a large shopping and concert venue in a Moscow suburb, and began shooting at people gathered for a rock concert. Several explosions were heard, and there was a huge fire in the building, which caused part of the roof to collapse. [Photos of the scene are here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQgOGnMVuQfXdgGDyUVGzp0qEjIvicXOXgyFigvn2Vzp2_4df_dZkus0RZbx_zg10JaZqXIjtPeAI8AU1UeReYgbFiZ6wxoHVnTXV3JhgiS23XB9S9p-ZqZtshEzUWZ-JKHGggjYC6b1rQtQlItoEevV16tL0izV5KyvV3krXcOcSftHOul_SooruX8twUvikYFYzHcdTX6_IyBePKx6ZgjLLzy1KO_tR2LYHGVuG45WVKWW6yKnwfhvPnNAznKjv_PCRG2VqrSN8es8S_Vvn3_DcAAP__BxZWYw) The Islamic State terror group [claimed responsibility](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LuO2zAQheGnoboxeNGaVqEiW6jbpAyQRpglhxKzvAjk2ILz9IFTpzvAV53_58f6gTHFsn3HTDOHuqLj-KDVgDagx3Uc_ByINJmBZmWV0lLerBr2ebQ3FbRV0jkTbtb6QCrccLpOyijn5RBnLfUojTZyertqeVHBjPZNT8ZbNxk7iVGSj1zb5XeNhXcK6Vkf1C6u5iHNO_PRhfkm9CL0cp7nJffyMqEXKrB9Cr0UOvsLa0te6CXX7uoJrhZHjWHHlACZ0X1B7AlzdNAZmcAljLlDo37U0uNnTJGfgB0ylv1eGO7FU4MTn4CBqYGvf6h08JE8JGTqDPfDv4bQCzZ4f1df-cevbWizP86YUuxXK0a5ZYzp3yH-b96_AQAA__8Pln93) and said the gunmen escaped. Early reports had Russian officials blaming Ukraine, which the Ukrainian government vehemently denied.
## Kate, Princess of Wales, Diagnosed with Cancer
Kate Middleton, Britain's Princess of Wales, has been diagnosed with an undisclosed type of cancer and is undergoing chemotherapy. Middleton announced the news on Friday in a video message, [which you can see here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGvozAQhH-N6YzMGmIoKK6hy7VXIsesk72YNTJ7sfLvT3nS6141Gmmk-fT9ua5XT4n4_tvvOEvMqw9CL1ytBquhX_tmmyMioG1w7lzXgTGj65rHPLkYJ4h4GcfOjdHGwTk3GHubbq53oWtoBgO9sWDNNFzAtF20vRtgspsLk3WT6g1uJLm0fzOxPDCmd35haUPemzQ_RI5T2V8KFgVLrbXlW2Cs71yen4mChbGen_BCmX3SxILluylYnl5Q77RtCSWzDp4DFv2iDbOW4vkMhQ7Rnjn_44A7suijEAc8T52jrj7h52CAwYyjUbA0Zd6OSinReXGqN_fdU_oClh_1_Q8AAP__xyVzGg). The cancer was found during abdominal surgery in February but kept secret until Friday. In her message, Middleton described the diagnosis as a "huge shock" and asked for "time, space, and privacy." The type of cancer wasn't identified, but chemotherapy treatments have begun. Kensington Palace says it's confident [the princess will make a full recovery](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FurDAQQNGvsTuQPTNr48LFa-j2tSkRjIfFiYEVOIvy91FSp77Slc7bfbiPueTt8X9cJdZ5H0au-SUDNoAN0EA6xVkEBLVE660FYzpv9RJZJugkeMTJcyB2yTEizx2lZIRZ5wgGyCCgCTcHprUzkr9BwOQ5oA-KjKRc96N93_NWF5nL1_6So-V91SUutT5Phf8U9Ar667raaeKfpqDf5DoV9J8fjescWSKrj5ieVy4ln84rMo91zOX3VP90fQcAAP__OmRMow).
## Secret WWII 'Ghost' Unit Finally Recognized
Members of the 23rd Headquarters Special Troops were awarded [Congressional Gold Medals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQAL_G7ohgIWAKimvS5dorrTUs9p6wiTCKlb8_5epXjqYZzZ_n_EQufKy_cafQc50xdn7TrAVoAWY2YwqZCEiPFJRTCqScnBq3QJgUaE2TyjSlZYFI1lh592SU9EmPHECCkRq09HcL8qayNu4OXicXvXZ-MJIS99pufysffaNcPvVN7RbrPpaw9f46B_1rgMcAD3wddJ1f9YXWORYa4LFu9ewC2_4RsR5ro_PkemARay1J7JSwiEiN9np8xFVbSeLCJpiFQ0iEWdnJLhG18iYZG53LKJcYFz-2kF4Xl8KndYOR645c_qf1H0f9CwAA___ugmoJ), Congress' highest honor, Thursday for their elaborate battlefield deceptions during WWII. The 23rd, known as the "Ghost Army," featured 1,100 soldiers recruited for their expertise in engineering, art, set design, and architecture. The Ghost Army developed inflatable tanks, fake uniforms, camouflage, and sound effects that [saved an estimated ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskMFuhCAYhJ8Gbxr4f5DlwKEXbruXtunRIKDSoBiha_btG3vubZKZZGa-r_twtzHFbX7YNeg65cG6Gp9hwBawBT7wxuspBAjYBM0kY0DpTbJm0eAAe8u9F-KmJgnjiBN1AHJEx4RwTdRAgVMEpEr0QDs2IZcCFHrpFEpFOA0-1nx03zludQlTeuVnODqX1ybppda9EHwjYAiY8zy7nz1eHgHzkffhEc5CwHy-EzBXEwFD8dKMgJmXXGprj_XVurzNRygl5s2mds7Jt2vwNl1R1V-fqFCKAwHTHNrvZ0wpll4STufVxvQ3p_4L5zcAAP__1RZg9w)"15,000 to 30,000" lives. Knowledge of the Ghost Army was kept [secret for more than 50 years](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGuozAQRb_GdIPMGHAoKPYVdG-rlbZEDh7DPBk7sp1Y_P0qqbe6VzrN0fn7vX4b9hz23-akubi4mq3wi1YFqAD7tW_s7IiQVENzp7sOpbzprjlmI6V26KybxvF2t1JrQ8P9Pt2IBurQNTyjxF4qVHIaRpRt51SvB5yU1duk9CR6SZZLTO1P5FAOcv6KL0rtFs_Gz0cpjyzUL4GLwKXW2p45vJnAhQI8s8AlUH3P59eYvIVqEjBn2I-YC5h0XsBh80_LYQcTgGM1AUqERBvxi6AcBFsMe6KcOQbjYY_ewknWeCjRmkvgYhJ8fXU_eFx_mjTbR2XvOY9a9HI_DfuPcvlvwH8BAAD___TQdBc) until the information was declassified in 1996. A documentary about their heroics was produced in 2013, and a book was released in 2015. Surviving Ghost Army members Bernard Bluestein, 100, John Christman, 99, and Seymour Nussenbaum, 100, attended the event, with Bluestein saying the recognition was "[overwhelming](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u7CAQQOGngc4WzGB-CorbuNvbprQwDLtErFnZxFbePtrUqT_pSOfjttxCqWW7_w9P8j23JcReTlpwABxALYonn4mAkJOXRkoQwhrJHz7GbA25dZUJrIgpgVZCOZi0yxbQ8uJBgBIIKNykQYwyozITOEwmOjSOKUGp9LaPn61s_UG5freT9jG2J6_-0fvrYPiPwcxgvq5rXNf4NgbzRtfBYA7nW9pe0_B1DDFsIYVBW40oJsV3n15XqbUc2jAl7s9Q6m-7_3n6EwAA__9el1IP)."

clean_body: Gunmen killed and wounded more than 140 in an attack on a Moscow concert hall Friday night that authorities are investigating as terrorism. | | | | | | Saturday, March 23, 2024 ---|--- Happy Saturday! On this date in 1994, Wayne Gretzky scored his 802nd goal in the second period and passed Gordi Howe as the NHL's all-time leading goal scorer. At the time, it was his 62nd NHL record. () Unlike the Editor, some of us need a break from March Madness, and this week's new streaming options are the timeout we need. Oscar-winning film Anatomy of a Fall debuted on Hulu, and Jake Gyllenhaal's remake of Road House is now available on Prime Video. Also, the premiere episode of Top Chef 's 21st season is now streaming on Peacock. Happy viewing. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Take control of your health with , from our sponsor today, | Terror Attack on Moscow Kills 40, Injures 140 Gunmen killed and wounded more than 140 in an attack on a Moscow concert hall Friday night that authorities are investigating as terrorism. Authorities said at least five gunmen dressed in camouflage entered the Crocus City Hall, a large shopping and concert venue in a Moscow suburb, and began shooting at people gathered for a rock concert. Several explosions were heard, and there was a huge fire in the building, which caused part of the roof to collapse. The Islamic State terror group and said the gunmen escaped. Early reports had Russian officials blaming Ukraine, which the Ukrainian government vehemently denied. Kate, Princess of Wales, Diagnosed with Cancer Kate Middleton, Britain's Princess of Wales, has been diagnosed with an undisclosed type of cancer and is undergoing chemotherapy. Middleton announced the news on Friday in a video message, . The cancer was found during abdominal surgery in February but kept secret until Friday. In her message, Middleton described the diagnosis as a "huge shock" and asked for "time, space, and privacy." The type of cancer wasn't identified, but chemotherapy treatments have begun. Kensington Palace says it's confident . Secret WWII 'Ghost' Unit Finally Recognized Members of the 23rd Headquarters Special Troops were awarded , Congress' highest honor, Thursday for their elaborate battlefield deceptions during WWII. The 23rd, known as the "Ghost Army," featured 1,100 soldiers recruited for their expertise in engineering, art, set design, and architecture. The Ghost Army developed inflatable tanks, fake uniforms, camouflage, and sound effects that "15,000 to 30,000" lives. Knowledge of the Ghost Army was kept until the information was declassified in 1996. A documentary about their heroics was produced in 2013, and a book was released in 2015. Surviving Ghost Army members Bernard Bluestein, 100, John Christman, 99, and Seymour Nussenbaum, 100, attended the event, with Bluestein saying the recognition was "." name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee9df211dc7d436c8905168ff7072d0c&_e=D2_g9OLTsraqyw50ikqIbXGtAkSOfhflRqQ9pve_D7VF4eyomHrR4FNHeSnPR9a-B5E82kUtkarvbvrVTKO44VdODu1qT00LfIxYpmJDOcMO64EP4Rqhuylb3Ls0MD48bq2BYEizKMskfKrHrdK5TJ8K-qtHJkXk8mwU26AevQHyZBMGR2sbq8ldLmBJ0nY2Jlpf86IEJ-VRlikawK5cuUPVQAjw1cVxrVBa08dHPHeDkB3uRNOYEPsrg2ZiTRxBpHd_Im4FpqAFlEqP4lIgVEcxJnKAGL8tBlHB--6hdDw6ZRxJHMowhQmHXjn3VVHKdppaycwUmMdsStRDyaR1-lS1L6hdNbaSVGMVl5jiD6Icg1tMk72cninZ_eChiVHkDdLHS5jJNFzx_6aB_q8myQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. You can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee9df211dc7d436c8905168ff7072d0c&_e=D2_g9OLTsraqyw50ikqIbXGtAkSOfhflRqQ9pve_D7VF4eyomHrR4FNHeSnPR9a-B5E82kUtkarvbvrVTKO44VdODu1qT00LfIxYpmJDOcMO64EP4Rqhuylb3Ls0MD48bq2BYEizKMskfKrHrdK5TJ8K-qtHJkXk8mwU26AevQHyZBMGR2sbq8ldLmBJ0nY2Jlpf86IEJ-VRlikawK5cuUPVQAjw1cVxrVBa08dHPHeDkB3uRNOYEPsrg2ZiTRxBlm-Zc6G9X4yZzVkN7ZDg425Cfjpc6VGbjqjBS5eN88I2XSaAEHaYWDXFCS3C3D1P2h_RA8iCPUM6jQ6vhSOKu3oN2j2urTvAIy3HPqpQ3InBPNV1vmAmZPEssDo8HgNo-v0cAH6pnJWRY0oUTlXERA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education** , including **a required course on the Constitution**
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee9df211dc7d436c8905168ff7072d0c&_e=D2_g9OLTsraqyw50ikqIbXGtAkSOfhflRqQ9pve_D7VF4eyomHrR4FNHeSnPR9a-B5E82kUtkarvbvrVTKO44VdODu1qT00LfIxYpmJDOcMO64EP4Rqhuylb3Ls0MD48bq2BYEizKMskfKrHrdK5TJ8K-qtHJkXk8mwU26AevQHyZBMGR2sbq8ldLmBJ0nY2Jlpf86IEJ-VRlikawK5cuUPVQAjw1cVxrVBa08dHPHeDkB3uRNOYEPsrg2ZiTRxBECgAYhngaL9ZshROoqOr2OCk8qR7PupqvGlCdqNJ1Ecta1wWek7Nt2NhvUT3AbYjau6vorXKys7WsroGnuLFg40O4qSXwf72YDjpw6NlOapeDY8nAqyuncP-ojqaMN2myvHzWRwjq0HMhgnotGtUKg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, **I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today**. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice, which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee9df211dc7d436c8905168ff7072d0c&_e=D2_g9OLTsraqyw50ikqIbXGtAkSOfhflRqQ9pve_D7VF4eyomHrR4FNHeSnPR9a-B5E82kUtkarvbvrVTKO44VdODu1qT00LfIxYpmJDOcMO64EP4Rqhuylb3Ls0MD48bq2BYEizKMskfKrHrdK5TJ8K-qtHJkXk8mwU26AevQHyZBMGR2sbq8ldLmBJ0nY2Jlpf86IEJ-VRlikawK5cuUPVQAjw1cVxrVBa08dHPHeDkB3uRNOYEPsrg2ZiTRxBI_hhhM7WZGHjThodO3lE7Z1f9j1NfQR7m2G_sMWbIeqr6XIg575DUSjrFRbRwyc5pgQ9cGAdRXSTrJAFdl4YbTqLnNoL__eJwdbtQ-U6jXcufpCZ3Cd4VwuSSd9dMzCSIANrJD6i5kUUOgTOkVmnog%3D%3D)** |

name: Forward Party
subject: Feel Like You Don't Have A Vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You're Not Alone

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=1)
---
Saturday, March 23, 2024 | Peter -- Earlier this year, Louisiana legislators voted to stop the state's open primaries that have been in place for more than 50 years, replacing it with a closed primary system. [Only 15% of voters are in support of the change](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=B28DEhdR3H_oYIWpyg4m-4TP9wDY2dcR6Kd4LtaXsOk1q94OWqSh3E2ZPzZxnXLF7KOMsF3k6ZbCEI1jqwE8kA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=2), while more than 60% actively want to keep their open primary options. In Connecticut, a state law was passed decades ago to allow for open primaries so that the state's independent voters could practice their constitutional right to vote. Unfortunately, the state left it to the legacy parties to implement this change and, of course, [neither party has decided to allow independents to vote](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=aZBbYkNWX3mpK5m14Cf4kFEF5BjttB_pEa8PJnfG1yyHzChDTTp-2y8Y8QxDIpJg-bAGGJjMnAPqZAriE55XSQJg0Ornz7yh8_UWiQ8tyOWOMro-RvfE1JIEC6wTvyftDQZBSoeFp1ikiMJ_HpIT1ijghF-miEgxiLTcb36wd2muDlVOYb0bhfgXmaLmMqwUamS6-HrKWViVWT7mC58Gc6KCPSSMw9qZy12kX-utg9M&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=3). It seems increasingly that both legacy parties would rather shut voters out than change their policies to address issues that Americans care about. There is nothing more central to our democracy than our right to vote, and we here at Forward believe Americans deserve a Party that works to earn their votes rather than shutting out anyone who won't support their increasingly narrow vision for this country. So please spread the word—Forward is the party where the voice of the voter matters.
[**Krist Novoselic, Bassist For Nirvana And Forward Board Member, Sits Down With Andrew Yang To Talk Better Elections**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=rDd8ldfLFk-s1hATdsbsrVBemyh7mZFrstUOk5IxkpBkLu-SYiHiZuVXOjvxvVf2e118cRjfdb16WiEB5cYA6VMOhzFfw-5thC58RZRh8GZTiX7JlTk_lhv9ezQqrye1vJ5ACzXfzgezRdclLqDo5A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=4) | _Independent Voter Network_ Andrew Yang, Forward Party co-founder, and Krist Novoselic, Nirvana co-founder, sit down on Andrew’s podcast to discuss all things independent politics and election reform. Krist is an avid reformer and well-known political figure in Seattle, and this year he joined Forward Party’s board to help drive the party and fix our democracy. [**North Carolina Forward Party Driving Towards State Party Approval**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=b6jvjJMcwLEroZg6GghaO-7rZr42OZHuXkaAehNQoNv8CE9CK9eFI82-13OCVLU0YiQrNDeU1pCys0D65tX40TBPqJ3kbd4WkokSEk7yU4o&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=5) | _Queen City News_ The NC Forward party is doing big things! In a state where the most common political party is “none of the above,” there’s lots of opportunity for Forward to make a difference at the local level. That’s just what Pat Newton, NC Forward chairman, is focused on.
**March 27 | Minnesota CD8 Forward Party Meeting** The Minnesota Forward Party is holding a meeting for all its members in CD8 on google meets. Hop on the line and hear all about the plans for April to grow the party in the state, along with how you can contribute. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/minnesota_cd8_meeting_3_27_24?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=6) **March 28 | Greater Cleveland Forward Meet & Greet** The Forwardists of greater Cleveland are meeting at 16-Bit Bar and Arcade in Cleveland—and you’re invited! Join for fun games, drinks, and all things Forward with other members of the OH state party. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/ohioforward/greater_cleveland_forward_tz7i8krn0ddi21tevz9h6q_20240328?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=7) **March 31 | Cincinnati Area Forward Organizing Call** Join fellow Cincinnati area Forwardists for their April planning and organizing call. It’s being held on the last day of March—a perfect time to lay the plans for April and tackle the spring head on. Join to hear how you can help. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/ohioforward/cincinnati_area_forward_organizing_call_20240331?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=8)
[**House Delegation Unveils Updated Fair Representation Act to Reform Congressional Elections**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=w9-cj4RFPlFJDFemC0sbR7_2qqD4-HOWZWgAa4AQQ9roYfXItCyNGVatbEVCXqepMK4MbFYw1TbWNtxDQXJLqfW_IJ87iTE1fy0sNwG-q4c&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=9) | _Representative Don Beyer_ [**Would Instant Runoffs Improve Election Process In NC? (Hint: yes)**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=7lRG1pYHrrRabJlDzYfF6t0LZVvXMRz97Cp5LOjUo3WJxCymjqDE6N8udhvWMNrP9S4cNxkZ0YLXz4XvLkdZyixbIpCJAxTw7O2uhxIdg0L47tWB7MmN1gaJBgR_C50V&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=10) | _Carolina Public Press_ [**Open Primaries Initiative Exceeds State Requirement With 70,000+ Signatures**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=3--UWOFE8tdE46iv9pPNX949fkElhZOq-QtXjpkGn9nwUP14jUdvvlKcKmKhAkX4AtrfisF72X4INhk_SWGBztAIeaUpYgfbmRNmOd4_nOekWCxi-qNwjgrwuoM8oLibfdqTLAVxwNTL5UfmjtG3jA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=11) | _The Sandpoint Reader_ [**New Statewide Poll Shows Minimal Voter Appetite For Changing To A Closed Primary**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=B28DEhdR3H_oYIWpyg4m-4TP9wDY2dcR6Kd4LtaXsOk1q94OWqSh3E2ZPzZxnXLF7KOMsF3k6ZbCEI1jqwE8kA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=12) | _Louisiana Radio Network_ [**Why Can't Independents Vote In Connecticut's Primaries?**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=aZBbYkNWX3mpK5m14Cf4kFEF5BjttB_pEa8PJnfG1yyHzChDTTp-2y8Y8QxDIpJg-bAGGJjMnAPqZAriE55XSQJg0Ornz7yh8_UWiQ8tyOWOMro-RvfE1JIEC6wTvyftDQZBSoeFp1ikiMJ_HpIT1ijghF-miEgxiLTcb36wd2muDlVOYb0bhfgXmaLmMqwUamS6-HrKWViVWT7mC58Gc6KCPSSMw9qZy12kX-utg9M&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=13) | _Fox 61_
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=14) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=15) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=16) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=17) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_38&n=18) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party, all rights reserved. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4352700c36564a6eb65e7869a5217451&_e=mduUz0NDo-NelnQfQgz1mFFeuB2bc33EWxiz4NyE1Jk4Mk8nbCOn7rV6QgVrZSF5P4lgfNgyvrcXNlcWEL07_C4Jzv91W4wthie8ubrVMxSGnCXQ0UufyenSAlQMF1nannWnp47kpF8l2n0mP9f6OUv-DcKdB2DpF4vab8R-zfXZiBgMluENGnhfPDfa-FT_kBfje-piSdDCZNmvk5IjoY33xH_diBp4ASBbql-J0gk5_NFJZ1FnFC0NteCkbsilXO9w_5bcdvDfMxHrFn92t3vc8h7GW8x3bKE6K6POKWES3LwIeXsDfkJVPsqgHEh5KgIKb2sY7IgeXJxuEtlZEHID4rmYARump--giiwDFPtvo3Q5tgOtuiH0U8fZALq2WHjXGnkmHBCVdN4MfVzVdw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. You can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4352700c36564a6eb65e7869a5217451&_e=mduUz0NDo-NelnQfQgz1mFFeuB2bc33EWxiz4NyE1Jk4Mk8nbCOn7rV6QgVrZSF5P4lgfNgyvrcXNlcWEL07_C4Jzv91W4wthie8ubrVMxSGnCXQ0UufyenSAlQMF1nannWnp47kpF8l2n0mP9f6OUv-DcKdB2DpF4vab8R-zfXZiBgMluENGnhfPDfa-FT_kBfje-piSdDCZNmvk5IjoY33xH_diBp4ASBbql-J0gk5_NFJZ1FnFC0NteCkbsilVX9zn_YWtqyBiib6l6CI0WLm9T7uMGV6t5egb90MuSPKOS6UkPe3VqJYkSfwP0lS8x0oolL3v3x01fUnDof-HQEJLH50hK65hOglPcj7k-zK7IYCAlxXlheb37AJ90G7ZOphJBfgkjPj509sJqr_sg%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education** , including **a required course on the Constitution**
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4352700c36564a6eb65e7869a5217451&_e=mduUz0NDo-NelnQfQgz1mFFeuB2bc33EWxiz4NyE1Jk4Mk8nbCOn7rV6QgVrZSF5P4lgfNgyvrcXNlcWEL07_C4Jzv91W4wthie8ubrVMxSGnCXQ0UufyenSAlQMF1nannWnp47kpF8l2n0mP9f6OUv-DcKdB2DpF4vab8R-zfXZiBgMluENGnhfPDfa-FT_kBfje-piSdDCZNmvk5IjoY33xH_diBp4ASBbql-J0gk5_NFJZ1FnFC0NteCkbsillCwfU63MIozPdrw6VLKlZrobiWi_uNfGokiKObaVeokDymXdszhPlGfTtTD2goPd1UYf1woQR5w4EENuDpW565hy8TBsKEURCDKcwZxGrcyqaFfpOAUQYQMxBZp91qGCL1U5FEhl1UVB7iv_U49yrg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, **I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today**. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice, which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4352700c36564a6eb65e7869a5217451&_e=mduUz0NDo-NelnQfQgz1mFFeuB2bc33EWxiz4NyE1Jk4Mk8nbCOn7rV6QgVrZSF5P4lgfNgyvrcXNlcWEL07_C4Jzv91W4wthie8ubrVMxSGnCXQ0UufyenSAlQMF1nannWnp47kpF8l2n0mP9f6OUv-DcKdB2DpF4vab8R-zfXZiBgMluENGnhfPDfa-FT_kBfje-piSdDCZNmvk5IjoY33xH_diBp4ASBbql-J0gk5_NFJZ1FnFC0NteCkbsilOtF6QgMXKtuZDPAiLzUX2-N761la5ljkO_G-izDbynUG7AascbtD3Fx5djMeGuzwY5t9HCqLwk_g8LRjyt3k2-6tE0ngFVRF3GpdXvj5yzEfPQlH4baFfgGcnEcdFvD_J8m8N6-LKw8sc3hSBDb9_A%3D%3D)** |

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=4352700c36564a6eb65e7869a5217451&_t=CcV1Q052k55_Lv_5kZX6jZ52t3JPK0s9oQwhMAKoXwKDl1HQHXs1kvzHPUWmDueHb_uLlOCdE3inlVIsGhe0jpGjE2OIF7HLc4q2e-QVVY9poGglp490AMPzGU77qqyQsdOEl_DeDfPblGhhQ3k9TJLuv7paIM1RU7pAvvhwOPU%3D)

I'm counting on generous patriots like YOU to defend me at this pivotal moment. ~~ ~ ~ ~~ Thank you, ~~ Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I’m writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith. |
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=25ba58d07b4048deafa47cddfe70b44b&_t=VUHw5fXtPKUWvPb9g3iPhACGOJyrsm8sxYAk5kqdnZCiNSS7gFjTGO5JJp10quMtHBInjTyxyfD6R5DcnT0MS-zPTyeyKYm0CPhjxwqmKkg%3D)_

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=25ba58d07b4048deafa47cddfe70b44b&_e=Qyg1uAOCL75xCKOQKnBSWqkVKnKaB2D9ranocyelf1dpN2enDgNrCbnynQM7V0HAKCyDS8GLrKaouXEupYLLtpHanM48P7A5qRFDBxqs0dzdC1KZQeP97pc7SF-9cNdRhLp8NjavE1MGnWnoADNdozvmhnnGV_hoMfzKJAWLla6QPT4kpmYfTTnlzi8SPAqG-2tO295wlxF06kHsIQAgcIteoqTDcir7Md5yKPEOutN2I1bJLoFd_XAbU3lbIRuRQFHaEHWh8WIicHnZlKHRB1n2SjKWJZHgzbJNTmOUloaaGbLkP028WYdUUgk5Ee2jxftv6F7CY09hAPNKPWHwa0KZGfIHLKGFaSpWkY1bpFNEzJuY10y0KzYU6rYjUKSL_fErn9z8Y6ki-nFVLyK_9Q%3D%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom?

It's a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by [making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=25ba58d07b4048deafa47cddfe70b44b&_e=Qyg1uAOCL75xCKOQKnBSWqkVKnKaB2D9ranocyelf1dpN2enDgNrCbnynQM7V0HAKCyDS8GLrKaouXEupYLLtpHanM48P7A5qRFDBxqs0dzdC1KZQeP97pc7SF-9cNdRhLp8NjavE1MGnWnoADNdozvmhnnGV_hoMfzKJAWLla6QPT4kpmYfTTnlzi8SPAqG-2tO295wlxF06kHsIQAgcIteoqTDcir7Md5yKPEOutOFg2Pt6Aoejld3BhazhcAId6NHvLEsVAoka8stNZzrceP6pQuLZUdqjTNa17CcDlcBQLTMl8O15Z1xBtrWUDmHeQAZGxSIKXN93iKpo5nXZsaaawrocux2tIgCukeEuOXeI1IBLHr-rJScm86FxffIh2V_FLS5KZ5V_Rlz0gUQsw%3D%3D)

Your investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better path forward for our country, safeguarding freedom for you and your family in the coming years.

Will you join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the link below:

[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/donate](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=25ba58d07b4048deafa47cddfe70b44b&_e=Qyg1uAOCL75xCKOQKnBSWqkVKnKaB2D9ranocyelf1dpN2enDgNrCbnynQM7V0HAKCyDS8GLrKaouXEupYLLtpHanM48P7A5qRFDBxqs0dzdC1KZQeP97pc7SF-9cNdRhLp8NjavE1MGnWnoADNdozvmhnnGV_hoMfzKJAWLla6QPT4kpmYfTTnlzi8SPAqG-2tO295wlxF06kHsIQAgcIteoqTDcir7Md5yKPEOutO_Rtbir56Ag5c8BIZBxGiMcOKRnEBo4KAlBbG4KQgClDxDU-wIp7D0GIrNKrN2KC5IkKi0nq-7vE6kP-qXbthzBmBLKCWnZbxecd2a-FhNN9dmre8w07mUANQJZNzrxLvpfBT7VlYWyd6ruONZs5YvNQpPN5wHPuEiHjrC1BxtzQ%3D%3D)

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support, Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. [Click here to give whatever you can today »](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=25ba58d07b4048deafa47cddfe70b44b&_e=Qyg1uAOCL75xCKOQKnBSWqkVKnKaB2D9ranocyelf1dpN2enDgNrCbnynQM7V0HAKCyDS8GLrKaouXEupYLLtpHanM48P7A5qRFDBxqs0dzdC1KZQeP97pc7SF-9cNdRhLp8NjavE1MGnWnoADNdozvmhnnGV_hoMfzKJAWLla6QPT4kpmYfTTnlzi8SPAqG-2tO295wlxF06kHsIQAgcIteoqTDcir7Md5yKPEOutNSzDpQxZZU8q9II-oDW-bjT0UoSSRSQEIe7TcMXaO5iycZ3ZoTGnwJ-dLoc40XZjBhU57ilorDun4o52wvKfIHHzEy6ROspWHjYala4De26hxgGZpRU1unjCAZd6nQZX-ZOxuKYAZVTuFi6FVQtX3NiRFJfc6GR26JMRgoqZuCXw%3D%3D)

Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Stop Censorship of Conservatives
body:
I'm writing you today because the time has come when Rogan needs your help in this historic battle for Free Speech.

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, When conservative Rogan O'Handley dared to voice the same questions every single one of us had over the 2020 election, **the Left used everything it had to shut him up.** But he refused to go down without a fight and now nearly three years later, Rogan is STILL battling tooth and nail for his rights - and yours - to question our government, to speak freely, and to protect fair and honest elections in America. I'm writing you today because the time has come when Rogan needs your help in this historic battle for Free Speech. **[Will you make an emergency tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to help win Rogan's case at the U.S. Supreme Court?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=08a380d2ca29429aad93402f31b97d74&_e=WD3T3lz8jSnOeIaG-kzaj0IIgNRMZoPhONIydn7B0UtDlNL5Petuzv9Oi2l_VealPiRjHomUm_ULkgfq3yik5KNgjNyTqIYXyYOWasmGcadkX1FH7IcH6vhLtlhoHWY6pkISqYBYkI2MluBn1HmWiR8Z0zoqGJG2TLCYFQQsfrbvCDLWPd4Yv3cf4T9f6SEyeCjz8y4wPGjyv-hPL1bsJUzyqdyX1Y7egSgR3m_GvuqK1NrrmQBOJZBurA0305WwkKkDk8T2NEZOBwNxdzSR1hGD5cFzHgRgy4SjU1rodR4DY4uByBxxDJ6XOBEJGkvhdY5E2sDwiGoJHcSP9sufprrErh24lSSTHenVkuAicBbUYjFw8NCn89ZbohKbbitk)** We announced our case on Tucker Carlson Tonight but let me quickly give you the details: In February 2021, long before Elon Musk took over Twitter, the leftists there shut down Rogan's Twitter account claiming he had "violated rules about election integrity" by merely asking for an audit of the 2020 election. Later, we found out the government employees working for Alex Padilla (now a U.S. Senator) messaged Twitter on December 30th asking them to immediately take down Rogan's election-related tweet. The very next day Twitter responded: **_" Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don't hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do."_** That's right - leftist government officials used government property to get Big Tech to censor speech they disagreed with! Then this unholy alliance shut down and silenced Rogan's account completely. My friend, the collusion between leftist politicians and Big Tech must be stopped before our nation looks more like China or North Korea. The good news is the email exchange above gives us the proof we will need to win this case before the U.S. Supreme Court - but getting there is an all hands-on-deck situation. **[That's why I'm asking you to donate $25 or more to help us win Rogan's case at the Supreme Court.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=08a380d2ca29429aad93402f31b97d74&_e=WD3T3lz8jSnOeIaG-kzaj0IIgNRMZoPhONIydn7B0UtDlNL5Petuzv9Oi2l_VealPiRjHomUm_ULkgfq3yik5KNgjNyTqIYXyYOWasmGcadkX1FH7IcH6vhLtlhoHWY6pkISqYBYkI2MluBn1HmWiR8Z0zoqGJG2TLCYFQQsfrbvCDLWPd4Yv3cf4T9f6SEyeCjz8y4wPGjyv-hPL1bsJUzyqdyX1Y7egSgR3m_GvuojG3fhWcHnzQ_YTIPQlJfKis90_cTDGov_BgMCyOK36SHSPi66kwecRp8zXc_ASAFHcvufi10X579PptZpfKYnh3o25U6h9WZZzeVuEb5tiUmDWmArrnQSWZzL0Szk-E6AHmsTreQoJfCWmoNmP-T2)** Many just sit back and complain about the censorship coming from Big Tech and leftist government officials. But Rogan O'Handley is fighting back against Big Government and Big Tech working hand-in-glove to silence folks like you and me. I think you want to fight back as well - and this is your chance. **[**So will you make an urgently-needed tax-deductible donation of $25 or more today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=08a380d2ca29429aad93402f31b97d74&_e=WD3T3lz8jSnOeIaG-kzaj0IIgNRMZoPhONIydn7B0UtDlNL5Petuzv9Oi2l_VealPiRjHomUm_ULkgfq3yik5KNgjNyTqIYXyYOWasmGcadkX1FH7IcH6vhLtlhoHWY6pkISqYBYkI2MluBn1HmWiR8Z0zoqGJG2TLCYFQQsfrbvCDLWPd4Yv3cf4T9f6SEyeCjz8y4wPGjyv-hPL1bsJUzyqdyX1Y7egSgR3m_GvupiJ9t3-0QBBuvQuyxly2-sxJVAeM63ZCOIsECJgxdVOTSvbZ-gqqmXC7ejY9kDwCayxixWhiVy4ViUPEUjjo_2yT-dzm2zoIIoahDyaV48cDsjd7ZCQfANNvRyfLSE758G7wjolv2SecdLT5g-h2b-)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm the Founder and CEO of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from my numerous appearances on Newsmax and Fox News with **Laura Ingraham** , **Tucker Carlson** , **Shannon Bream** and **Fox and Friends** talking about our cases and how help from patriots just like you helped us win huge victories against the radical Left -- including THREE Supreme Court cases.
---
* We've blown the lid off of radical doctors and hospitals who mutilate children in the name of profit and gender-affirming "care."
* We're suing school districts who strip parents and grandparents of their rights and indoctrinate our children and grandchildren.
* And now, with your help, we're taking on Big Tech and Big Government censorship.

---
And now, with your help, we're taking on Big Tech and Big Government censorship. As I'm sure you know, escalating this case to the U.S. Supreme Court is not going to be an easy fight. **But if we do nothing, conservatives will continue to be silenced ...** No questioning shady election practices, not criticizing public officials, no freedom of speech for anyone who disagrees with the Left's increasingly radical agenda. I hope you see that we have to go all the way on this one. And we can't do it without you. **[To win this Free Speech battle for all of us, please follow this link right now to make your urgently-needed tax-deductible donation of $25 today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=08a380d2ca29429aad93402f31b97d74&_e=WD3T3lz8jSnOeIaG-kzaj0IIgNRMZoPhONIydn7B0UtDlNL5Petuzv9Oi2l_VealPiRjHomUm_ULkgfq3yik5KNgjNyTqIYXyYOWasmGcadkX1FH7IcH6vhLtlhoHWY6pkISqYBYkI2MluBn1HmWiR8Z0zoqGJG2TLCYFQQsfrbvCDLWPd4Yv3cf4T9f6SEyeCjz8y4wPGjyv-hPL1bsJUzyqdyX1Y7egSgR3m_GvupeaPrJpnzK-FBLhoUAgMae3nOT2c058vplh6VqxGQPbdWoZWj50yKQYkBI-FtdD2Y5EovugBeryxATwBfzzjQIFY7YG94iRPO_bNYjIQCKrfcgzW8H9H7GFlrzBSyoSRtKIC3mUqP4VPktPL-iE4RE)** If you can give more today - say $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more - please do it. Once we win here, Big Government and Big Tech liberals will not be able to shut down and silence conservatives again. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
|
---
| | God bless,

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Conservative shouldn’t get into the banning business – Update from Mississippi’s favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571989?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**On Supertalk this week, Paul Gallo asked me what I thought about a bill to ban****“squatted” trucks making its way through the Mississippi legislature. **

**I said I was against it.** In a free society, I said, politicians should not be in the business of banning things.
---
|
---
_A bill to ban these?_
| I might be against this ban, but I’m not about to invest a lot of effort opposing it. I do, however, think it is worth spelling out why conservatives should be very wary.

**Those in favor of a ban on “squatted” trucks are quick to tell us that these trucks are dangerous.** I can think of a lot of things that could be deemed dangerous.

**Do conservatives really want to get into the business of banning things because they are dangerous?** Once you start, where do you stop? **If trucks are to be banned for being dangerous, wait ‘til you hear what progressives have to say about guns.**

Under this proposed law, anyone caught driving a vehicle whose front ends are raised more than four inches above the height of the rear fender faces a $100 fine. Will police officers pull people over to measure their fenders? **Should the guy with a truck raised a mere 3 inches expect to get pulled over every time? **
---
|
---
_Leave those trucks alone..._
| **As the parent of a teenager, I’ve discovered how adding a young person to your insurance policy can make your premiums soar. **This is because the insurance system is good at assessing risk. Higher risk = higher premiums.

**If squatted trucks really were the danger that the detractors claim, surely it would be reflected with raised insurance premiums to the point where they became prohibitively expensive? **

In a free society, there has to be an overwhelmingly good reason to use the state’s monopoly of force to restrict something. **It is not enough to ban something because we disapprove of it. Or as I fear, disapprove of the people that drive “squatted” trucks. **

**Once politicians form the habit of seeking out things to ban for the benefit of the rest of us, they won’t stop. **Next will come a ban on certain types of vapes. Or, as in California, certain food additives and Skittles. If they can ban one type of truck, why not another?

**If you want to see where relentless banning leads, take a look at my own native Britain.** Despite having had notionally conservative governments, politicians across the pond have relentlessly banned things from certain breeds of dog to plastic drinking straws. From the ability to use email lists for marketing to self-defense pepper spray. From disposable cutlery and gas water heaters to the internal combustion engine (from 2035).

---
|
---
_Britain - A nation infantilized by restrictions_
| On their own, none of these restrictions have proved to be a catastrophe (although the ban on internal combustion cars, once it comes into force, may yet prove to be). **Collectively, however, the blizzard of bans has been devastating by infantilizing British society. **

**Treated like children, more and more people behave like children. Denied responsibility, society grows irresponsible. Britain today feels utterly demoralized as a consequence.** This is what happens when you put politicians in charge of deciding what’s best for everyone else.

Banning tilted trucks won’t be the end of the world for Mississippi. It will be the end of a little bit more liberty.

The impulse to ban things, I believe, comes from what H.L. Mencken called “the haunting fear that someone, somewhere, may be having a good time.” Let’s leave Mississippi truck drivers alone.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=35761bcefa&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Dear Peter,
As you may have seen, Congress is taking extraordinary measures to shut down the popular TikTok platform.
As always, the political elites invoke "national security" to justify their assault on our constitutional rights and freedoms.
On TikTok, Team Kennedy is having incredible success spreading Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s message of protecting the environment, stopping regime change wars, medical freedom, and expanding America's middle class.
TikTok is especially popular with young voters, and our success on the platform shows why __Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is leading a nationwide poll among voters under 35__.
President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump have endorsed banning TikTok. But it goes far beyond that. The new legislation allows the President to ban ANY platform, software, or website, as long as he deems it to be guided by America’s adversaries. That gives the President dictatorial power over freedom of speech and the press.
Democracy is more than elections. It requires open public debate based on freely available information. Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s fight to get on the ballot is part of a much bigger crusade to restore genuine democracy in America.
He can only win this fight with your help. [Even if you have already made an urgent contribution, please make another one today!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tiktok_3_23_24_rs_nd3&n=3)

The stakes are high, and you have the power to shape the outcome of this historic election. [Please contribute today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tiktok_3_23_24_rs_nd3&n=10), and let's put rational, hopeful, visionary thinking back in the White House in November.

**And according to a new poll 51% of voters agree with this.** In fact, some have gone as far as petitioning their state to not allow his name on the ballot!

Friend, Christian relief organizations are in the crosshairs of the U.S. State Department ...__**_BECAUSE_ of their Christian faith!** **[**Will you stand with Christian Legal Society in support of faith-based relief organizations today? Add your name to our urgent open letter to the U.S. State Department.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d7c86a40d8b41ec836cb65dffafc8c2&_e=4Wq_9enBvAq0_fS_xa-5Slqq5flUz5QxQnKCwx4pXpazUyFHeAYNW1xPLawvIBcw_-2q5YqM60OzP1w1RWlg4b8fw6NROIyLdJkmNN9BZuyK_EtAhtUyfgmhweIbEE-pypUXeTk83Nq8KjgHiJCOQERjO1cOudJMwafoP8JJ2FxQ1Y-CpEHA7-pgn9zvMsAcp8uMoHBWsL298aWPcgvUE-fPi_VivVdq2B2xotMV_Cn3fkk2woVvav7KtdoWzd9EQO_la8RIfy-PI6rfXoWOm4KmVBDN0c0FRlm-YbsIPOlYWKmnkVeE5C4d4MPtUyTf)**

[Say NO to the State Department targeting Christian](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d7c86a40d8b41ec836cb65dffafc8c2&_e=4Wq_9enBvAq0_fS_xa-5Slqq5flUz5QxQnKCwx4pXpazUyFHeAYNW1xPLawvIBcw_-2q5YqM60OzP1w1RWlg4b8fw6NROIyLdJkmNN9BZuyK_EtAhtUyfgmhweIbEE-pypUXeTk83Nq8KjgHiJCOQERjO1cOudJMwafoP8JJ2FyfZaphxzCvl4E1cGQRJgm3dTawTFmM2dTqk4OY5sNDjtsTnIQ-iMtCNM8twd_hjWNfwf1WQbDVRDthGeh8_y5CMZ3Vhr09UL2X0lkRgCcXwRXo_IfbBXwni9R7uAoY-GCn5LXrmbsXkhYA3MeITehL)
---
The U.S. State Department has just proposed new regulations that _will cut off grants and contracts_ to Christian--and all faith-based--relief organizations that require their employees to share their faith and their religious values. That means that relief organizations like **Samaritan's Purse** , a Christian ministry that has helped millions worldwide since its founding in 1970 ... Humanitarian organizations like **World Vision** , which has supported children in need and empowered millions of people out of poverty for more than 70 years ... And many thousands more **faith-based ministry, relief, and aid organizations** of all sizes that do immeasurable good work in God's name across the globe ...
**May be forced to SCALE DOWN --or SHUT DOWN--their operations, as they are unconstitutionally targeted for de-funding because of their Christian faith.** **[**Friend, Christian Legal Society is standing alongside religious groups and ministries to oppose this unconstitutional and immoral regulatory change from the U.S. State Department. Will you add your name to our open letter to join in this fight?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d7c86a40d8b41ec836cb65dffafc8c2&_e=4Wq_9enBvAq0_fS_xa-5Slqq5flUz5QxQnKCwx4pXpazUyFHeAYNW1xPLawvIBcw_-2q5YqM60OzP1w1RWlg4b8fw6NROIyLdJkmNN9BZuyK_EtAhtUyfgmhweIbEE-pypUXeTk83Nq8KjgHiJCOQERjO1cOudJMwafoP8JJ2FyjQGCrJiENwb1RXerKrUKQhaR5HVTo3cuyO_gMUUJ2FHtpBIIn0tzh9vU6U-jpi3K_Z3m7CmQXBsy69sYs6D2E_P45MGTHHBmuT_bQs_FttpQ343nKSV_2BqHQ1-QlZpitoSDdlqIaJfiFIqUqVd_M)**

---
Friend, no faith-based organization in America today should be forced to reject biblical principles ... and embrace the government's currently preferred social ideology ... or risk scaling down or shutting down their operations. Yet under the regulatory change that the U.S. State Department has proposed, funding and contracts could be denied to ANY group that has a statement of faith or policies that are true to biblical values but counter to today's predominantly "woke" social climate. That means organizations that protect life instead of promoting abortion, advocate for traditional marriage and family, or follow biblical teaching on biological sex rather than "gender ideology" are at risk of being targeted--and punished!--by the U.S. government. **[**Please stand with Christian Legal Society to express your strong opposition to the U.S. State Department targeting Christian and all faith-based relief organizations _on the basis of their religious beliefs!_ Add your name to our urgent open letter now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d7c86a40d8b41ec836cb65dffafc8c2&_e=4Wq_9enBvAq0_fS_xa-5Slqq5flUz5QxQnKCwx4pXpazUyFHeAYNW1xPLawvIBcw_-2q5YqM60OzP1w1RWlg4b8fw6NROIyLdJkmNN9BZuyK_EtAhtUyfgmhweIbEE-pypUXeTk83Nq8KjgHiJCOQERjO1cOudJMwafoP8JJ2FxemDmLbRPq2bUp_BrbQImLYDR2-q_3_xSeskekgDo6tk2pb3ryaskEXuZTgr2QVTdiJ0vMJS-y0SW4tKmMJk_cM0XzpLo4ABICB6pgJGrKlO3oUOdpYwTXem2Ox9zU1ychiGPoqQMTtbMM96FwYY6O)**
---
[Say NO to the State Department targeting Christians](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d7c86a40d8b41ec836cb65dffafc8c2&_e=4Wq_9enBvAq0_fS_xa-5Slqq5flUz5QxQnKCwx4pXpazUyFHeAYNW1xPLawvIBcw_-2q5YqM60OzP1w1RWlg4b8fw6NROIyLdJkmNN9BZuyK_EtAhtUyfgmhweIbEE-pypUXeTk83Nq8KjgHiJCOQERjO1cOudJMwafoP8JJ2Fyu_cH6Vpn_yc8Qd4fqA9o9oAvoa-jSmXVaDjw_K5wqKbBtfvs6X9QWKxpcGTmlJ1hxDewLPPSBvvr8VQ_9bReBCcjn7f6gE56bUffcdzBW2l37AfFpguTFuGFHqyL3Wl-aprEMAr35_eFZn_nGiZUX)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **This is one of the most urgent --and important--fights that we face for religious freedom this year, **and I am grateful for concerned Americans like you coming alongside us to defend Christian and all faith-based relief organizations in the battle today. Thank you for your prayers and for your consideration. David Nammo Executive Director & CEO Christian Legal Society

Add your name to our urgent open letter to the U.S. State Department.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xAQHhFkb9ii8uhIcfHF-Tw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4V1oP0RsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9jaHJpc3RpYW4tbGVnYWwtc29jaWV0eS9kZjNhYTg5OC0xOWI4LTQwZTctOTU2ZS1lZmEzYjI4MWIzMjY_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9VVNDTjQ3Njk0VwNzcGNCCmX8687-ZWN2r4lSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

[Say NO to the State Department targeting Christian](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xAQHhFkb9ii8uhIcfHF-Tw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4V1oP0RsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9jaHJpc3RpYW4tbGVnYWwtc29jaWV0eS9kZjNhYTg5OC0xOWI4LTQwZTctOTU2ZS1lZmEzYjI4MWIzMjY_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9VVNDTjQ3Njk0VwNzcGNCCmX8687-ZWN2r4lSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

The U.S. State Department has just proposed new regulations that _will cut off grants and contracts_ to Christian—and all faith-based—relief organizations that require their employees to share their faith and their religious values. That means that relief organizations like **Samaritan's Purse** , a Christian ministry that has helped millions worldwide since its founding in 1970 ... Humanitarian organizations like **World Vision** , which has supported children in need and empowered millions of people out of poverty for more than 70 years ... And many thousands more **faith-based ministry, relief, and aid organizations** of all sizes that do immeasurable good work in God's name across the globe ...
**May be forced to SCALE DOWN—or SHUT DOWN—their operations, as they are unconstitutionally targeted for de-funding because of their Christian faith.** **[**Friend, Christian Legal Society is standing alongside religious groups and ministries to oppose this unconstitutional and immoral regulatory change from the U.S. State Department. Will you add your name to our open letter to join in this fight?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xAQHhFkb9ii8uhIcfHF-Tw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4V1oP0RsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9jaHJpc3RpYW4tbGVnYWwtc29jaWV0eS9kZjNhYTg5OC0xOWI4LTQwZTctOTU2ZS1lZmEzYjI4MWIzMjY_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9VVNDTjQ3Njk0VwNzcGNCCmX8687-ZWN2r4lSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Yet under the regulatory change that the U.S. State Department has proposed, funding and contracts could be denied to ANY group that has a statement of faith or policies that are true to biblical values but counter to today's predominantly "woke" social climate. That means organizations that protect life instead of promoting abortion, advocate for traditional marriage and family, or follow biblical teaching on biological sex rather than "gender ideology" are at risk of being targeted—and punished!—by the U.S. government. **[**Please stand with Christian Legal Society to express your strong opposition to the U.S. State Department targeting Christian and all faith-based relief organizations _on the basis of their religious beliefs!_ Add your name to our urgent open letter now.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xAQHhFkb9ii8uhIcfHF-Tw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4V1oP0RsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9jaHJpc3RpYW4tbGVnYWwtc29jaWV0eS9kZjNhYTg5OC0xOWI4LTQwZTctOTU2ZS1lZmEzYjI4MWIzMjY_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9VVNDTjQ3Njk0VwNzcGNCCmX8687-ZWN2r4lSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Our Border is Being Overrun
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---

| Top generals testified in front of Congress about the Biden Administration's botched withdrawal from Afghanistan. We cannot forget one simple fact about this withdrawal: the death and misery resulting from our Afghanistan exit was 100% on Biden.
The military told him to keep 2,500 troops there. They told him to evacuate Americans first. Biden didn't listen.
But we also cannot forget another simple fact many would like to ignore: those who claim we could have exited completely without this chaos are purposefully ignorant of the reality in Afghanistan.
There was no way to get to zero troops without the tragic outcome that we saw. It is tactically impossible. That is why the military recommended keeping 2,500 troops in Bagram (not to mention it is a highly strategic location with an airbase in Central Asia.)
Going to zero troops was never going to work, no matter how it was executed. That's why Trump decided never to do it. Biden is 100% at fault.

Here at Fair Fight Action, we’re big on celebrating the achievements women have made, past and present, to create a more just world. As Women’s History Month comes to a close, we wanted to take a moment to honor a few amazing Black women who have paved the way for voting rights and equality, **proving that women can lead the way and make history.**
**Fannie Lou Hamer**
An activist, community organizer, and a leader in the Civil Rights Movement, Hamer spent her career fighting back against systemic racism present in elections. After facing violence and intimidation as barriers to voting, she helped form the Mississippi Freedom Democratic Party and pushed for greater racial equality in the political process. She was a key organizer of the 1964 Mississippi Freedom Summer (this year marks its 60th anniversary!) and helped found the National Women’s Political Caucus, which remains active today.
**Ella Baker**
A legendary behind-the-scenes organizer, Ella Baker played a key role in some of the most influential organizations during the Civil Rights Movement — including the NAACP, Martin Luther King’s Southern Christian Leadership Conference, and the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee. In addition to working alongside noted leaders in the movement, Baker believed in the power of young student activists, and worked as a mentor to encourage them to become a force in the fight for civil rights.
**Stacey Abrams**
Voting rights champion and founder of Fair Fight Action, Stacey Abrams has been a longtime advocate fighting to make voting accessible for all eligible voters. Her work has been centered around making the voting process inclusive and ensuring the integrity of our voting process and our democracy. After serving as House Minority Leader in the Georgia legislature, she ran for Governor of Georgia and brought national attention to systemic voter suppression prevalent throughout the state. Her persistence in this movement, exemplified by the founding of Fair Fight Action, inspires us to keep up the fight.
Baker, Hamer, and the women like Leader Abrams who’ve followed in their footsteps believed that voting was one key to freedom, and that our collective voice must be heard.
The strides we’ve made in protecting the freedom to vote would not have been possible without the work of these brave activists. While we have work left to do to combat anti-democratic extremism, we know with you on our team, we’ll continue to make history.
In solidarity,
The Fair Fight Action Team
