name: Rob
subject: RE-SCHEDULED: March 28th Luzerne County Fundraiser Re-Scheduled to April 8th with Special VIP Guest
body:
On April 8th we are having a big guest come to PA's 8th Congressional District | | | | |
---
Hi Friends,
**We are thrilled to finally announce that US House Majority Leader Steve Scalise will be joining us at The Westmoreland Club on Monday, April 8th!**
Leader Scalise is the representative of Louisiana’s 1st Congressional District who upholds the Constitution and advocates for the principles of fiscal discipline, lower taxes, strong border security, freedom, and conservative values. In 2017, while practicing for the Congressional baseball game, he was critically wounded but fought back and inspired the nation with his resilience and optimism. He has taken that fighting spirit to his battle with multiple myeloma and just recently completed a successful stem cell treatment.
We are honored to have him visit the 8th Congressional District and speak on the importance of this region to keeping our republican majority in the US House.
As a result, we will be **moving** our Luzerne County Fundraiser that was previously scheduled for March 28th to this date.
Below contains all the information on the _VIP Reception with Leader Steve Scalise_ as well as the General Reception. **Please**[**RSVP**](mailto:events@robforpa.com?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20attend%20Rob's%20fundraiser%20on%20April%208th%20with%20Leader%20Scalise!%20&body=Count%20me%20in%20for%20a%20donation%20of%20%24%20%20!)**by April 3rd** to reserve your attendance to this exciting event. You can also pay online, [here](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=d1c91a4492&e=131e83a3c2)!
We look forward to seeing you there.
-Sam Rob for PA Finance Director

**_BREAKING: Donald Trump sues ABC News and host George Stephanopoulos for defaming him during an interview with Rep. Nancy Mace._**

Fellow American - President Trump always fights for the truth.

After my interview with George Stephanopoulos, President Trump isn’t going to let the media get away with their lies.

In my interview, I corrected Stephanopoulos twice when he asked me an inaccurate question because President Trump has never been convicted of rape, but he doubled down – and now we’re going to fight back.

He not only shamed me continuously but also cited false facts against President Trump just because he disagreed with our politics. **Well, we’re not taking this attack from the liberal media lying down.**

[**President Trump has filed a defamation lawsuit against ABC and George Stephanopoulos for tarnishing his reputation with their FAKE NEWS.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aceb770eabce46eeb77ca0873b66716c&_e=kLYzGqgeiOoWIWjOhTOSCeId2TjYAAMZbyeYPZraahGU4ri0QkfgYo-kFdMaoGbV-NrnQdPu0eotDZLzmroO_bAQfdcB827OO00VnY5-R0TkTKefeTE1qpCGk7kQ2XQA7FOfcxt7X995fx0AhJ-PnGVH8oZApR_r4OozSPe-bMVqhpmdGfNUCwczBnpHpAuROyBE16tOnpXVjQhCDGrsUup02ZXuC4umRqD2uAa-4vszhIjPwgvU4tQXJm2vv2W5iYGjmSQQi-WM5995nuyJA6ZICuWpzxI4jxgkCwrk5YC_Zz2S1ywzRYCHJ1fp3CZfWqEu2LMkuZNm5FTZLtFeN0pCA4ogQLEjcq9c_1tzCeoVcXR6qe5wFWo1sr_UrRwqzEeOJG-_GGbAm3cr_D0Ezw%3D%3D)

I stand with President Trump in his fight to clear his name – _**do you?**_

[** ****STAND AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA » **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aceb770eabce46eeb77ca0873b66716c&_e=kLYzGqgeiOoWIWjOhTOSCeId2TjYAAMZbyeYPZraahGU4ri0QkfgYo-kFdMaoGbV-NrnQdPu0eotDZLzmroO_bAQfdcB827OO00VnY5-R0TkTKefeTE1qpCGk7kQ2XQA7FOfcxt7X995fx0AhJ-PnGVH8oZApR_r4OozSPe-bMVqhpmdGfNUCwczBnpHpAuROyBE16tOnpXVjQhCDGrsUup02ZXuC4umRqD2uAa-4vuH0hK-n8yCRnz60Sq6JcCiyXqOBW2uHJ-0qQtbGlpaThGks9jqPiZ9J2USDzRc2_LZnpvTp4CiJ5x5lUhEY5R932QjqYVS1sdY0dCRTZVwXT0jfm2jSf2lTQ5Zc0AZQZq-FI0_s1LmGvtvu1c_VvQzGdHOPvZoxZea6mDAKOrVqA%3D%3D)

[**George was vicious and unprofessional, and this was just another attempt for ABC to pedal their propaganda against President Trump and push their false narrative.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aceb770eabce46eeb77ca0873b66716c&_e=kLYzGqgeiOoWIWjOhTOSCeId2TjYAAMZbyeYPZraahGU4ri0QkfgYo-kFdMaoGbV-NrnQdPu0eotDZLzmroO_bAQfdcB827OO00VnY5-R0TkTKefeTE1qpCGk7kQ2XQA7FOfcxt7X995fx0AhJ-PnGVH8oZApR_r4OozSPe-bMVqhpmdGfNUCwczBnpHpAuROyBE16tOnpXVjQhCDGrsUup02ZXuC4umRqD2uAa-4vsnKgPQN4W9OQKZh9OwKrC5dx_-Vh-73FQWWXglzpnfjHOcVNWDY4nfxb7Mq6Oyua8IhRJgF_H9KiDi9ELr2r9QO0LR8c3tHtgKjupKMc00i32rbP6T10XbRrZfuBsVyW7ftVvkOo5S_wrOdLRVxccBVtCOVFVyo5V3N0m63il_yw%3D%3D)

Peter — it’s no secret that being an educator is one of the most challenging and underpaid professions in our country.

Teachers are crucial to molding the minds of our future generations. They put in countless hours preparing lesson plans, grading assignments, maintaining a safe classroom environment, and providing support to their students.

Despite their selflessness, they are forced to grapple with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout.

President Biden recognizes the critical role that teachers play and is determined to fight for higher wages. He knows that a strong public education system starts with supporting our teachers.
But we want to know where you stand: **Do you agree that it’s time to give our public school teachers a raise?**
**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81495590/462639222/-952846220?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5ZWI2YTQwLTE1ZTktZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hLPbcb2Dp4-VPB5C8PdI05MYjy063f4VPN0vD4XwtLQ=&emci=17ce8ea6-5be8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=29eb6a40-15e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81495592/462639223/-952846220?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5ZWI2YTQwLTE1ZTktZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hLPbcb2Dp4-VPB5C8PdI05MYjy063f4VPN0vD4XwtLQ=&emci=17ce8ea6-5be8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=29eb6a40-15e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=16951753)**

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1252%2E135344%2Er8cQgO)

Friend --
I know these emails can get repetitive.
Yes, Democrats cannot win the Senate without winning Michigan.
Yes, Joe Biden cannot beat Trump without winning Michigan.
Yes, our Senate race is one of the closest in the country.
Yes, our Senate race is one of the most expensive in the country.
These things were true last week, just as they are today. And if the dynamics and/or importance of this race ever change, so will the message in these emails.
But what IS different today is the emergence of our official FEC fundraising deadline just days away. When it ends, we're legally required to report what we raise and everyone will be watching.
So please: the goals we need to reach are not arbitrarily made up numbers, they are what we need to win. So if winning this Senate seat feels important to you, please know I need your help to get it done:
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute $3 (or more if you can) directly to my campaign for Senate in Michigan? Do it before our FEC deadline ends next week.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240323-1-700&t=2&akid=1252%2E135344%2Er8cQgO)**

Army Seeking Retirees To Come Back To Work Amid Manpower Crisis

The Army is seeking to bring back retired soldiers to fill critical
manpower shortages, according to a service-wide directive published
this week. The All Army Activities (ALARACT) document describes how
Army retirees can find and apply for open positions and aims to
maintain a sufficient number of personnel to fill all of the Army’s
authorized positions.

body:
John McCain had the courage to stand up to Donald Trump and protect the health care of millions of Americans. Brian Fitzpatrick? Not so much. | |
# Donald Trump Escalates Threats to Repeal the ACA and Rip Health Care Away From Millions
Protect Our Care In the 14 years since President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act (aka "Obamacare"), it's helped over 1 million Pennsylvanians get health insurance. Unfortunately, we can't count on Brian Fitzpatrick to do a damn thing to protect us. [Pitch in $10 or more to elect someone (me!) who will.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81496854/462642933/1655983737?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240323_fr_aca_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U2YjkzZC0xNmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mui2yPEcKze-C9W51wGmm0nSpQGiZOnMt_3HT8ODHFc=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81496855/462642934/1655983737?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240323_fr_aca_cand_mf_30da_xx_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U2YjkzZC0xNmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mui2yPEcKze-C9W51wGmm0nSpQGiZOnMt_3HT8ODHFc=)
---
Donald Trump has made it clear: If he becomes president, he will repeal Obamacare – undoing popular and lifesaving policies.
* Protections for the 5.4 million Pennsylvanians with preexisting conditions like diabetes, giving birth, and COVID-19? Gone.
* Young adults staying on their parents' insurance until they're 26? Gone.
* Free preventative care like cancer screenings, flu shots, and birth control? Gone.
* Access to treatment for substance abuse? Gone.

Trump got dangerously close to getting his way in 2017. It was the single vote of the late Senator John McCain that saved Obamacare. Brian Fitzpatrick? He doesn't have even 1% of McCain's courage to stand up to Trump.
I know I say it a lot, but it's the core of this campaign: You can trust me to stand up to MAGA and protect you, your family, and important things like healthcare because I had the courage to do so on the battlefield.
[I'll do the same thing in Congress. To get there, I need your support – because Fitzpatrick's got a big war chest. Pitch in $10 or more to help me defeat him.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81496856/462642935/1655983737?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240323_fr_aca_cand_mf_30da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U2YjkzZC0xNmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mui2yPEcKze-C9W51wGmm0nSpQGiZOnMt_3HT8ODHFc=)

clean_body: John McCain had the courage to stand up to Donald Trump and protect the health care of millions of Americans. Brian Fitzpatrick? Not so much. | | Donald Trump Escalates Threats to Repeal the ACA and Rip Health Care Away From Millions Protect Our Care In the 14 years since President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act (aka "Obamacare"), it's helped over 1 million Pennsylvanians get health insurance. Unfortunately, we can't count on Brian Fitzpatrick to do a damn thing to protect us. = | = Donald Trump has made it clear: If he becomes president, he will repeal Obamacare – undoing popular and lifesaving policies. Protections for the 5.4 million Pennsylvanians with preexisting conditions like diabetes, giving birth, and COVID-19? Gone. Young adults staying on their parents' insurance until they're 26? Gone. Free preventative care like cancer screenings, flu shots, and birth control? Gone. Access to treatment for substance abuse? Gone. Trump got dangerously close to getting his way in 2017. It was the single vote of the late Senator John McCain that saved Obamacare. Brian Fitzpatrick? He doesn't have even 1% of McCain's courage to stand up to Trump. I know I say it a lot, but it's the core of this campaign: You can trust me to stand up to MAGA and protect you, your family, and important things like healthcare because I had the courage to do so on the battlefield. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for being in this fight with me as my co-pilot, Ashley 🚁 | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: David Hogg
subject: This seems familiar…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquREO7mVxJXth0jtTfKQNELNSDPrph91sTg76UTbriRawwxAh2FimRtcc_WMP0sekTJsisHAJ_IY-EwdpxuizpzhkrFkwM8b2-n1jLW_T6YA6oo858jHnh_0tsPUTxkN2n13OmsQZmz7gVznY4VRnDcdIFV6c3J27_YVlVLq3Hb0iVZsV1Hlda4eX-2j_GtA2t0V-4UikfXzXRjsLDuHEQ2StjZzxi6ehtPgRcATZV-Gz2y1YiK3SSOOdiGmiev8akn1aPXXiLm7o51EPc15M_2j3uN5LU3B2iJUbUbooEEY8AgVaBkY_hIil5fcHrRIXvnOKm_Sr4JKI-CQxe7BoJH/44w/gscpPK-mQzSVtdjpI1ks-Q/h0/h001.rvrb4sY51DtJmy3IJIG8l8vF57wmHlmIfnQZf4ytNc0)
**Republicans know they have a problem with young voters.** It’s why they’ve spent so much time and effort trying to stop us from voting, whether it’s through restrictive voting laws designed to stop college students from casting ballots or their outrageous proposals to raise the voting age.

But they’re starting to wake up to the fact that whether they like it or not, young people _will_ vote if they’re motivated to turn out.

**So the GOP is changing tactics.** ALEC Action — the campaign arm of the American Legislative Exchange Council, which pushes for the passage of ultra-right-wing bills in state legislatures across the country — is teaming up with Run GenZ to boost young “conservatives” who are running for office.

Seem like a familiar strategy? _We thought so too._ _[**Will you split $10 or any amount you can between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC? Every donation helps us double down on our strategy to elect _progressive_ young leaders instead. ** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquREO7mVxJXth0jtTfKQNELNSDPrph91sTg76UTbriRawwxAh2FimRtcc_WMP0sekTJsisHAJ_IY-EwdpxuizpzhkrFkwM8b2-n1jLW_T6YA6oo858jHnh_0tsPUTxkN2n89zJFXzjjFULQdBBGV1uqZ8-thPsG52pFsug6fdktRk9Z5MGbSzF_gfYA1yYqEJvAPXng6oZKRF6q-U_EYRHDOPZ44ZpyPBW6jTTgXdV8VGLaYHqrR0xYDa0gJqUIO_1Kqi14vs_6p18M7UEbzGDmpaTsRLTnRmSi3v01WnSXcNhMCMGwTgMCzSzQUFdIIkumjQM43ZAG5jN8PVboIpqU/44w/gscpPK-mQzSVtdjpI1ks-Q/h1/h001.7D36F6398JL_oF3MVKs6lokM7DPIp7RavT1jkWzXCx0)_

But let’s be real for a second. The fact that the Republican Party is nearly entirely dominated by old, out-of-touch white dudes isn’t the real source of their problem with young voters (though it certainly doesn’t help).

**Republicans have a young voter problem because of their platform.** Young people today have grown up amidst near-constant mass shootings across the country, including in our schools. We see the evidence of a changing climate before our very eyes, and we know the impact it could have on our future.

But despite all this, Republicans have consistently fought to make it _easier_ to access **dangerous guns** and stood in the way of common-sense gun safety laws that could keep young people safe in school. And they continue to deny the reality of **climate change** in the face of overwhelming evidence.

Plus, while young people today are more pro-choice and pro-equality than ever, Republicans across the country have made it their mission to chip away at **LGBTQ rights** and pass draconian **abortion bans,** often with no exceptions whatsoever.

So MAGA is welcome to put a fresh young face on their horrible old policies — but that won’t change the fact that young voters are overwhelmingly opposed to their agenda.

**In contrast, Leaders We Deserve is working to elect young leaders who will fight for young peoples’ priorities, not against them. But we’re a grassroots organization that takes no corporate funding, so we’re counting on your support to do it.**

_[**If you want to expose the GOP's latest astroturfed effort to target young people as the sham it is, split $10 or anything you can right now to help us elect the leaders we really deserve on Election Day:** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquREO7mVxJXth0jtTfKQNELNSDPrph91sTg76UTbriRawwxAh2FimRtcc_WMP0sekTJsisHAJ_IY-EwdpxuizpzhkrFkwM8b2-n1jLW_T6YA6oo858jHnh_0tsPUTxkN2kKLIzkaAtKQQQ_HKd-1GzLlFg4-Hq5VyMuzejcIAvHT-XwxJBCKU15mQd0qEE77_sftxE8GFKA8mzw9gfP16DQCH4xT1F2Z79cFoS5wZ5s6Lr_CY-tQbmwkW3AEK2R2Jk5aKm-HNleNs8Xva9vm4z0foFfcgHqlzmfaqsKxQ-dkh8zuemW9iiqHQUk6FBrQ4W7Pyr-MiupG0qid0e3sbOF/44w/gscpPK-mQzSVtdjpI1ks-Q/h2/h001.bRtVGC5GEIjqeUossbODt8ap4yDo9H0d0a2oOE3h-lw)_

Thank you for your support,

David Hogg
President & Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

clean_body: I have a big ask, Patriot... Despite working around the clock to ensure my victory against the Left, my fundraising goals just aren’t where they need to be. I know it is difficult to make the sacrifice required to donate, but your generosity works to benefit YOUR future. I want to live in a world where our children have guaranteed rights long after my career is over. I am immensely appreciative of those who have supported me thus far, but I’m reaching out again to fix this problem as quickly as possible. A generous opportunity has arisen: A FIFTY TIMES IMPACT HAS BEEN OPENED ON ALL DONATIONS UNTIL MIDNIGHT. The time to act is now. Let’s meet our goals and get ahead of the curve to halt the liberal agenda. | I sincerely thank you for doing your part to support this campaign and the future of our nation. I am confident that we will continue to succeed with your help. God Bless, Kevin Cramer Paid for by Cramer for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Cramer for Senate, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is Cramer for Senate, PO Box 396, Bismarck, ND 58502

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Not a take-it-easy kind of person
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, it’s Mark Kelly.
I’m not a take-it-easy kind of person. I’m going to do whatever it takes to protect our razor-thin Senate majority. That’s why I visited Pennsylvania — which could determine control of the U.S. Senate — to support my friend Bob Casey who’s in his toughest re-election fight yet.
**[Before I get into it, can you chip in $5 or more to Bob’s campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-1&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr)**
While I was in Philadelphia, I joined Bob to meet with some of the great men and women who served our country.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-1&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr)
I also got to try one of Bob’s favorites – a soft pretzel. I learned that there are few things more important to Team Casey than a Philly soft pretzel, but one of them is re-electing Bob so we can defend our Democratic Senate majority.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-1&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr)
Bob is a fierce advocate for Pennsylvanians, and we can’t afford to lose his voice in the Senate. But this year, Pennsylvania is one of the battlegrounds in the fight to protect our Senate majority, and Bob is counting on us to get him over the finish line.
Grassroots support was critical for me to win my battleground races in 2020 and 2022, and it’s going to be just as important to keep PA blue in 2024. Bob is going to be up against a wall of cash from National Republicans, so he needs your help.
**[Please help Bob by chipping in a grassroots donation of $5, $10, or $20 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-1&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240323-1-el&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240323-1-el&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240323-1-el&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240323-1-el&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240323-1-el&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-1&refcode2=2396_552475_EB0ZHr&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr)
---
Thanks for having Bob’s back and doing your part to protect our Democratic Senate majority.
— Mark Kelly

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2396%2E552475%2EEB0ZHr)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

The morning of March 20, 2003 will forever be indelibly seared into my memory.
There is some poetry on Sunday's deadline falling just days after the 21st anniversary of the invasion of Iraq. Did Washington learn anything from its generations of mistakes, lies, and millions of preventable deaths?
### **Pepper spray on a Thursday morning**
I had come up the peninsula the night before, and more or less camped with a dozen Stanford students in the shell of a house under construction in the hills overlooking downtown San Francisco. At dawn, we descended in a small troop to join 20,000 other Bay Area residents who had prepared over the preceding months to mobilize [nonviolent resistance the morning following](https://substack.com/redirect/3e648d57-cf9a-4229-a399-d8669a922612?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) any public reports of an invasion.
Our affinity group had taken on the project of holding an intersection in SoMa, the South of Market district. A former industrial neighborhood southeast of downtown, it was accessible by several highway exits and on ramps--one of which we basically planned to block from vehicular traffic using nothing but our bodies and some art.
As if a pre-dawn urban hike and facing angry commuters were not enough, I got pepper sprayed by an irate driver. The sun had yet to clear the tops of the buildings. After holding our ground long enough for anyone who thought about entering the city to turn around and go home, we spent the day running between different locations across the city in response to radio requests for support.
Most of the time, I served as one among many bodies in a "soft" blockade (lacking any hardware or means of affixing ourselves to a given location) occupying one or another street. A few times, I changed hats to record the names and emergency contacts of people risking arrest, in order to ensure that our grassroots legal network could find them in jail and get them the representation they deserved.
It was a wild day.
_Help inform your friends!_
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=142881084&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQyODgxMDg0LCJpYXQiOjE3MTEyMDE2NTEsImV4cCI6MTcxMzc5MzY1MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0e5AN0FQ2i5I9sFuFFkQlSQ-MgC0krBKgI_iIj7Byhg)
### **Ditching class**
The invasion of Iraq coincided with the spring of my third year of law school at Stanford. I'd spent my first year focused on antitrust law, before the 9/11 attacks forced me in my second year to confront the reality of a constitutional crisis that would come to define my later career.
In early 2003, I was in my third and final year of school, working as a Teaching Assistance for a Constitutional Law course taught by luminary Lawrence Lessig (for whom I have a deep admiration, and to whom I owe an enormous intellectual debt) while preparing to graduate. Law school obviously required a lot of attention, but by the time of the invasion, I had already been dedicating most of my time for several months to organizing local resistance to it.
A student strike, walkout, and teach-in, followed by any number of smaller actions, gave the antiwar community at Stanford a chance to build momentum well before the call to action on March 20. Over the few weeks following it, we organized a cluster of local groups and mobilized 5,000 activists to [shut down a Lockheed Martin facility](https://substack.com/redirect/88e141b9-1ea0-4e10-93aa-11814e9b3cd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Santa Clara for a day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/05b06133-2aaf-4396-a895-586ef98dc045?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The period left such a lasting impression that I've gone on to continue organizing local resistance to militarism and human rights abuses in each of the cities in which I've lived ever since then.
We aimed in 2003 to pull the plug on what was ultimately a corporate invasion justified by lies told by officials dutifully re-printed by obedient journalists.
It is dejecting to witness that pattern recur across history.
_You 're reading a publication supported by readers, instead of advertisers. To receive new posts, sign up for a **free subscription**! To support my work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-lVCko_bfj0uKuvmrKfPNjD30yxusborPGbePxSIoeI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=142881084)
### **Groundhog day**
The very same set of factors enabled the deaths of millions across Cambodia, Laos, and Vietnam. A generation later, the very same pattern led a million--or more--Iraqis to early graves.
In the years following the occupation of Iraq, it became clear that claims about imagined weapons of mass destruction were ultimately a fabrication. Realizing they had been duped by Washington into publishing what amounted to propaganda, apologetic newspaper editors [claimed](https://substack.com/redirect/543d5815-9655-4bb1-8431-ffefbde9d654?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to have come to Jesus, and recovered the independence that they had compromised during the years when they perceived national security as a value paramount to their mission to ensure public transparency.
A generation later, they seem to have learned nothing from their previous apologies. The ongoing suppression of [Seymour Hersh's expose](https://substack.com/redirect/2752d2a6-cefd-40b1-86fb-bccc40edcc8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the Biden administration's role in the covert bombing of the Nordstream pipeline in 2022--charitably described by the New York Times as "a mystery"--offers one apt example.
### **Progress?**
One might point to recent reports about a [potential plea bargain](https://substack.com/redirect/dc30e1f7-7a16-46d5-b7e7-8455117ef5cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for Australian publisher Julian Assange as an example of editors demonstrating their formidable influence on an unfortunately rare occasion. Dozens of them recently [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/971da474-4f83-48a0-9673-5c8129a608dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in defense of Assange, recognizing how prosecuting publishers for revealing government secrets threatens press freedom.
It is gratifying to see someone in Washington pay heed to basic reason, rather than blindly pursue what has become a bipartisan assault on the public's right to know about crimes and coverups committed by our military.
Sadly, those crimes are legion. And they have spanned the world, from Chile to Japan and back again. Without independent reporting, how can we possibly hold accountable the officials--and [institutions](https://substack.com/redirect/aaa4a89f-1c6a-4316-94d7-aec9a1a5a849?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--responsible?
Another area of seeming progress emerges in a shift over the past week in Washington's diplomatic posture. After having vetoed multiple U.N. resolutions aiming to encourage a ceasefire in Gaza, Washington last week appeared to change its stance by [introducing](https://substack.com/redirect/1c60ac92-9539-4e5a-8769-e4a6130efe6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) its own resolution supporting a ceasefire.
On the one hand, the new resolution did indicate an important public shift away from Biden's previous policy of disturbing deference to Netanyahu's genocidal massacre in Gaza. But it could also be [fairly described as a ruse](https://substack.com/redirect/59b275a1-4738-4194-9106-fa9693d84b2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a way for Biden to save face by seeking plausible deniability from whatever further madness is to come from Tel Aviv, which--with every passing day--[demonstrates](https://substack.com/redirect/5b6a4786-1ff7-46ca-9b96-4f6b3c20ab46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Biden's weakness, as well as the institutionally diminishing power of the presidency, and more broadly, Pax Americana.
### **A day of reckoning**
The world has watched with continuing horror as Israel has reduced most of Gaza to rubble, as Biden bleats concerns about human rights while ironically continuing to support Netanyahu's murderous policies. But over the past few weeks, perhaps spurred by organizing in primary states [threatening](https://substack.com/redirect/0f117809-ff6a-474e-8176-cf2d39493daa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Biden's re-election, something in Washington has shifted. As [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/5528d129-a696-4690-9a33-749a5e3df10e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Haaretz:
> "Amid congressional pressure last month, President Joe Biden issued a national security memorandum requiring recipients of U.S. military assistance to commit to abide by international law while using U.S. weapons. Such beneficiaries would also have to pledge to facilitate and not obstruct the delivery of humanitarian aid."
As a result:
> "Secretary of State Antony Blinken...has until Sunday to approve Israel's stance...or the United States will immediately suspend weapons transfers to its close ally."
There is some poetry on Sunday's deadline falling just days after the 21st anniversary of the invasion of Iraq. Did Washington learn anything from its generations of mistakes, lies, and millions of preventable deaths?
We will gain one indication tomorrow, when Biden & Blinken either approve continued weapons transfers to Israel, or instead deny them.
Netanyahu has [already all but dared them](https://substack.com/redirect/adde97c4-3a99-45d3-a47a-8f3d1f6cccae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to deny further transfers, pledging to proceed with a projected ground assault on Rafah alone, if necessary. Even though [human rights have not yet compelled Biden's concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/98274804-2805-4f52-ba2b-50f6ef46cb7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), one hopes that his self-respect--or political self-preservation--might prove persuasive instead.
_Paid subscribers can gain access to a podcast interview with journalist Jeremy Scahill addressing my concerns about bipartisan militarism, as well as a preview of my next post and an ongoing series extending from it..._

subject: I first ran for Congress to protect my son’s healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
We’re lucky that he’s grown into a healthy and thriving boy, but no family should worry about losing their healthcare because of a pre-existing condition or because they cannot afford it.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81502081/462659206/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQyMzE0MC0xY2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZRNpO6CJDKrncNX2IS0gfdv6s3UDmq5Od66E7oJLQo=&emci=56b7e98b-60e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=45d23140-1ce9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I first ran for Congress to protect access to healthcare after doctors warned us that our unborn son could have serious medical complications in 2017, and my Republican member of Congress was leading the charge to take away healthcare from those with pre-existing conditions. We're lucky that he's grown into a healthy and thriving boy, but no family should worry about losing their healthcare because of a pre-existing condition or because they cannot afford it. **That's why I've fought to defend the ACA, but we must go further.** We need universal healthcare so that every American has access to the care they need at a cost they can afford. My mother is a nurse, and she taught me to be a fierce advocate for healthcare access. Nobody should die or face bankruptcy because they can't afford to visit their doctor. As the father to two young boys, there is nothing more important to me than making sure our kids grow up healthy and have a stable future. In the face of Republican threats to gut the ACA, I'm fighting tooth and nail to ensure that never happens – and I'm ready to take that same fight to the Senate. [**Will you join me in the fight to defend and expand our healthcare access by pitching in whatever is meaningful to you today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81502082/462659207/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-23-aca&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=45d23140-1ce9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQyMzE0MC0xY2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZRNpO6CJDKrncNX2IS0gfdv6s3UDmq5Od66E7oJLQo=) More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: We’re lucky that he’s grown into a healthy and thriving boy, but no family should worry about losing their healthcare because of a pre-existing condition or because they cannot afford it. | | | | I first ran for Congress to protect access to healthcare after doctors warned us that our unborn son could have serious medical complications in 2017, and my Republican member of Congress was leading the charge to take away healthcare from those with pre-existing conditions. We're lucky that he's grown into a healthy and thriving boy, but no family should worry about losing their healthcare because of a pre-existing condition or because they cannot afford it. That's why I've fought to defend the ACA, but we must go further. We need universal healthcare so that every American has access to the care they need at a cost they can afford. My mother is a nurse, and she taught me to be a fierce advocate for healthcare access. Nobody should die or face bankruptcy because they can't afford to visit their doctor. As the father to two young boys, there is nothing more important to me than making sure our kids grow up healthy and have a stable future. In the face of Republican threats to gut the ACA, I'm fighting tooth and nail to ensure that never happens – and I'm ready to take that same fight to the Senate. = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . **_BREAKING: Donald Trump sues ABC News and host George Stephanopoulos for defaming him during an interview with Rep. Nancy Mace._**

Fellow American - President Trump always fights for the truth.

After my interview with George Stephanopoulos, President Trump isn’t going to let the media get away with their lies.

In my interview, I corrected Stephanopoulos twice when he asked me an inaccurate question because President Trump has never been convicted of rape, but he doubled down – and now we’re going to fight back.

He not only shamed me continuously but also cited false facts against President Trump just because he disagreed with our politics. **Well, we’re not taking this attack from the liberal media lying down.**

[**President Trump has filed a defamation lawsuit against ABC and George Stephanopoulos for tarnishing his reputation with their FAKE NEWS.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9b789824dbc844afaa639c2044fc4c89&_e=Kpnbs41wJcdeYB-HMVEvenvIsPdrTt1j2ZZMxKvIAWXjRBKI0FD9lDN4cF-inpBR7mPuIrPXpQOJY8JiK2qNLH9JS_OuZLtnUfQd3Vpzz0T-0g585xuUp1R-XG9Ne4GuH5U395zxkc_qVxPfLUQKAYxn1gcPv76M5Q_oKDXn0py3sAZ8DRnp_5ovrNdgRi4Ib3JgheMw6QVZGST-C8tk1rL1unZw4lnFV8EDW5vGQ5-H-t0-JoU6bXBqWLj2C6kV45LcT3X908N0L3TAMTVPF8-CBnRG-gxGjkK7y6iLIdGO02VdiIF7ML9F1gHAR-TeSBsWOZkuJjyJvT7lxxVmLGofQ6P_LcvB4dnjHZkl5c4VkS8VJJkTiWTYoy_uUxfy)

I stand with President Trump in his fight to clear his name – _**do you?**_

[** ****STAND AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA » **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9b789824dbc844afaa639c2044fc4c89&_e=Kpnbs41wJcdeYB-HMVEvenvIsPdrTt1j2ZZMxKvIAWXjRBKI0FD9lDN4cF-inpBR7mPuIrPXpQOJY8JiK2qNLH9JS_OuZLtnUfQd3Vpzz0T-0g585xuUp1R-XG9Ne4GuH5U395zxkc_qVxPfLUQKAYxn1gcPv76M5Q_oKDXn0py3sAZ8DRnp_5ovrNdgRi4Ib3JgheMw6QVZGST-C8tk1rL1unZw4lnFV8EDW5vGQ5_82tbEfCG8gJTIopufpnVQRma3-Bj5IXlCOM_BHgOX2vfRO1hQsI037J9CerX6XPk3aQiKemAkyi4LzFcoIZAwpFKWMcHfx2otpITFf9EpA6KmC1KmPzgQk1yUsXVmsc9O5JZM5lQOncVBqcxY008u)

And now I’m emailing you – again. = | = = = = = I won’t mince words, Peter: — I watched Donald Trump become the official Republican nominee for President. — I watched Mitch McConnell raise = to hand Republicans a Trifecta. = = | **= = = = = =** Thank you for acting quickly, Raja | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Carville, James
subject: re: Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I’ve been pulling my hair out trying to figure out if there is ANYTHING I can say to convince you to donate $5 today to keep Nevada and the Senate blue.
* What if I told you Jacky Rosen is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate in an election year where reproductive freedom is on the line?
* What if I told you Jacky's GOP opponent was handpicked by Mitch McConnell and that he just set a new fundraising record to buy this seat?
* What if I told you that polling shows Jacky _neck and neck_ with her GOP opponent, and the only way she can pull ahead is with your immediate support?

**I truly don’t know what else I can say to get Democrats fired up about this race in what’s shaping up to be one of the most important elections of our time. So I just have to ask you again, friend:**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Do we really need a hedge fund guy in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Charles Koch’s Super PAC launched $1 million’s worth of ads supporting the most likely Republican nominee, a hedge fund millionaire.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)
---
Here are two quick updates on Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate race — which could very well decide control of the chamber, even though it’s been flying under the radar:
1. A few weeks ago, Charles Koch’s Super PAC launched $1 million’s worth of ads supporting the most likely Republican nominee, a hedge fund millionaire.
2. Then a new poll found the race tightening between that hedge fund guy and Democratic Senator Bob Casey.

Now, this hedge fund guy doesn’t live in the state he’s running to represent. He appears to actually live in Connecticut. And as a fun bonus, his wife is on the board of ExxonMobil. Democrats have got to hold onto every seat in order to protect our Senate majority — and that means we’ve got to do everything we can _now_ to help Bob Casey compete and win. [**Can you split a donation of $28 or any amount you can between Bob Casey and me? Working families deserve senators who fight for them in Congress. That’s what he and I are going to continue to do.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?amount=28&t=8&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)
---

---
I’m fired up to support Bob Casey for plenty of reasons, but here’s just one: his fight against greedflation and shrinklation. Are you noticing fewer Doritos in your chip bag, or less toilet paper on your roll recently? You aren’t imagining it — big corporations really are making you pay the same amount (sometimes more) for less. Bob and I have a bill to fight this. We just introduced a bill together, the Shrinkflation Prevention Act, that would allow the FTC and state attorneys general to crack down on corporations that try to deceive customers by reducing product size without a reduction in price. This is just one reason to send Bob Casey back to the Senate: He looks out for working people, not giant corporations or hedge fund managers. Even more so: if Republicans take back the Senate and win the White House, they’ll be in a position to ban abortion nationwide. To repeal the Affordable Care Act (yeah, that’s still on their wish list). To jam more right-wing extremists onto our federal courts. We can’t let that happen. [**So if it makes sense for your right now, please split a contribution between me and Bob Casey — so we can keep fighting side by side, and so we can hold onto our Senate majority.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?t=14&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1930?t=12&akid=1972%2E4032634%2EPIBnHr)
---

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: The long journey to America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=44dfcf9408684ae489a729e8de143848&_e=1hIejT9CZDPhxuNVaYCVsk_qLHqUMbPrvxG3gX7Xq9sM1vSFhdrEAlEU7gzJCOzvKk3NpwdeF2d56AKNMGZypflGnGAoQPo_yN-PukHPeaHTKcSYUoyYVKarAJCCqaNXYzquQJF4vN5lkG359CIMFj9itzzWxwb0lNq7ElSx87BS30UKpDdVmJJledKP71p2SyI_FIh68C7Upmhpj8peyG3H_lZkEl9VMNSC6osispMOmr63GqMyfyY0tz1ePkRiBS0na0ahzHMQx5BaC-N0HoEGxadFzF2FX3agyFCqrcA37rIzK7tFZd6ViXoQeyw7Ix4k4juHR6TcCAeW2BqlIkpm5BzOj-jTlSaeb6pckMZfwWsu7Ocgvs3xMG3l0ZnF)
---
| | Peter,
16 hours.

That’s the length of the plane ride from Vietnam to the island of Guam, a patch of American soil in the Pacific Ocean.

My family had escaped Communist Vietnam by the skin of our teeth, and we were on the way to a strange new place called America.

_But the second I stepped off that plane, I knew this country was different than the one I left._**
**
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=44dfcf9408684ae489a729e8de143848&_e=1hIejT9CZDPhxuNVaYCVsk_qLHqUMbPrvxG3gX7Xq9sM1vSFhdrEAlEU7gzJCOzvKk3NpwdeF2d56AKNMGZypflGnGAoQPo_yN-PukHPeaHTKcSYUoyYVKarAJCCqaNXYzquQJF4vN5lkG359CIMFj9itzzWxwb0lNq7ElSx87BS30UKpDdVmJJledKP71p2SyI_FIh68C7Upmhpj8peyG3H_lZkEl9VMNSC6osispNZLL5qSecfX2AxfIHc16lWRCTmqqOSs64gtdC48D12aEmQqpPSskEnPX_lBCwew66Q7KrJUXVa4Uy0jUqyDlZegjAXnyF1iTqOMqaELQarvdQP77YjX58-oo1UsttjDSbIO427dGxMLTPJHyfNKTta)
---
Here, people weren’t afraid. The streets were vibrant with laughter. In America, I knew we were truly free.

Despite coming to this country not knowing a word of English, I dedicated every second of my time learning how to become an American.

I knew I owed my life to this country, so at just 18 years old, I decided to dedicate my life to serving it. I was appointed to the U.S. Naval Academy, and after graduating, served as a Captain in the Navy for 25 years.
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=44dfcf9408684ae489a729e8de143848&_e=1hIejT9CZDPhxuNVaYCVsk_qLHqUMbPrvxG3gX7Xq9sM1vSFhdrEAlEU7gzJCOzvKk3NpwdeF2d56AKNMGZypflGnGAoQPo_yN-PukHPeaHTKcSYUoyYVKarAJCCqaNXYzquQJF4vN5lkG359CIMFj9itzzWxwb0lNq7ElSx87BS30UKpDdVmJJledKP71p2SyI_FIh68C7Upmhpj8peyG3H_lZkEl9VMNSC6osispMdO4Z3LVgQZ7xbA8ePiSQkmBMsncB7dBDjVy32wStgupd5wjRP_0t6NHOL21DognbyWZcqKRxuhJz99Y0pw2pCw8HUiYagE9SfpGw3CUXqgAQ1P3mgYEtDJT2K_RkHWz6_lzkNbuczQTsb9jiz0if4)
---
My years on the front lines of combat weren’t easy. There were many months away from my family. I pushed my body and my mind to the limit. There were times where I didn’t know if I’d get out alive.

_But it was worth it, because I was defending the country I loved and keeping the American Dream alive for my family._

Today, my service in the Navy may be over, but I’m not done fighting for our country.

**I’m running for U.S. Senate in Virginia because Joe Biden is ERADICATING the same values that my fellow soldiers and I put our lives on the line for.**

I believe our families deserve better than failing and aging career politicians. _Our country deserves better._
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=44dfcf9408684ae489a729e8de143848&_e=1hIejT9CZDPhxuNVaYCVsk_qLHqUMbPrvxG3gX7Xq9sM1vSFhdrEAlEU7gzJCOzvKk3NpwdeF2d56AKNMGZypflGnGAoQPo_yN-PukHPeaHTKcSYUoyYVKarAJCCqaNXYzquQJF4vN5lkG359CIMFj9itzzWxwb0lNq7ElSx87BS30UKpDdVmJJledKP71p2SyI_FIh68C7Upmhpj8peyG3H_lZkEl9VMNSC6osispNHEd-P_qRok-FrgdRYssUb60POY4KXzoHr5mPVdOZ_Rgvcuk9Eq_a0vUAqwplJVfrIrxQ9zlg0E0ZikcOfVXTNh8wY1g7mEq2juLYZNDPKkFijA_L5urS56ppW6Dm44Du9YlPg42x1m771wN78nYqo)
---
I’ll never give up on the country that saved my life, and I hope you’ll join me in my mission to save America.

**[**Will you join our team today to bring Virginia the REAL representation they deserve?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=44dfcf9408684ae489a729e8de143848&_e=1hIejT9CZDPhxuNVaYCVsk_qLHqUMbPrvxG3gX7Xq9sM1vSFhdrEAlEU7gzJCOzvKk3NpwdeF2d56AKNMGZypflGnGAoQPo_yN-PukHPeaHTKcSYUoyYVKarAJCCqaNXYzquQJF4vN5lkG359CIMFj9itzzWxwb0lNq7ElSx87BS30UKpDdVmJJledKP71p2SyI_FIh68C7Upmhpj8peyG3H_lZkEl9VMNSC6osispNrWi86VS7hQ4rzE8hysP-Jls9Tm09Xe__2AtGI5MpImVp5Bs7tEZVs0u_iijMeYY9Teke8H_PY4LKzLVSuxD4-M0fWd7pkwQU20eVQJadsRaq6jH2cxy5vdglFqat0LYyxvpxkq-AKu7xnswSgBD3M)**
---
[**JOIN THE TEAM**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=44dfcf9408684ae489a729e8de143848&_e=1hIejT9CZDPhxuNVaYCVsk_qLHqUMbPrvxG3gX7Xq9sM1vSFhdrEAlEU7gzJCOzvKk3NpwdeF2d56AKNMGZypflGnGAoQPo_yN-PukHPeaHTKcSYUoyYVKarAJCCqaNXYzquQJF4vN5lkG359CIMFj9itzzWxwb0lNq7ElSx87BS30UKpDdVmJJledKP71p2SyI_FIh68C7Upmhpj8peyG3H_lZkEl9VMNSC6osispMpBptH3m7PXcbVotimWgHO69SelMUlgixjyoZZm3mFY0a4QBLj9vZudQdbJEkVFm-iaSjyrLYMtcefTWvqeP0FeRWfNjhQTwWYnHRXCU0cagjJ_5SLAa_-C0r22QyvkRyc2UZGL0o8Ub8wYCT3n9pn)

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, 16 hours. That’s the length of the plane ride from Vietnam to the island of Guam, a patch of American soil in the Pacific Ocean. My family had escaped Communist Vietnam by the skin of our teeth, and we were on the way to a strange new place called America. But the second I stepped off that plane, I knew this country was different than the one I left. Here, people weren’t afraid. The streets were vibrant with laughter. In America, I knew we were truly free. Despite coming to this country not knowing a word of English, I dedicated every second of my time learning how to become an American. I knew I owed my life to this country, so at just 18 years old, I decided to dedicate my life to serving it. I was appointed to the U.S. Naval Academy, and after graduating, served as a Captain in the Navy for 25 years. My years on the front lines of combat weren’t easy. There were many months away from my family. I pushed my body and my mind to the limit. There were times where I didn’t know if I’d get out alive. But it was worth it, because I was defending the country I loved and keeping the American Dream alive for my family. Today, my service in the Navy may be over, but I’m not done fighting for our country. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Virginia because Joe Biden is ERADICATING the same values that my fellow soldiers and I put our lives on the line for. I believe our families deserve better than failing and aging career politicians. Our country deserves better. I’ll never give up on the country that saved my life, and I hope you’ll join me in my mission to save America. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Team Harper
subject: FLASH POLL: Do you support marijuana legalization, Peter? 🤔
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Submit your response ASAP >>>
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1107%2E62735%2EWN48up)
**FLASH POLL: Do you support federal legalization of marijuana, Peter?**
[YES](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324/?source=em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324&t=2&akid=1107%2E62735%2EWN48up) | [NO](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324/?source=em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324&t=3&akid=1107%2E62735%2EWN48up)
---|---
* * *
Peter,
It’s no secret that marijuana legalization is more popular than ever in the United States. Pew Research shows that nine in ten Americans support legalizing recreational or medical marijuana, while a whopping 38 states have already legalized it for recreational use, medical use, or both.
**Despite marijuana legalization’s surging popularity, Black and brown individuals are almost _four times as likely to be convicted_ for cannabis use despite equal rates of usage.**
That’s totally unacceptable.
Too many Black and brown Americans have already spent time behind bars for simple marijuana possession. And just think of what we could do with the nearly _$8.5 billion_ in annual tax revenue that experts predict federal legalization could generate.
**That’s why Hill believes _now_ is the time to federally legalize marijuana, generate much-needed tax revenue, and end this war on drugs in Black and brown communities.**
**[If you agree, let us know: Do you support federal legalization of marijuana?](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324/?source=em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324&t=4&akid=1107%2E62735%2EWN48up)**
[YES](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324/?source=em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324&t=5&akid=1107%2E62735%2EWN48up) | [NO](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324/?source=em_HHR_PET_marijuanalegalizationPET_032324&t=6&akid=1107%2E62735%2EWN48up)
---|---
Thanks for sharing your thoughts,
Team Harper
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=7&refcode2=1107_62735_WN48up&akid=1107%2E62735%2EWN48up)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

body:
Lots going on!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506921/462673420/-849459103?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=&emci=475ece7f-89e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)

Hey there! This month, our campaign _really_ _took off._ I have a few exciting updates to share with you in case you missed them over the last few weeks, but first, I want to share some reflections on Women’s History Month. ⬇️
* * *
Celebrating Women’s History Month Women’s history is OUR history, y’all, and we need to honor and recognize it every month of the year. Despite being half the population, American women have _never_ been treated as equal under the law, in our jobs, or in our communities. We have never been guaranteed a seat at the table where the decisions that most affect us are made. Now, radical right-wing extremists are targeting the rights and freedoms that have helped the playing field for women — everything from the right to choose to the right to no-fault divorce. It is more important than ever that women speak up and REFUSE to back down. And I’m ready to take a seat at the table for women everywhere. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506922/462673421/209297649?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=)
* * *
Tennessee Rise! This month, we were so excited to announce the release of “Tennessee Rise.” Singers and songwriters came together to create an anthem for change in support of our campaign. I couldn’t be more grateful to them — and I’m so glad so many of you have enjoyed listening. **_[If you haven’t heard the song yet, take a minute to watch it here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506923/462673422/645662061?noskip=true&refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=)_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506924/462673423/645662061?noskip=true&refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=)
* * *
LAST CHANCE: Join me and MARK HAMILL today! I’m so excited to share a Zoom conversation with writer, actor, and activist Mark Hamill later on today. If you’re free this afternoon, this is your last chance to sign up to join our Zoom! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506925/462673424/649937500?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=&emci=475ece7f-89e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483) **_[Details here>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506926/462673425/649937500?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=&emci=475ece7f-89e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)_**
* * *
UPCOMING: Tennessee Young Professionals Concert In support of our campaign, the Tennessee Young Professionals are hosting a **concert in Nashville on April 4th** featuring Brittany Howard, Allison Russell, Amanda Shires, Brittney Spencer, Molly Tuttle, Maggie Rose, Fancy Hagood, Devon Gilfillian, Lucie Silvas, MORGXN, Denitia, Grace Bowers, and a special performance by the Tennessee Freedom Singers. I can’t wait, and I hope to see you there! **_[General Admission tickets are $35, and you can grab yours before they’re gone here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506927/462673426/1390660653?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=)_**
* * *
Around Tennessee! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506928/462673427/209297649?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506929/462673428/209297649?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=)
_I enjoyed a wonderful, inspiring night at the annual HRC Dinner in Nashville_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506930/462673429/209297649?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=)
_I had so much fun riding in the St. Patrick’s Day Parade in Knoxville!_ We’re also still in session in the Tennessee Legislature, where I’m keeping up the fight for our people’s rights and working to deliver solutions to the issues facing our communities. This month, I introduced legislation to protect access to contraception and family planning care in our state. It’s especially important in light of the GOP’s dangerous abortion ban, which has already devastated too many Tennessee families.
* * *
That’s just a bit of what I’ve been up to in March, y’all! It’s important to me to keep you up to date on news from the campaign trail and beyond, so you’ll see more news from me in the coming months. If you want the latest news in real-time, be sure to follow me on social media: | [**FACEBOOK**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506931/462673430/37725481?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=&emci=475ece7f-89e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81506935/462673434/209297649?refcode=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.699083d2-21e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTkwODNkMi0yMWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tj-hpgIwlHjUaF5KoW2IZHxgRw4LbOnOB8vA1JZfeYo=) Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: Lots going on! | Hey there! This month, our campaign really took off. I have a few exciting updates to share with you in case you missed them over the last few weeks, but first, I want to share some reflections on Women’s History Month. ⬇️ Celebrating Women’s History Month Women’s history is OUR history, y’all, and we need to honor and recognize it every month of the year. Despite being half the population, American women have never been treated as equal under the law, in our jobs, or in our communities. We have never been guaranteed a seat at the table where the decisions that most affect us are made. Now, radical right-wing extremists are targeting the rights and freedoms that have helped the playing field for women — everything from the right to choose to the right to no-fault divorce. It is more important than ever that women speak up and REFUSE to back down. And I’m ready to take a seat at the table for women everywhere. = Tennessee Rise! This month, we were so excited to announce the release of “Tennessee Rise.” Singers and songwriters came together to create an anthem for change in support of our campaign. I couldn’t be more grateful to them — and I’m so glad so many of you have enjoyed listening. = = LAST CHANCE: Join me and MARK HAMILL today! I’m so excited to share a Zoom conversation with writer, actor, and activist Mark Hamill later on today. If you’re free this afternoon, this is your last chance to sign up to join our Zoom! UPCOMING: Tennessee Young Professionals Concert In support of our campaign, the Tennessee Young Professionals are hosting a concert in Nashville on April 4th featuring Brittany Howard, Allison Russell, Amanda Shires, Brittney Spencer, Molly Tuttle, Maggie Rose, Fancy Hagood, Devon Gilfillian, Lucie Silvas, MORGXN, Denitia, Grace Bowers, and a special performance by the Tennessee Freedom Singers. I can’t wait, and I hope to see you there! = Around Tennessee! = = I enjoyed a wonderful, inspiring night at the annual HRC Dinner in Nashville = I had so much fun riding in the St. Patrick’s Day Parade in Knoxville! We’re also still in session in the Tennessee Legislature, where I’m keeping up the fight for our people’s rights and working to deliver solutions to the issues facing our communities. This month, I introduced legislation to protect access to contraception and family planning care in our state. It’s especially important in light of the GOP’s dangerous abortion ban, which has already devastated too many Tennessee families. That’s just a bit of what I’ve been up to in March, y’all! It’s important to me to keep you up to date on news from the campaign trail and beyond, so you’ll see more news from me in the coming months. If you want the latest news in real-time, be sure to follow me on social media: | All my best, Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Joe Biden
subject: 14 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Fourteen years ago today, I watched President Obama sign the Affordable Care Act into law. I was proud to serve as his Vice President every day, but never more so than on that historic day. | | |
---
Peter -- Fourteen years ago today, I watched President Obama sign the _Affordable Care Act_ into law. I was proud to serve as his Vice President every day, but never more so than on that historic day. Today in America, the _Affordable Care Act_ is more popular than ever, and coverage is more affordable than ever. There are more than 100 million Americans -- friends, family, neighbors, people you love -- who can no longer be denied coverage because of a preexisting condition. More than 45 million Americans have health coverage thanks to the _Affordable Care Act_ and millions of seniors have lower prescription drug costs. **That is still a _very big deal._** But if Donald Trump and extreme MAGA Republicans in Congress get their way, they will gut the _Affordable Care Act_ and rip away health care from millions -- just like they tried to do in 2017. I'm not going to let that happen. We stopped them before, and in this election we will stop them once again. So today, I have a very specific ask. **If you think the _Affordable Care Act_ is worth protecting, I’m asking you to do something that will help ensure its future, while sending a powerful message of support for the bill:** [**Can I count on you to make a $25 contribution to my reelection campaign? If protecting and expanding the _Affordable Care Act_ seems worth it to you, please make that donation today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tCu5zo5UDj_0UiGoPEQMuBwIfr5CI6cvgPr7x2SujELwMOwGU0lmLMKB89EE4K5Gr5DLqF5RzAb5uox6wxmL7Vt2QqKQTGbR_d2VdkzDEbQC8xb7KZZ2Twgd3LnN2jTvhXZiGX8ljkghwpmo8Hoajux-NhuFo6PHKS3zQ-6cL4FQXqGTC-n7IudP58TIZy7hh55D5QuvG48gmee-NZRDuGPg3eUEz1Xn0HGRjizWu0kHWs8oJea8t5_PrRZuR6TxsL_zssoq6hTS83Ybbnu978pqP71D0ZMJoSmfO6P3OXxbNg-EJhHf3v2mK5i_CR-Q5GVKUKIzsBd64_-gKfxX49Q/44w/r43GSQK1ShOQlKAH6o2UoA/h0/h001.hhc5-UGnb-L2vAXKAPbCsLqDMT63aUfMax41VkDilso) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

If I am reelected, that is just what we will do.
Joe

clean_body: Fourteen years ago today, I watched President Obama sign the Affordable Care Act into law. I was proud to serve as his Vice President every day, but never more so than on that historic day. | | | Peter -- Fourteen years ago today, I watched President Obama sign the Affordable Care Act into law. I was proud to serve as his Vice President every day, but never more so than on that historic day. Today in America, the Affordable Care Act is more popular than ever, and coverage is more affordable than ever. There are more than 100 million Americans -- friends, family, neighbors, people you love -- who can no longer be denied coverage because of a preexisting condition. More than 45 million Americans have health coverage thanks to the Affordable Care Act and millions of seniors have lower prescription drug costs. That is still a very big deal. But if Donald Trump and extreme MAGA Republicans in Congress get their way, they will gut the Affordable Care Act and rip away health care from millions -- just like they tried to do in 2017. I'm not going to let that happen. We stopped them before, and in this election we will stop them once again. So today, I have a very specific ask. If you think the Affordable Care Act is worth protecting, I’m asking you to do something that will help ensure its future, while sending a powerful message of support for the bill: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The American people have made it clear: they don’t want the Affordable Care Act ripped away -- they want it strengthened and protected. If I am reelected, that is just what we will do. Joe Joe Biden

As a campaign manager, I've spent my career helping Democrats beat the odds and come out victorious in tough elections — so trust me: **If you care at all about defending our Senate majority in 2024,_[you need to invest in Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's campaign right now to help us flip Florida blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81507655/462674207/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk961-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDczZTg5ODktMjJlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3QsJwA_FwDeZWUDUG8_oigvMo5dC1UOHaaXJA4UwdQU=)_**

**Let's do the math:** Democrats have a _razor-thin_ 51-49 Senate majority. And now that Joe Manchin is retiring, we're all but guaranteed to lose our seat in West Virginia, taking that edge down to just 50.
**Even if we save every other blue seat on the line** — including the _incredibly _tough races in Montana and Ohio — **we could STILL lose the majority.**
**So our only viable path forward is to defeat a sitting Republican.**
**And out of all the Senate races this year, Florida is our best bet:** Not only is _deeply unpopular_ Rick Scott ranked as one of the most vulnerable GOP senators on the ballot ... polling shows that this race is already _statistically tied._
That's why I'm on Team DMP — **I know Debbie has what it takes to flip Florida blue. **
**So if you do too, friend, then I've got to ask:** **_[Will you please rush $5 or anything you can before 11:59 p.m. to help Debbie retire Rick Scott and save our Senate majority? Folks, some folks think that the race for Montana’s Senate seat is “personal” to national Republicans—**but it’s more personal for me.**

Most politicians know diddly squat about the challenges facing rural America. But I do, because I’ve lived them.

I’ll keep fighting for the issues Montanans care about until I drop, but this is my toughest fight yet and I can’t do it without your help.
[**I hate asking for your hard-earned money, but if you can throw a couple bucks toward my reelection campaign, I’d really appreciate it. Your donation will be split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help us win our races and keep the Senate blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81507728/462674291/1743277108?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3603-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODNlODk4OS0yMmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnEtA-NWlg7J3p9D9q8dm9m1YjRbTvq3d8fh9pBpdC8=)

clean_body: it’s clear national Republicans will throw everything but the kitchen sink at me | | | Folks, some folks think that the race for Montana’s Senate seat is “personal” to national Republicans—but it’s more personal for me. Most politicians know diddly squat about the challenges facing rural America. But I do, because I’ve lived them. I’ll keep fighting for the issues Montanans care about until I drop, but this is my toughest fight yet and I can’t do it without your help. = | | = Over $120 million has already been spent or reserved in Montana’s Senate race and it’s clear national Republicans will throw everything but the kitchen sink at me. Montana and rural America deserve better. I’ll do anything in my power to keep delivering on the issues that matter most, but without your help, Mitch McConnell will buy this seat right from under us. | | Friend, It’s official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I’m humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4BjPdSTrUylCgF4qQMCD1Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4XmIP0StaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9wYTdjMzMyMmViOGJlNzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzEzX0JER19TR0NBX1lPR0kzX1JFVl9QUi1QQS1BRlImdXRtX3RjPUFGUjItMjAyNDAzMjNXA3NwY0IKZfwN6_5lUZ2XRVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** There’s no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it’s so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4BjPdSTrUylCgF4qQMCD1Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRn4XmIP0StaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9wYTdjMzMyMmViOGJlNzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzEzX0JER19TR0NBX1lPR0kzX1JFVl9QUi1QQS1BRlImdXRtX3RjPUFGUjItMjAyNDAzMjNXA3NwY0IKZfwN6_5lUZ2XRVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**
