clean_body: Help me hit a home run | | | ~ ~ | | Friend, It’s official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his ActBlue allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. ~ There’s no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it’s so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I must win this race. ~ | | Sincerely, | | ~ Steve Garvey #6 | ~ | | ~ | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | ** American Freedom Report PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 1 month, 3 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
My friend and colleague Congresswoman Summer Lee has a massive Primary Election less than a month from today.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240323-3666-footer&t=1&akid=3666%2E420207%2EksOUfl)
Peter,
**With one month until Summer Lee’s primary, a major test for the progressive movement this year, ****we need all hands on deck to protect our collective progress from a massive attack from AIPAC’s GOP megadonors.**[**Can we count on you to split a contribution of $3 or more to protect both our campaign’s resources?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240323-sl.1MVKBZ&refcode=em20240323-3666&t=2&akid=3666%2E420207%2EksOUfl)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240323-sl.1MVKBZ&refcode=em20240323-3666&t=21&akid=3666%2E420207%2EksOUfl)**
**Here are three critical reasons why we need a push from the grassroots in these last few days before major Congressional primaries:**
1. **Republican mega-donors have pledged to spend $100 MILLION this year through AIPAC’s Super PACs against campaigns like ours.** The same Republican billionaires who bribed Supreme Court justices and propped up Donald Trump are now threatening our campaigns and the entire progressive movement.
2. **Summer and I are on AIPAC’s target list.** GOP megadonors have already spent millions to defeat our movement, and it’s not lost on us that AIPAC is exclusively targeting Black and Brown members of Congress with primary challenges.
3. **Our leadership centers the people — not corporate interests. Summer and I are unafraid to stand for justice, humanity, and peace in Washington — and our opposition is scared. And our commitment to this work has made some powerful Republicans _very_ uncomfortable.**

We need to seize every moment between now and when the polls open to ensure that progressives like Summer and I have the resources to hold strong against our opposition. **Republican megadonors won’t hold back so we need to be prepared for anything they throw our way.**
**[Will you split a $3 donation between our campaigns and strengthen our resources to fight back against AIPAC’s GOP megadonors in the final month ahead of her election?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240323-sl.1MVKBZ&refcode=em20240323-3666&t=22&akid=3666%2E420207%2EksOUfl)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240323-3666-footer&t=23&refcode2=3666_420207_ksOUfl&akid=3666%2E420207%2EksOUfl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Happy Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Wanted to reach out this morning and catch you up on the month so far. Been a wild one.
#

Hey there, Peter. It’s Ruben.
Wanted to reach out this morning and catch you up on the month so far. Been a wild one.
We weren’t totally sure when Kyrsten Sinema would decide if she was running for re-election or not. When she announced earlier this month, the entire race changed.
Feels like we’ve been moving a mile a minute since then.
We went up on television with our first ad of the cycle, committing millions of dollars with the hope that we’ll be able to raise what we need to keep these ads up.
Kari Lake’s been campaigning for MAGA candidates in Ohio and raising major campaign cash in DC. $330,000 in one night, which is big, and we know how she’s going to spend it: Relentless attacks.
And next up is our first official FEC deadline of the election year, which hits next Sunday. It’s absolutely critical that we put up a strong report, because everyone’s going to be watching to see what we’ve raised.
It’s a make or break deadline.
I never thought I’d need to ask folks like you, folks who have done so much already, to do more.
But to win this November, that’s what I have to do.
[**So please, if you could dig deep and make that first contribution, I’d be really grateful. I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240323-1-160&t=1&akid=2108%2E734936%2Eq8TNu3)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

## **Exciting News: IV3 Site Relaunch!**
---
|
---
We're thrilled to announce the relaunch of the IV3 website! The app that empowers voters with an automated way of confirming accuracy, identifying ineligible records, reporting findings to local authorities, and helping you stay up-to-date on changes to the voter rolls, is here for the 2024 election cycle!
If you've been with us before, we want to extend a warm welcome back! The IV3 team has been hard at work ensuring a seamless transition, and we've already updated your registration for the new site. So, no need to worry about re-signing up. This weekend, you’ll receive an email to reset your password. With that, you're all set to dive into the latest updates, insights, and discussions.
For those who are new to IV3, welcome aboard! Now is the perfect time to join our vibrant community as we gear up for the 2024 election. Whether you're passionate about politics, eager to stay informed, or simply want to engage with like-minded individuals, IV3 is the place to be.
So, what are you waiting for? Head over to [https://www.iv3.us](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4oOUn6_439lxELdfD0ytIWiqdE9nKnHCRoLeAkYtf6Bjni2ANNFRIpiNG9OT54e2w00uUk_0IchBGWW6rpvEnjd2hjKwnoSrtNjpY6Rg8tBzQi_tnm8fXkLc4Vi6oR4SNQh7aYnKtcW0I9IcE3oTIMw/44w/U-lUE6lfSsOgoQRHqtZlTQ/h2/h001.EHqijoANucuFYCrk75Mv-m-1wXKQsIzLKo-JOhG2-kA) today to sign up to help safeguard our electoral process!
|
---
## DMV’s Were Down NATIONWIDE This Week
Secretaries of State were reporting nationwide network outages at DMV facilities this week. This is worrisome, as DMV agencies are the primary - often the only - way a state checks citizenship status for voter registration. The outage has since been corrected. What lasting damage was done, if any, we do not yet know. We will continue to monitor this situation with interest.
|
---
|
---
## **ICYMI: True the Vote in the News**
|
---
### **True the Vote’s ‘Scan Check Protect’ arrives just in time for November**
By Mark Anthony
_... In a republic such as the United States, voting rights are precious and the integrity of our elections is fundamental to the nation’s health and future._
_In a sane world, Catherine Engelbrecht would be a national hero. The feisty Texas businesswoman founded_ _[True the Vote](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6Uo4m9MyBR88oiyEqUx7_2CbbLWLBBqFChNcOjhEyQPJIVIf4eDalxOjIBOc3UrXi6VxlHprEh2C8uVlljwEgoEiRWsPpDzIX_kgBwwZ2ZoMLUFDmNFclwSKEmWEme8-eXjahC4QAtnA7ICfPRQRKspkv9n0gnw7twYmfZFpu1HI/44w/U-lUE6lfSsOgoQRHqtZlTQ/h3/h001.sxf7FfJyJhLeiHrscSkRqkI0UYXtpTYJUJmVXVFjtDM)_ _with one simple purpose in mind: to ensure that every legal vote counts — and that only legal votes count._
_Every American citizen has the right, even the duty, to vote. The government at every level has the duty to ensure that citizens’ votes count and that no fraud of any kind is allowed anywhere. For her patriotic efforts, Engelbrecht was investigated and harassed by the Obama-Biden administration and their IRS jackboots for years._
_Many Americans have been alarmed to find out that they’re still registered to vote in states they no longer live in — and in some cases never lived in. One man recently told True the Vote that he discovered a voter registration in his name in California, a state he left years ago. One woman, Diana, left Washington state in 2022 but discovered through Scan Check Protect that she was still on the voter rolls there. Another man found out that he was still registered to vote in Georgia, despite leaving three years ago. Until now there has never been a way to check for old registrations easily and quickly. True the Vote has the answer: the “_ _[Scan Check Protect](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6VDKmqL7dnq-Z_xN8QkhdZKgsxsq4umEAocVLBID6l-zNtT8Cdg3GPakOs5Hew5FuYwKbxgNdhoBvt_chMlwvSKCxEaOX0ckgpTb-r1rCfsZ5eOTo2j02Qxe371bqhzfqJZqtNxHouDId3LAawZMQ4TqQ_i3EoM0v3eKyRNHfHQe/44w/U-lUE6lfSsOgoQRHqtZlTQ/h4/h001.Xr2-w85A4lHKkGFUCvf22QBEYuueEcoTjeTPi6Zg3g8)_ _” website allows voters to check and find out if there are any fraudulent voter registrations in their names anywhere in the United States._
_While one political party talks endlessly about “protecting democracy” by taking its opposing presidential candidate to court and attempting to kick him off ballots, True the Vote is actually protecting our republic at its foundation: the vote._
_Without voter integrity, Americans have no way of knowing if their old voter registrations are being used to support candidates and policies they reject. Americans have no way of knowing if the government is even legitimate if the integrity of the vote isn’t protected. “Love your country – protect your vote” is True the Vote’s motto. It’s also just a simple truth. In a time of lawlessness encouraged from the top of our government down, True the Vote’s mission has never been more important._
[**Read the full article here.**](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4lfz8jxspQixmtEC91TDE6GHnkqaGSOe8P_7OsbpoS438zSydistrx3WGebn7uyXS4RodmuqdFYygcg23XUmx77dWcIO_BzuV7Ye-IkrCbk4_ScPredq_3lMbdOAR300dhgoZImyirA0s2hVFNH5J9rFftSYbCtfg-eZ3qAn3E9rRrnjvmKB4rnJRYZIFH6rSBEFY6yms8WQsErpSaJxAXNIxzA07QYPPoE1D-h_5TKup_2p7YjMQ9fLJuMzoXczwI5I4HcoAByWKKYAh7MuFmo/44w/U-lUE6lfSsOgoQRHqtZlTQ/h5/h001.9jceCJ9ax4Bv8myLt7V2zZnJtYlSCgxk9_9M6M03riA)

clean_body: Commit today to work in your local elections in 2024. | | | March 23, 2024 | | | Exciting News: IV3 Site Relaunch! | We're thrilled to announce the relaunch of the IV3 website! The app that empowers voters with an automated way of confirming accuracy, identifying ineligible records, reporting findings to local authorities, and helping you stay up-to-date on changes to the voter rolls, is here for the 2024 election cycle! If you've been with us before, we want to extend a warm welcome back! The IV3 team has been hard at work ensuring a seamless transition, and we've already updated your registration for the new site. So, no need to worry about re-signing up. This weekend, you’ll receive an email to reset your password. With that, you're all set to dive into the latest updates, insights, and discussions. For those who are new to IV3, welcome aboard! Now is the perfect time to join our vibrant community as we gear up for the 2024 election. Whether you're passionate about politics, eager to stay informed, or simply want to engage with like-minded individuals, IV3 is the place to be. So, what are you waiting for? Head over to today to sign up to help safeguard our electoral process! | DMV’s Were Down NATIONWIDE This Week Secretaries of State were reporting nationwide network outages at DMV facilities this week. name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Legal Action Alert
body:
( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3351490.1452.1.6b9c739232126909e279dd36909cc909 )

Fellow Patriot,

We filed a major amicus brief to support former President Trump’s motion to dismiss the indictment in the case brought by Special Counsel Jack Smith related to the FBI’s raid of President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home.

_Our novel legal brief demonstrates how the National Archives & Records Administration (NARA) decisions were not in accordance with the law and in excess of its statutory authority. The court recognized the importance of our argument and will now consider it in President Trump's case._

\*\*Here is why the case against Donald Trump should be dismissed:\*\*

_ \*\*First\*\* , The National Archives lacked the legal authority to make a criminal referral to the Department of Justice..._

_ \*\*Second\*\* , NARA is bound to defer to the former President’s rights and privileges yet they ignored them..._

_ \*\*Third\*\* , NARA must be insulated from White House influence, yet the Biden White House directly shaped how the Archivist acted in response to former President Trump..._

\*\*HELP US KEEP FIGHTING THE DEEP STATE >> \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3351490.1453.1.984db3a9a92a8c55102910e390c09e99 )

\*\*Bottom Line:\*\* Biden’s DOJ betrayed its duty, the law, and the American people’s trust when it indicted President Trump based on an unlawful criminal referral from the National Archives. The prosecution against him in the Southern District of Florida has no basis in law and must end.

\*\*SUPPORT AMERICA FIRST LEGAL >>\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3351490.1454.1.53be75173e2255f207f9e56cf7315d71 )

Stephen Miller

_President, America First Legal_

\*\*DONATE >>\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3351490.1455.1.c2e8a572afe2efcb970508a888750929 )

Fellow American,

November is coming, and I’m putting **EVERYTHING** I’ve got at stake to fight the Radical Left. One thing’s for sure: I need the assistance of true patriot warriors.

**If conservative fighters don’t act now and join Team Abe, there are a couple of things that could happen:**

**\- The Left will OVERTAKE the House in 2024, and we’ll be left in a worse place than where we are today.

\- Joe Biden will be RE-ELECTED to the White House, and our hope of turning this country around will be lost.

\- Our border will REMAIN wide open– drugs and violent crime will continue to pour into our country and put your neighborhood at risk.**

**_These are just a few -_YES, ONLY A FEW_ \- things that could happen if conservatives don’t start taking these problems seriously._ **

**[The question stands: Can Team Abe count on your support?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7ac96e43d2bf43bebc9983433ebc6c60&_e=iOM36asgJpgHOcakj857oI8PFhF4-vySXh1fEaPJxKWDVQXWJ8iXh1lyGlO1dDslBBjuF3hfFiquSRZMlXkeux73pfJgJGEJR7f3aLUCVoM0keHBAJyfGz-tjn0MVQah6QGihiY88V8x_sYBIT0Oqixem-38YIN-urg_3reao7RBT58EAJkOxkZvwHS20iaYPBWhTcgBPPUOuwGMRhg484izyWiWou6xNFT1Qr8QPgHdufa14DAX6qoXoa6KihJEyhmhos7E2-2_-7rP4hOcPj9AyAQhlE1233lK9YAiEOhgmNUrhItZM0IjOf5vN6oQmdYhxM4pPFqBAOY4FVU7V_3t4eu3wGoULctC0aXr9xWS6GFw8zH4Z7_kAf7NdSHZ0p8Het4hyQM9EArayMMvkg%3D%3D)**

subject: 14 years ago.

body:
It’s been 14 years since President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act (ACA) into law. This landmark legislation has had a profound impact on the lives of millions of Americans, providing access to quality, affordable care for those who previously went without it, including working families, seniors, and people with pre-existing conditions.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81512467/462688361/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2MxZjA5MC0yN2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8-kXrryKSGZXrIJyYK9gmIGUOIOEol8RGJiuqPGz7w=&emci=0051f761-b0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=bcc1f090-27e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

It’s been **14 years** since President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act (ACA) into law. This landmark legislation has had a profound impact on the lives of millions of Americans, providing access to quality, affordable care for those who previously went without it, including working families, seniors, and people with pre-existing conditions.

Here in PA-08, the ACA also played a crucial role in ensuring financial stability for our rural hospitals. Now, more than **40 million** Americans rely on the Affordable Care Act for their healthcare coverage.

**But our work is far from over.** Matt is fighting tirelessly in Congress to lower prescription drug costs, protect individuals with pre-existing conditions, and cap out-of-pocket medical expenses.

Despite its undeniable success, GOP leaders continue their relentless attempts to rip away the Affordable Care Act without offering ANY viable alternatives. **This puts the health care of millions at risk and threatens to undo the progress we’ve made.**

Now, more than ever, we need to stand up and defend the Affordable Care Act. [**Will you join us by adding your name to our petition today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81512468/462688362/654172670?ms=em24_240323_acaann_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em24_240323_acaann_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em24_240323_acaann_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240323_acaann_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=EDNIZSOPtmG/5uqZ9FFtlQXerVOmHH3wmi+H+7xTseGVsFgbUm/sYJpcAzvJPWqD67Dy9BfI/SsRghV3a21IvnZAtVZM9uftabyQ5a9DOJ8T/xhjO9W28K6Xwksnae1/KAdtkBR3kvkR63rVo92DzYZvFKWgy6Ye7a6op6Bd2hI=&refcode2=bcc1f090-27e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2MxZjA5MC0yN2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8-kXrryKSGZXrIJyYK9gmIGUOIOEol8RGJiuqPGz7w=&emci=0051f761-b0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=bcc1f090-27e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=23311593) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81512469/462688363/654172670?ms=em24_240323_acaann_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em24_240323_acaann_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em24_240323_acaann_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240323_acaann_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=EDNIZSOPtmG/5uqZ9FFtlQXerVOmHH3wmi+H+7xTseGVsFgbUm/sYJpcAzvJPWqD67Dy9BfI/SsRghV3a21IvnZAtVZM9uftabyQ5a9DOJ8T/xhjO9W28K6Xwksnae1/KAdtkBR3kvkR63rVo92DzYZvFKWgy6Ye7a6op6Bd2hI=&refcode2=bcc1f090-27e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2MxZjA5MC0yN2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8-kXrryKSGZXrIJyYK9gmIGUOIOEol8RGJiuqPGz7w=&emci=0051f761-b0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=bcc1f090-27e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=23311593)

name: Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
subject: Empathy, decency, freedom, and democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
We have a clear path to victory and a winning message.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc14dfb5-53d0-4e81-96f8-42dc68441211/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | | | | Peter In an election year like this, it’s easy to get caught up in the horse race, in the polls, in the news cycles. But today (before I ask you to [**chip in a $20 split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T516414b6-4ec5-477c-a430-6f6ab446ff50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)), I want to take a step back and look at the big picture. Here at WisDems HQ, we’re in the thick of the 2024 election. But for the people who will ultimately decide this election, it’s still incredibly early. In all likelihood, swing voters haven’t tuned in yet. They’ve probably forgotten what life was like under Donald Trump, and haven’t heard much about President Biden’s accomplishments and his plan to build a brighter future for our communities. And I don’t see that as a problem, Peter; I see it as an opportunity. Most people don’t know yet that Donald Trump has promised to be a dictator on “day one,” that he’s proposed an extreme agenda to gut Social Security and Medicare, attack rights for LGBTQ+ Americans, and impose a new national ban on abortion. They also don’t know that President Biden has achieved historic success in his first term – lowering costs for working families, rebuilding the middle class, and fighting to restore freedom and democracy after the disastrous Trump years. Don’t get me wrong – this is going to be a close race, and Wisconsin will probably come down to a handful of votes per precinct. But whatever the results are, they’ll fall within the margin of effort. **We have a clear path to victory. We have a winning message of empathy, decency, freedom, and democracy. But it’s up to this team, Peter, to step up and put in the work we’ll need to win historic victories up and down the ballot this November.** [**So today, I’m asking you to invest in our vision not just for Wisconsin, but for our country, and chip in a split $20 donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action to support our work reaching undecided voters, fighting for decency and democracy, and winning critical races in 2024. Can you help us make it happen, Peter?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b87ab95-d9d8-460b-9557-c5c4b932adea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26c7c600-73eb-4b95-8447-b428d30d63f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | What we do here matters, Peter. And I’m positive that if this team stands together like we did in 2020, 2022, and 2023, we can secure a brighter future for our communities, our state, and our country. Thank you for being a part of this team. Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: We have a clear path to victory and a winning message. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | Peter In an election year like this, it’s easy to get caught up in the horse race, in the polls, in the news cycles. But today (before I ask you to ), I want to take a step back and look at the big picture. Here at WisDems HQ, we’re in the thick of the 2024 election. But for the people who will ultimately decide this election, it’s still incredibly early. In all likelihood, swing voters haven’t tuned in yet. They’ve probably forgotten what life was like under Donald Trump, and haven’t heard much about President Biden’s accomplishments and his plan to build a brighter future for our communities. And I don’t see that as a problem, Peter; I see it as an opportunity. Most people don’t know yet that Donald Trump has promised to be a dictator on “day one,” that he’s proposed an extreme agenda to gut Social Security and Medicare, attack rights for LGBTQ+ Americans, and impose a new national ban on abortion. They also don’t know that President Biden has achieved historic success in his first term – lowering costs for working families, rebuilding the middle class, and fighting to restore freedom and democracy after the disastrous Trump years. Don’t get me wrong – this is going to be a close race, and Wisconsin will probably come down to a handful of votes per precinct. But whatever the results are, they’ll fall within the margin of effort. We have a clear path to victory. We have a winning message of empathy, decency, freedom, and democracy. But it’s up to this team, Peter, to step up and put in the work we’ll need to win historic victories up and down the ballot this November. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | What we do here matters, Peter. And I’m positive that if this team stands together like we did in 2020, 2022, and 2023, we can secure a brighter future for our communities, our state, and our country. Thank you for being a part of this team. Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Extremism Watch via TonyEvers.com
subject: We need to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

The people of Wisconsin want results – not
petty partisan games.

Republican leadership in the State Senate clearly aren’t listening. Just
recently they fired eight hard working public servants appointed by Tony,
purely to push their extreme agenda.

These attacks cannot go unaddressed, Derek,
which is why we need your help to fight

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I don't have anywhere else to turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue
| | |
---
Friend, I'm sorry to start this email with bad news, but I don't have anywhere else to turn.
**New polling shows this Ohio race is still tight, which is not where we want to be in a race that could decide Senate control..**
The good news is there's still time to right the ship – but we must act NOW. I set a personal goal to raise $100,000, and I'm counting on you to help us get there by midnight: [**Please, friend, will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81513986/462692755/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4916-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2RkOTg4NS0yOWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTkH6VrGb7yfQX4l3lJxoeKq0bP379d3cemiSNUgrPY=)
The stakes couldn't be higher. Reproductive freedom, affordable health care, our fight for the Dignity of Work, and more are on the line.
We have so much to fight for but it's going to be a tough one. Right now, my wealthy opponents are pouring millions of dollars of their own money into this race.
**But with your grassroots support at this critical moment, I know we can turn this around and win. Your support is how I've won every tough race before, and I'm counting on you to come through now.**
[**Please, will you split $5, $25, or any amount at all between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand to help us reach this goal before midnight? Every dollar helps in our fight to protect Ohio's battleground seat and defend the Senate for Democrats.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81513987/462692756/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4916-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2RkOTg4NS0yOWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTkH6VrGb7yfQX4l3lJxoeKq0bP379d3cemiSNUgrPY=)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Let me tell you about Andy Kim, Democrat in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38795%2E3422442%2EOxatto)
Hey Derek, Katie Porter here. In 2020 I started Truth to Power, an organization dedicated to electing leaders who reject corporate PAC money and fight to lower costs, protect the environment, and restore the nationwide right to an abortion.
**[Today, I’m asking you to split a donation between my organization, Truth to Power, and Andy Kim, Democrat running for U.S. Senate in New Jersey.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240323-kim?refcode=em20240323-38795&refcode2=38795_3422442_Oxatto&akid=38795%2E3422442%2EOxatto)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240323-kim?refcode=em20240323-38795&refcode2=38795_3422442_Oxatto&akid=38795%2E3422442%2EOxatto)
Andy Kim and I both were elected in 2018, as part of a big class of Democrats who flipped the House blue and were committed to doing things differently. We have both rejected corporate PAC money from the get-go, and Andy has been a champion for cleaning up corruption in Washington ever since.
After holding his competitive seat in Congress, Andy is now running for the Senate. **After reports broke that current New Jersey Senator Bob Menendez took bribes from foreign officials, Andy stepped up to run.** Now, Menendez has been indicted on 18 federal counts, but is _still_ considering running for the seat as an independent.
On top of that, **Andy is facing a competitive primary against an establishment opponent who has the support of big money.** But Andy has grassroots supporters like us, and with your help we can send a real champion for working people to the Senate. Is there anything you can give today?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240323-kim?refcode=em20240323-38795&refcode2=38795_3422442_Oxatto&akid=38795%2E3422442%2EOxatto)
Many thanks!
Katie Porter

**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em&t=2&refcode2=38795_3422442_Oxatto&akid=38795%2E3422442%2EOxatto)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=38795%2E3422442%2EOxatto).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21051%2E4449941%2EMhwRwb)
---
**We told you that Adam Schiff called for major overhaul of American institutions, including getting rid of the Electoral College...**

But hardly anyone donated and we’re still $10,931 short of our payment for our ads to abolish the Electoral College with 1 day left... **_NO!!!_**

So today, we’re passing along a VITAL warning from Elizabeth Warren AND _activating our emergency 2X-MATCH:_ []() | [_2X-MATCH ACTIVE_ : CHIP IN $7 (_2X-MATCHED_) TO FUND OUR ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE ADS AND SUPPORT OUR WORK »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/40110?t=7&akid=21051%2E4449941%2EMhwRwb)
---
**We need you to be as** _MAD_** as we are:**
**_IN 2016:_** Donald Trump won the Presidency despite losing the popular vote – this flies in the face of basic rules of Democracy!

**_IN 2020:_** Donald Trump LOST – the popular vote AND the Electoral College – and set his sights on overturning the election results.

**_NOW, IN 2024:_** Donald Trump is trying to coast into the presidency AGAIN using the Electoral College – **_he could become president AGAIN without ever winning the popular vote!_**
---
[**But we’ve only raised $4,069 of the $15,000 goal to fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College – so we’re activating our 2X-MATCH. Double your impact and donate now to fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work before midnight tomorrow »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/40110?t=8&akid=21051%2E4449941%2EMhwRwb)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Have you heard about this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
This is huge news but the media is barely talking about it. We're going to change that.
|
---
Friend,

Former Vice President Pence has done something **unprecedented** : He’s explicitly refused to endorse Trump for president in 2024. He saw Trump up close and knows it’s a risk America can’t afford to take again. **Mike Pence is a Republican Voter Against Trump.**
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWJMvQ95bNdzW5t0bmX7S0qjRW178YCN5c0TSzMkNlmd3m2ndW95jsWP6lZ3nCVy2h0k8vgXnhW37PYyc1w_W1hW7bX_Zz4jPB0QN6c6SLrBXNMpW3yT7y12nwY4GW4QNw-X20Qd4BN3cZVwDmrS32W6Dx3Mk3GvNk_W7YHr2J36mFckW1bFqTN3d-xJNW59wtfy4hRz4rW5dwmyW147cx7W1S3Zcd57YgywN28sp8XnLRmPW3vbLFZ6gJ8xvW6GNwlj8rghFRW55j-Md4HXkPWW4JWJHk3lx6YmW5gNV7q7S8m9kW54VN_61_j86FW6d_Jhk7Nj2vyW2R61k87YpjPcW4MJ4Lg5dc4gLW6F83RP83BzHSW3RZgf05Rq8JVW7qVhZ62XKFJ9W5rG6F748BZq7W6S9CQT4Np4nDW1JB4Mn5B4CbjVw2y8l8fM-MVf7krGXK04)
---
Unfortunately, Pence’s anti-endorsement of Trump isn’t getting the attention it deserves. The media—Fox News especially—isn’t even covering it. That’s why we are running these billboards (and digital ads) in Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin, to amplify this message.
##
These are **the** key swing states that will determine the outcome of the election, and we’re filling the information gap for voters.
##
Undecided voters need to hear this warning from his former running mate: **Donald Trump is unfit for office.**
##
Sarah Longwell

clean_body: This is huge news but the media is barely talking about it. We're going to change that. | Friend, Former Vice President Pence has done something unprecedented : He’s explicitly refused to endorse Trump for president in 2024. He saw Trump up close and knows it’s a risk America can’t afford to take again. Mike Pence is a Republican Voter Against Trump. Unfortunately, Pence’s anti-endorsement of Trump isn’t getting the attention it deserves. The media—Fox News especially—isn’t even covering it. That’s why we are running these billboards (and digital ads) in Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin, to amplify this message. These are the key swing states that will determine the outcome of the election, and we’re filling the information gap for voters. Undecided voters need to hear this warning from his former running mate: Donald Trump is unfit for office. Sarah Longwell | | Republican Accountability, 1100 Vermont Ave. NW, Tenth Floor, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: We're still fighting for affordable healthcare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law fourteen years ago today. Here's what we've accomplished, and the work we still have to do:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81514922/462695832/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240323_mk_ACA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU4NGM3YS0yYmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HPcsHLcutmmZrVsqHuc8SBwu03V-1B5f0QFFHyuYXA=)
---
Friend, fourteen years ago today, President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law. This legislation, which I fought for alongside my Democratic colleagues, has been transformative for millions of families. This law made it **illegal for insurance companies to deny care based on pre-existing conditions,** it's expanded coverage to **nearly 40 million Americans** , and it's **improved the quality of healthcare coverage for everyone.** And despite more than a decade of Republican attacks on the ACA, we've continued to defend and build on the law. We **capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month** for seniors and allowed Medicare to negotiate **lower prices for lifesaving prescription drugs**. I've led the charge in Congress to fight the opioid epidemic and deliver more funds and treatment programs to our communities that need them most. There's still more work to be done, friend. Protecting and expanding affordable healthcare is one of my top priorities in Congress, and I won't stop until every person in this country can get the world-class care they deserve. I'm grateful to have you with me in that fight, friend. **[Chip In](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81514923/462695833/1037629634?refcode=240323_mk_ACA&ms=240323_mk_ACA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU4NGM3YS0yYmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HPcsHLcutmmZrVsqHuc8SBwu03V-1B5f0QFFHyuYXA=)** Onward, — Marcy

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: Thank you

body:
Because of YOU, we are one step closer to winning Ohio's Senate and restoring the Senate Republican Majority.

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=a5b9e1b542124b948eb629d01cfadb8a&_e=Y5xv3Ca_2BxXbJcrht0TZB_hQtmTJAVjlqKze3umeYFwXyld3vN5nz3_lwPx_AxItyql7cZh95tGBt3gEVEh3rWKk9a6u2FH4D3We-9buQLCqVVxrscFO_RDRNAQ4iPC54cetKppF_Zh5VC2v1OpOiFdOtA3djWQy5IB4vsP5yuob6KOb6FB-3rxH932DZxoi6t57HJzMNI1iBam5w8mIbZ_2vy1Zx7W5mTEHB_rb1Bu_yATsmxMWKdw--02JzQJFAoDXGFSNBKgPqAYz6hW7dsByLkhKJdEGPzNw7qRQvnHxHkvU2Hod-IAffCJPnxM)
---
**I just secured the official GOP nomination for the U.S. Senate in Ohio!**

Without your support, we wouldn't have been able to pull off this victory - but our work isn't done yet. Now, we must focus on November and defeating Sherrod Brown. Now is the time for Republicans to become united,_**and together, we will do precisely that.**_

A vote for Sherrod Brown is a vote for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda that has wrecked our country.

Do you support the Democrat agenda:

Open borders = illegal immigration.
Soft on crime = protecting criminals rather than protecting victims.
Runaway spending + higher taxes + more debt = less for your family.

****Sherrod Brown votes with Joe Biden nearly 100% of the time.**** He's wrong for Ohio, and his voting record with Joe Biden put America on the wrong track.

But it's not just me that Democrats and Washington insiders are coming after. They are also coming after President Trump. Chuck Schumer and the Democrat war chest have spent millions tying me to President Trump.

I've got a message for them...****I wear my support for President Trump like a badge of honor and am proud to have his support because we were safe, prosperous, and at peace under his leadership.** **

I wonder if Sherrod Brown would wear his blind support of Joe Biden and his policies like a badge of honor?

We know that D.C. Democrats will stop at nothing and spend whatever it takes to keep the chief enabler of their disastrous agenda in the Senate.

I had a target on my back before this victory, and now that I am officially the Republican nominee to take on D.C. insider Sherrod Brown, they are ready to spend over $100 million to defeat me.

We don't need $100 million, but we do need you to put some skin in the game (and chip in again, too).

[**So, I am personally asking for your support. Even $5 will go a long way to flip this seat, help Republicans win back the Senate Majority, and put an America First agenda in the driver 's seat!** ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=a5b9e1b542124b948eb629d01cfadb8a&_e=Y5xv3Ca_2BxXbJcrht0TZB_hQtmTJAVjlqKze3umeYFwXyld3vN5nz3_lwPx_AxItyql7cZh95tGBt3gEVEh3rWKk9a6u2FH4D3We-9buQLCqVVxrscFO_RDRNAQ4iPC54cetKppF_Zh5VC2v1OpOlL-P0jE__UQhI1jYq90aQiQ5i9R9BpzH4oCmmG21T-uwTtUypq5yC63BlzuDn5T_PXpE3Crxo4PDCd8yUwdHUfj6j2cGFgLmnTmQZZrZhNAcZgcXTYQYh_iRSW1etynr1xPi4o6d0jJ_g6Nk2euCGf6akwKntktvhNtjpeP5z2u)

I hope I can count on you,

Bernie Moreno

clean_body: Because of YOU, we are one step closer to winning Ohio's Senate and restoring the Senate Republican Majority. | I just secured the official GOP nomination for the U.S. Senate in Ohio! Without your support, we wouldn't have been able to pull off this victory - but our work isn't done yet. Now, we must focus on November and defeating Sherrod Brown. Now is the time for Republicans to become united,and together, we will do precisely that. A vote for Sherrod Brown is a vote for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda that has wrecked our country. Do you support the Democrat agenda: Open borders = illegal immigration. Soft on crime = protecting criminals rather than protecting victims. Runaway spending + higher taxes + more debt = less for your family. **Sherrod Brown votes with Joe Biden nearly 100% of the time. He's wrong for Ohio, and his voting record with Joe Biden put America on the wrong track. But it's not just me that Democrats and Washington insiders are coming after. They are also coming after President Trump. Chuck Schumer and the Democrat war chest have spent millions tying me to President Trump. I've got a message for them...I wear my support for President Trump like a badge of honor and am proud to have his support because we were safe, prosperous, and at peace under his leadership. I wonder if Sherrod Brown would wear his blind support of Joe Biden and his policies like a badge of honor? We know that D.C. Democrats will stop at nothing and spend whatever it takes to keep the chief enabler of their disastrous agenda in the Senate. I had a target on my back before this victory, and now that I am officially the Republican nominee to take on D.C. insider Sherrod Brown, they are ready to spend over $100 million to defeat me. We don't need $100 million, but we do need you to put some skin in the game (and chip in again, too). I hope I can count on you, Bernie Moreno Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Peter:

14 years ago, the Affordable Care Act (ACA) was signed into law by President Barack Obama.

**Thanks to the ACA, millions of Americans gained access to essential healthcare services, including mental healthcare and preventive care.** This monumental legislation has improved health outcomes for women, the elderly, LGBTQ+ communities, and marginalized populations across the country.

However, our progress is under threat. Donald Trump has once again threatened to repeal the ACA, putting the healthcare of millions at risk. **We cannot let that happen.**

That's why we need to take back the House. We must ensure that we have representatives who will protect the ACA and the well-being of every American. **And it starts right here in IA-01.**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: I remember it like it was yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We’re going to organize with everything we’ve got and make sure we hang on to our Democratic Senate Majority this fall.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81515938/462697917/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQwZmU1MS0yY2U5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcARdqQ-iIwnFIHJQGtXcBtk7wHHq-K82DF2Rttub5s=&emci=fe97b216-60e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=6940fe51-2ce9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=7731215)
---

| | I remember it like it was yesterday, and you probably do, too. It was July 2017. Donald Trump and the Republicans were certain they had the votes to once and for all get rid of the Affordable Care Act. After dozens of failed attempts, at last, it was the day most Republicans believed they would finally crush Barack Obama's signature achievement, and much worse, tear affordable health care coverage away from millions of Americans. And then, Arizona Senator John McCain walked to the well of the Senate, gave an emphatic thumbs down, and joined Republican Senators Lisa Murkowski and Susan Collins in voting No. On a 51-49 vote, the Affordable Care Act survived. **It's been almost seven years since that moment, but the GOP still hasn't given up on their goal of overturning the Affordable Care Act. Even after a global pandemic showed how access to health care could mean the difference between life and death, Republicans would rather push a harmful agenda than help Americans get the care they need.** They're still trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Well, we're not going to let them. We're going to organize with everything we've got and make sure we hang on to our Democratic Senate Majority this fall. clean_body: We’re going to organize with everything we’ve got and make sure we hang on to our Democratic Senate Majority this fall. | | | | I remember it like it was yesterday, and you probably do, too. It was July 2017. Donald Trump and the Republicans were certain they had the votes to once and for all get rid of the Affordable Care Act. After dozens of failed attempts, at last, it was the day most Republicans believed they would finally crush Barack Obama's signature achievement, and much worse, tear affordable health care coverage away from millions of Americans. And then, Arizona Senator John McCain walked to the well of the Senate, gave an emphatic thumbs down, and joined Republican Senators Lisa Murkowski and Susan Collins in voting No. On a 51-49 vote, the Affordable Care Act survived. It's been almost seven years since that moment, but the GOP still hasn't given up on their goal of overturning the Affordable Care Act. Even after a global pandemic showed how access to health care could mean the difference between life and death, Republicans would rather push a harmful agenda than help Americans get the care they need. They're still trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Well, we're not going to let them. We're going to organize with everything we've got and make sure we hang on to our Democratic Senate Majority this fall. = = Onward! body:
#

Hey there, we know we’ve been reaching out a lot, but we wouldn’t send you these messages if they weren’t so important. With next week’s March FEC fundraising deadline approaching, we can’t afford to slow down on our fundraising efforts.
We’re hoping we can ask you to step up and join the tens of thousands of others who have contributed to GIFFORDS PAC online since our founding in 2013.
Whether you can contribute $5, $25, or $100 or any amount in between, every single dollar goes directly towards fueling our work to keep our communities safe from gun violence.

body:
Joe Biden spits in the face of our laws, our border, and our country| | |
---
Friend, I'm disgusted. The other day, a Sheriff told me about an illegal immigrant here in Michigan who sexually assaulted a 14 year old girl and it boiled my blood.

It seems like every day, I read another story about a heinous crime committed by someone who is illegally in this country.

Yet Joe Biden and his Democrat enablers continue to roll out the red carpet for millions of illegals to flood every square mile of this country.

**[Every single day, Joe Biden makes it clear that he has no sense of respect.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=559d435fbaa74a9baee8bb6aa78261f3&_e=35AS0epuXeIx64LVjj3dabNTszeAiaeXYOG6XAlpm_Wj7wWyrII_K0NdofwLUw22pwhvsAZhALiUmDg_ok6QEeq13gP3ePuaLvgL8YR1FRSammZcNZaRMwnVB_TE4grJG-TfvcTasGcWs1LaR_J_c33PHT67p0I2RU2flh-uf1GQ6BU8FhykETvCOMd0VAZ7T-UN0yitOAaZwL4v3_xdnTDv-UXZsoURH-tyPSiMt43hrY5Fob86LWFm7laMGqrdHS8HHiTIG4xjBgNX3u65QHo6iwoJlX9aMxadCDVnrhhzlIbo_ywNwSvgCMZ7ZD5F9hbKAi3tRfJCXDzQDFb_FgDBHezDo4dE99W1-lEknv1suig9UbzZ6Tebs6Rzi-Qi-iDiZBy5o52FJJ33pnvxm3jluxNXWoj1Ej_RjFWPYTKjCwpnKKUD8GAhEZwl_5dz)**

-He has no respect for the victims of violent crime or their families.

-He has no respect for our laws and borders.

-He has no respect for our country or the American people. Period.
---
[**STOP Joe Biden**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=559d435fbaa74a9baee8bb6aa78261f3&_e=35AS0epuXeIx64LVjj3dabNTszeAiaeXYOG6XAlpm_Wj7wWyrII_K0NdofwLUw22pwhvsAZhALiUmDg_ok6QEeq13gP3ePuaLvgL8YR1FRSammZcNZaRMwnVB_TE4grJG-TfvcTasGcWs1LaR_J_c33PHT67p0I2RU2flh-uf1GQ6BU8FhykETvCOMd0VAZ7T-UN0yitOAaZwL4v3_xdnTDv-UXZsoURH-tyPSiMt43hrY5Fob86LWFm7laMGqrdHS8HHiTIG4xjBgNX3u65QHo6iwoJlX9aMxadCDVnrhiXcKwlsl5oUvOET4m263w2x7eVu6_-hvugSbMlczNLPPVA50ozz-rVLICsFIhUNkXa0ckZ_YW5kjghhYzdSIqSUOVPi4Jgd6tixRZfTJsE1V4yUQ-2MdOf7rk1-DvCrP0-Cf76IU1MAEdZPSK8q6TK)

Every single day, the President continues to stoop to new lows, and he’s creating quite a mess to clean up. **[That’s why it’s more important than ever that we elect the right leaders to tackle these issues.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=559d435fbaa74a9baee8bb6aa78261f3&_e=35AS0epuXeIx64LVjj3dabNTszeAiaeXYOG6XAlpm_Wj7wWyrII_K0NdofwLUw22pwhvsAZhALiUmDg_ok6QEeq13gP3ePuaLvgL8YR1FRSammZcNZaRMwnVB_TE4grJG-TfvcTasGcWs1LaR_J_c33PHT67p0I2RU2flh-uf1GQ6BU8FhykETvCOMd0VAZ7T-UN0yitOAaZwL4v3_xdnTDv-UXZsoURH-tyPSiMt43hrY5Fob86LWFm7laMGqrdHS8HHiTIG4xjBgNX3u65QHo6iwoJlX9aMxadCDVnrhhC3KeH1KehqFgM682rGZMZnMPlPf52oiEjuVVrM5OjNlrMfo-HGLo6EtJXwqFZEr2esCd-tmi1s8TqchO6EDBmQD4jE2s1s_-qQyXXjgGj5XhpGPjLumFEftwoAN0pMH4lj2W1_YPxoGdYQDxZo7uT)** Friend, when I become your Senator, you have my solemn oath that I’ll secure the border and protect the American people from crime and foreign threats. How do you know you can trust me? Because **[I’m the only candidate in this race that’s done it before.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=559d435fbaa74a9baee8bb6aa78261f3&_e=35AS0epuXeIx64LVjj3dabNTszeAiaeXYOG6XAlpm_Wj7wWyrII_K0NdofwLUw22pwhvsAZhALiUmDg_ok6QEeq13gP3ePuaLvgL8YR1FRSammZcNZaRMwnVB_TE4grJG-TfvcTasGcWs1LaR_J_c33PHT67p0I2RU2flh-uf1GQ6BU8FhykETvCOMd0VAZ7T-UN0yitOAaZwL4v3_xdnTDv-UXZsoURH-tyPSiMt43hrY5Fob86LWFm7laMGqrdHS8HHiTIG4xjBgNX3u65QHo6iwoJlX9aMxadCDVnrhgfQJhRS6DDlaIR7cFqrliytkX7PPaoAuFQnFmQM-DkPto9Fnn2_YjjBRvdc5ZxRQxcqxicB8VlKWgkibimOCuleNvKPxAicjsSchK14ODCm-8RwQdilR3Ock5MH0ma-e5Va-fy8T4x5_W3o2C9uByX)** That’s why Michigan’s top law enforcement officials, including former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, trust me to get the job done.
So, Friend, if you’re sick and tired of far-left Democrats disrespecting our laws, our country, and our borders, **[**join my crime fighting team today!**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=559d435fbaa74a9baee8bb6aa78261f3&_e=35AS0epuXeIx64LVjj3dabNTszeAiaeXYOG6XAlpm_Wj7wWyrII_K0NdofwLUw22pwhvsAZhALiUmDg_ok6QEeq13gP3ePuaLvgL8YR1FRSammZcNZaRMwnVB_TE4grJG-TfvcTasGcWs1LaR_J_c33PHT67p0I2RU2flh-uf1GQ6BU8FhykETvCOMd0VAZ7T-UN0yitOAaZwL4v3_xdnTDv-UXZsoURH-tyPSiMt43hrY5Fob86LWFm7laMGqrdHS8HHiTIG4xjBgNX3u65QHo6iwoJlX9aMxadCDVnrhja_dwmGGaMCPqe-nD7OuAPpZcmDHnaGlpsv-GotAaIp4glKkMubgSBV16ck1Fb67IX3qhHTIqGKlKTY0rnOQ0k4mf4sUn9yAjAm-ECLnFvdYIlbeadUyON7NImRsCLf4Ttg7GR8GejJiN5plw6CK2S)**

subject: Are you seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life?
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ba2e6f2e01d142baa700fad3a0f8948b&_t=nCnQYORElCQnuNDiBZIY2tQB0e6ymbKobjbhF05Xzx-5SjJDt0901Q3P_zfKGTXPCOdXeMA24L4FgxNmABYkeCALq3Y-BPOl0_kzMxZKxpk%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba2e6f2e01d142baa700fad3a0f8948b&_e=hMFvT5qI6K23KvRMvYRAfa1Ka4MUHfCWKmFrJzL6pq2bXP62YMKnk2GZTEW62PCUmEQI5vKFqCDNlWk0_Yy3w3Az1gZgDcXDzuQdosylTcL4vn_86A1Shbl-sfDB2-X-NlEL4u-PFIq2vY1HfTwxoG-PyN04YoDojyeS2ZfLs-JJ2N3ybLsFx7_6HOB0fWTKNIwDVwCJRRKa5mjamc6nXff1AxSOihtnqAMYS-oyoEygNcNqWszYGIFQQYN-82caRCncT5XULkI4hXVCT92-PUIf92tu0vMtgJIDZXp5pMtZMZ3xgQWbWAAPC_GfrmPKJZd2hH3MbgiUFev7yfQ-sYoSM83z_Uaq0xz_9y-S9kus4vDVLMKxdTvZXBhwGcHL)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **[National Survey on the Department of Justice](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba2e6f2e01d142baa700fad3a0f8948b&_e=hMFvT5qI6K23KvRMvYRAfa1Ka4MUHfCWKmFrJzL6pq2bXP62YMKnk2GZTEW62PCUmEQI5vKFqCDNlWk0_Yy3w3Az1gZgDcXDzuQdosylTcL4vn_86A1Shbl-sfDB2-X-NlEL4u-PFIq2vY1HfTwxoG-PyN04YoDojyeS2ZfLs-JJ2N3ybLsFx7_6HOB0fWTKNIwDVwCJRRKa5mjamc6nXff1AxSOihtnqAMYS-oyoEyKLaXZ3VAsYlGIwWgRLak7sgGvEjirnTaZJlbNv1Z-DfJCfjO5SPtLJprM8rZnUKZGx9VeUblOIMCyRvOewrKph5eUFWiha_ABt1F2m7A4zMMFIWGuo-vHbhOfiRwYz00fdRSAu2JOGqrgxhbtV9aG).**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the [Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba2e6f2e01d142baa700fad3a0f8948b&_e=hMFvT5qI6K23KvRMvYRAfa1Ka4MUHfCWKmFrJzL6pq2bXP62YMKnk2GZTEW62PCUmEQI5vKFqCDNlWk0_Yy3w3Az1gZgDcXDzuQdosylTcL4vn_86A1Shbl-sfDB2-X-NlEL4u-PFIq2vY1HfTwxoG-PyN04YoDojyeS2ZfLs-JJ2N3ybLsFx7_6HOB0fWTKNIwDVwCJRRKa5mjamc6nXff1AxSOihtnqAMYS-oyoExQUbdBX9FylBw0YLHLBP-lpNOG58q_k-fBTf4bFCGzyRXAohqrzG_rUGR5wxiCl-QC3oAlrdZufqlBHjF72Jc_Qjq88heOv3t6wwf0JfdJe3apXtyt7GWri-tN_k7BF9FLDglUMMxnqq4qCBH_jS5-).**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba2e6f2e01d142baa700fad3a0f8948b&_e=hMFvT5qI6K23KvRMvYRAfa1Ka4MUHfCWKmFrJzL6pq2bXP62YMKnk2GZTEW62PCUmEQI5vKFqCDNlWk0_Yy3w3Az1gZgDcXDzuQdosylTcL4vn_86A1Shbl-sfDB2-X-NlEL4u-PFIq2vY1HfTwxoG-PyN04YoDojyeS2ZfLs-JJ2N3ybLsFx7_6HOB0fWTKNIwDVwCJRRKa5mjamc6nXff1AxSOihtnqAMYS-oyoEwOByQkyN15ihb3nvCBjys_2EzLrIk_uYX3ziGSbl6vx93H_mDQB6teHy31yTaD8TjgjbXc0oOun8sWA1HGWn16khYBIyO8JhyGHQLQfSBXJYI7AjxoDI3dNXbeyxdLzdx3k1NRZRSz1N-GcTQKx5Oj)**

The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.**

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack.

**You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.**

A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

These efforts include:

**Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing our [**National Survey on the Department of Justice**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba2e6f2e01d142baa700fad3a0f8948b&_e=hMFvT5qI6K23KvRMvYRAfa1Ka4MUHfCWKmFrJzL6pq2bXP62YMKnk2GZTEW62PCUmEQI5vKFqCDNlWk0_Yy3w3Az1gZgDcXDzuQdosylTcL4vn_86A1Shbl-sfDB2-X-NlEL4u-PFIq2vY1HfTwxoG-PyN04YoDojyeS2ZfLs-JJ2N3ybLsFx7_6HOB0fWTKNIwDVwCJRRKa5mjamc6nXff1AxSOihtnqAMYS-oyoEzVYkY_7SvgRMmKb1a11kGHu5CEFqJL6p0SvEReFjFzNGZERTRsgad6fqyM4qZmSwge-WIEECnM_uRFvcLhee31RYr5WtfiWouLGEH0oRIPnCq62s6V7HYW-5PnGyJ4hUWXaxiUtvLNGm5_1ibGxY5G) and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba2e6f2e01d142baa700fad3a0f8948b&_e=hMFvT5qI6K23KvRMvYRAfa1Ka4MUHfCWKmFrJzL6pq2bXP62YMKnk2GZTEW62PCUmEQI5vKFqCDNlWk0_Yy3w3Az1gZgDcXDzuQdosylTcL4vn_86A1Shbl-sfDB2-X-NlEL4u-PFIq2vY1HfTwxoG-PyN04YoDojyeS2ZfLs-JJ2N3ybLsFx7_6HOB0fWTKNIwDVwCJRRKa5mjamc6nXff1AxSOihtnqAMYS-oyoEyQKkTVTx4a86DVe2vpPtIHZAn2JWp-UhebDrZnEjeEmaYT_GrJ1TS3hBIJ7FPog7ksVGQN7SybNs5uI1Jpbo1hVDE3-6gErpEOxCZLr7iTjV_0mXz-eAzbPr0K7T1O6i1OHLTvBgXlZF7hkPiytNCH)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's . The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the -. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

Today, I come to you with a heart filled with gratitude and a spirit emboldened by the power of our shared convictions.

| | | Friend,
I hope this message finds you thriving and inspired by the limitless potential of truth and freedom. Today, I come to you with a heart filled with gratitude and a spirit emboldened by the power of our shared convictions.
Today, I've taken a significant step forward in my journey for truth and freedom. I am independent and ready to take my fight for Truth directly to the American people. This is a pivotal moment, one filled with immense opportunity and boundless potential. | | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jz1vgzAQhn-N2YLsszHNwNAWpVNVdUjUDRn7HKz6AxmTiH9fEUUd77mP9x4VZu_s1pH2jQBMziwEgPBXArAWflHn82feDj_fX4eP5gLXvQnvBKBsM_5PPo_UGJTzO237ynQCFLO6wo61jAGjtJXV1AnBDEWKfNRi5OJFSDhKi1ZpxeQ4ssp1QEFQDpxJ2oqm1o05IoyUm5Zbhi0R9BFU24xYJhd_MRvl_FbrFCrfTaXMy-OxE4GTVtEojemOcakz3m61TjtOg0lxSGGwxQw6HXxkw5iHZzbsy_y0ljAsac0aCe-j9gTkjgIatwbC-zE_ScG817YYRkCqkNZYCO8bSkBm1GvOLl4J70tescqdme_Oe7fIXeb6kNEp_AUAAP__H4t7Dw)

| As a woman of Christian faith and a staunch advocate for free speech, I have encountered obstacles and faced relentless unfair attacks from anti-American groups like the Anti-Defamation League (ADL). But let me assure you, these challenges only fuel my determination to stand firm in my beliefs and to speak truth to power.
Now, more than ever, **[it is crucial that we unite in solidarity to defend the sacred principles of free speech and truth](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jz1vgzAQhn-N2YLsszHNwNAWpVNVdUjUDRn7HKz6AxmTiH9fEUUd77mP9x4VZu_s1pH2jQBMziwEgPBXArAWflHn82feDj_fX4eP5gLXvQnvBKBsM_5PPo_UGJTzO237ynQCFLO6wo61jAGjtJXV1AnBDEWKfNRi5OJFSDhKi1ZpxeQ4ssp1QEFQDpxJ2oqm1o05IoyUm5Zbhi0R9BFU24xYJhd_MRvl_FbrFCrfTaXMy-OxE4GTVtEojemOcakz3m61TjtOg0lxSGGwxQw6HXxkw5iHZzbsy_y0ljAsac0aCe-j9gTkjgIatwbC-zE_ScG817YYRkCqkNZYCO8bSkBm1GvOLl4J70tescqdme_Oe7fIXeb6kNEp_AUAAP__H4t7Dw)**. Together, we possess the strength and resilience to overcome any obstacle that stands in our way.
**[I invite you to join me on this journey, as we pave the way for a brighter, more truthful future.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jz1vgzAQhn-N2YLsszHNwNAWpVNVdUjUDRn7HKz6AxmTiH9fEUUd77mP9x4VZu_s1pH2jQBMziwEgPBXArAWflHn82feDj_fX4eP5gLXvQnvBKBsM_5PPo_UGJTzO237ynQCFLO6wo61jAGjtJXV1AnBDEWKfNRi5OJFSDhKi1ZpxeQ4ssp1QEFQDpxJ2oqm1o05IoyUm5Zbhi0R9BFU24xYJhd_MRvl_FbrFCrfTaXMy-OxE4GTVtEojemOcakz3m61TjtOg0lxSGGwxQw6HXxkw5iHZzbsy_y0ljAsac0aCe-j9gTkjgIatwbC-zE_ScG817YYRkCqkNZYCO8bSkBm1GvOLl4J70tescqdme_Oe7fIXeb6kNEp_AUAAP__H4t7Dw)** Your support, no matter the size, will play an instrumental role in our collective mission to champion the values that define us as a nation.
Together, let us rise above adversity and forge a path towards a future where honesty, integrity, and freedom reign supreme.
Thank you for your unwavering support and belief in the power of truth.
With gratitude,

Candace Owens

#
Peter, can I share something personal with you?

Today marks the 14th anniversary since the Affordable Care Act was signed into law, and I'm reflecting on how this legislation has positively impacted millions of families.

When my wife and I decided to start our family, we had no health insurance. I was a law student at the time and our daughter was born with a serious health problem.

After countless hospital stays and overdue medical bills, we were left with the choice of enrolling in Medicaid or declaring bankruptcy because we couldn’t afford to pay the $10,000 we owed. For the better part of two years, my wife and I visited the hospital’s welfare clinic alongside other uninsured families.

**I'll never forget this experience and I didn't want to go through that again or have anybody else go through it. That’s why the _Affordable Care Act_ was so personal to me.**

But right now, Republicans are attacking our health care, suggesting cuts to Medicare, and threatening the protections for people with pre-existing conditions. If Mitch McConnell and Republicans flip the Senate, they could roll back our progress and take our country back to a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.

I fought against Republican efforts to repeal the _Affordable Care Act_ before, and I will continue to defend it. But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep up this fight in the Senate.

**[Will you make a donation so I can keep up this critical work? I need your help to defend our Senate majority and prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we've made expanding access to affordable health care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81518898/462705052/1907121275?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.23_B1_ACA_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmE0NDQ1ZS0yZmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJ3vI-wr8ptG5ZCJTC0QFmA6xIhoPTK-XXEeavN5ikw=)**

clean_body: Today marks the 14th anniversary since the Affordable Care Act was signed into law, and I'm reflecting on how this legislation has positively impacted millions of families. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click Peter, can I share something personal with you? Today marks the 14th anniversary since the Affordable Care Act was signed into law, and I'm reflecting on how this legislation has positively impacted millions of families. When my wife and I decided to start our family, we had no health insurance. I was a law student at the time and our daughter was born with a serious health problem. After countless hospital stays and overdue medical bills, we were left with the choice of enrolling in Medicaid or declaring bankruptcy because we couldn’t afford to pay the $10,000 we owed. For the better part of two years, my wife and I visited the hospital’s welfare clinic alongside other uninsured families. I'll never forget this experience and I didn't want to go through that again or have anybody else go through it. That’s why the Affordable Care Act was so personal to me. But right now, Republicans are attacking our health care, suggesting cuts to Medicare, and threatening the protections for people with pre-existing conditions. If Mitch McConnell and Republicans flip the Senate, they could roll back our progress and take our country back to a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. I fought against Republican efforts to repeal the Affordable Care Act before, and I will continue to defend it. But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep up this fight in the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = \- Dick Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click ** Friends of Dick Durbin Attn: Online Department 101 W. Grand, Suite 200 Chicago, IL 60654

# [Sign: Tell NBC NOT to hire election denier Ronna (Romney) McDaniel](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c734bed-61e9-45f7-8ba9-54d67187dd53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | NBC has [hired](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27fd1918-f9c2-4059-a975-90590088a2d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) former RNC Chair and repeated election denier Ronna (Romney) McDaniel as an on-air contributor. While it's understandable why NBC would want to have conservative voices, it's wildly inappropriate for a NEWS organization to feature someone who has been spouting dangerous fiction for years. **NBC should not have hired her -- and it needs to fire her immediately.** [**Tell NBC to get rid of election denier Ronna McDaniel NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb619fb08-5137-40ee-915d-380956227cbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend, Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed legislation to stop funding UNRWA, the agency providing urgently needed food and humanitarian assistance to starving Palestinians. The bill also includes $3.8 billion American taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military, which gets sent each year. **This isn’t what the American people want.** A vast majority of voters across demographic backgrounds support an immediate and permanent ceasefire. Despite this widespread support, too many members of Congress are silent in the face of the Israeli government’s atrocities. Why? As Jewish Voice for Peace Action wrote:_“For too long, AIPAC and its Republican megadonors have demanded our elected leaders unconditionally support the Israeli military and government.”_ Leaders of AIPAC’s Super PAC bragged that it was “dollar for dollar, the largest contributor to candidates in the 2022 midterm elections.” That year, AIPAC’s network spent more than $5 million trying to defeat me and pro-peace champion Summer Lee. They’re planning to spend a lot more in this critical election year, but Summer Lee and I won’t be intimidated or silenced. **Now we have just one month left until Summer Lee’s first re-election to Congress. In Summer’s congressional district, an AIPAC-backed group (which is bankrolled by one of the country’s top Republican donors) is running ads attacking Summer and supporting her AIPAC-recruited opponent.** [**Please split a donation today between my and Summer Lee’s re-election campaigns so we can withstand AIPAC’s attacks >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJA3BHgOo_X6hGJL4izAkUbRBtsqbY0Cfs_hl0MclUqHF2bTohS-3H2Lr6c01qJXlkeeginfx9OBPTRJ6Q_fha4x-WEma5ZduRluNJxQbzXBI9b-ivSUxNsraSHPsIl0tYK-Wz6ZfggNGvPpJGE_hFiqGd1zdGyBaLgZafa_Q-3bsNvNSCr1cC3HyLPHI6bKdVnHv1611nwjpo-Itxu1yGkopahh6ax_YPZiC2h9Sf2T2vMi8X15LaCP30QTtwdHqJGyFyuOcAuiX5L2ALDhSi9eeiuzkamvzSbdCadTad3ElFFDzfUjCemqd9ifkaWAIk5G3hNIxjRIODiOSFm1H76nYLhjALzVq6jArMSeKFaUg/44w/gv0s4eYTQEuR2yaJlFx4FA/h1/h001.TqJafxzK2hmOuxMAITQKX4bIWi40IKbotY96P0ytg5k) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJA3BHgOo_X6hGJL4izAkUbY2R7gI7KTNDJUzid-A8b6GSfHbeSOcpfTLnuCegNqb1h7pgd3RHVghnx5xO41xO7EYEbrWYhIxbZo7ZrDCVB9OpraBSJKbSniigk9xHMPkuCH6cF4_swZuOlaXhcG5M4bdixdkESrBkoRfDFCVcu5Jeq8A41TL94zxYOZLryMB5JJoJh0LvwbXZ5O8zaMp9ahuGSRxmabDrat7rjYqwg4agUyLMJqx2XgC2WwYKzDl7nZC1YZ_8n7QDdPq2UwBaVeX8W3_WnYcWhFBd-Wy4tSZwiinRT5ygWplPq03e4kvByXKhk9cRx9GViSAdHEusa71FDMPPCUOdiw6F_75YEBByRzZjh_Gw3wbGcuMZ3tnlkc9Jizhc6KqXwpu3oGRlWTEjT-2uc7xhiHKmFhu1lyk/44w/gv0s4eYTQEuR2yaJlFx4FA/h2/h001._m5SJd2hm8s_9udUQ5HCyuHqwfEMrrf0Xi_p_GslTOU)

Jewish Voice for Peace Action, IfNotNow, Justice Democrats, and other groups just launched a campaign calling on the Democratic Party to reject AIPAC.
AIPAC has endorsed far-right insurrectionists who tried to overthrow our government, and the group is also undermining our democracy by spending millions from Republican megadonors to interfere in Democratic primary elections.
**Because our Squad dares to vote and speak for human rights for everyone, AIPAC is recruiting and funding right-wing challengers to try to defeat us. Summer Lee’s opponent has even encouraged Republicans to register as Democrats in order to vote against Summer next month.**
Summer Lee’s re-election is coming up the soonest among our Squad: Her state of Pennsylvania will vote on**** April 23. This is her first re-election to Congress, and we need to keep her here holding our government accountable and demanding the transformative changes our communities need.
