A vast majority of voters across demographic backgrounds support an immediate and permanent ceasefire. Despite this widespread support, too many members of Congress are silent in the face of the Israeli government’s atrocities. Why? As Jewish Voice for Peace Action wrote:“For too long, AIPAC and its Republican megadonors have demanded our elected leaders unconditionally support the Israeli military and government.” Leaders of AIPAC’s Super PAC bragged that it was “dollar for dollar, the largest contributor to candidates in the 2022 midterm elections.” That year, AIPAC’s network spent more than $5 million trying to defeat me and pro-peace champion Summer Lee. They’re planning to spend a lot more in this critical election year, but Summer Lee and I won’t be intimidated or silenced. Now we have just one month left until Summer Lee’s first re-election to Congress. In Summer’s congressional district, an AIPAC-backed group (which is bankrolled by one of the country’s top Republican donors) is running ads attacking Summer and supporting her AIPAC-recruited opponent. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | | Jewish Voice for Peace Action, IfNotNow, Justice Democrats, and other groups just launched a campaign calling on the Democratic Party to reject AIPAC. AIPAC has endorsed far-right insurrectionists who tried to overthrow our government, and the group is also undermining our democracy by spending millions from Republican megadonors to interfere in Democratic primary elections. Because our Squad dares to vote and speak for human rights for everyone, AIPAC is recruiting and funding right-wing challengers to try to defeat us. Summer Lee’s opponent has even encouraged Republicans to register as Democrats in order to vote against Summer next month. Summer Lee’s re-election is coming up the soonest among our Squad: Her state of Pennsylvania will vote on** April 23. This is her first re-election to Congress, and we need to keep her here holding our government accountable and demanding the transformative changes our communities need. Thank you for your ongoing solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

body:
| | | Friend, it's official: the general election is here! **I couldn't be more honored to represent the people of Ohio and have the opportunity to keep fighting for the Dignity of Work in the Senate. I want to personally thank every member of this team – including you, friend – for powering our grassroots movement this far. ** All we have accomplished together so far makes it clearer than ever, Ohio voters want someone who will fight for them in the Senate. Better wages and working conditions, reproductive freedom, affordable housing and health care – I promise to keep up these critical fights for all of us. But our real fight starts now, friend. We now have an official opponent, Bernie Moreno, and he's a deep-pocketed Donald Trump ally that's ready to spend millions of dollars to try to buy this seat. Polls show this race is neck and neck, Republicans are already spending record-breaking sums to defeat me and flip the Senate red, and it's only going to get worse. **So I'm personally asking:[ Will you split $15 or more right now between my campaign and Serve America to make sure we have the resources to fight back against GOP attacks, protect this seat, and keep the Senate blue? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81519450/462706153/-2003341165?refcode=240323_SAP_Sherrod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODVhMzNjYy0yZmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9DWOeAGwtueSSaC_4e6B8s0ATtKFb9ajBl8AEw8YJPU=)** You're the reason we have made it this far – and you're the reason why we'll do it again in November. Peter, we’re on a mission to ensure that racist extremists like Trump and his MAGA allies do not gain complete control of the White House and Congress.

That’s why we’re launching our groundbreaking 11 for the Win campaign focusing on eleven exceptional Black candidates across the country who are committed to fighting for our rights and our future.

Our incredible slate of candidates includes trailblazers such as:

• **Hakeem Jeffries,** the first Black party leader in Congress;
• **Angela Alsobrooks** and **Lisa Blunt Rochester,** both vying to become the first Black female senators in their states;
• and **Mondaire Jones** and **Janelle Bynum,** both poised to FLIP their districts from Red to Blue.

We’re also backing critical House seats that are in danger of flipping blue to red to ensure that our voices continue to have a say — _but we cannot achieve these historic victories alone._

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Peter, we’re on a mission to ensure that racist extremists like Trump and his MAGA allies do not gain complete control of the White House and Congress. That’s why we’re launching our groundbreaking 11 for the Win campaign focusing on eleven exceptional Black candidates across the country who are committed to fighting for our rights and our future. Our incredible slate of candidates includes trailblazers such as: • Hakeem Jeffries, the first Black party leader in Congress; • Angela Alsobrooks and Lisa Blunt Rochester, both vying to become the first Black female senators in their states; • and Mondaire Jones and Janelle Bynum, both poised to FLIP their districts from Red to Blue. We’re also backing critical House seats that are in danger of flipping blue to red to ensure that our voices continue to have a say — but we cannot achieve these historic victories alone. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Here’s a full list of our 11 for the Win candidates your donation will be split between with The Collective PAC: Red to Blue Mondaire Jones (NY-17) Janelle Bynum (OR-5) Frontline Steven Horsford (NV-04) Jahana Hayes (CT-05) Don Davis (NC-01) Emilia Sykes (OH-13) Senate Angela Alsobrooks (US SEN - MD) Lisa Blunt Rochester (US SEN - DE) Colin Allred (US SEN - TX) Hill Harper (US SEN - MI) Speaker Hakeem Jeffries (NY-08) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. clean_body: | | | “The DCCC is prepared to recruit exciting and battle-ready candidates in these key districts” \- DCCC Chair Rep. Suzan DelBene | | Fellow conservative, I can’t believe it. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) just put my district on their official “in-play” target list. Here’s what it means: The Democrats are cherry-picking far Left candidates who will do their bidding at ANY COST to try and defeat me. We’re going to see MILLIONS of** dark money dollars pouring in from people like George Soros and other liberal Hollywood elites. They’re already planning VICIOUS attack ads against me to further their socialist agenda. So I’ll be honest with you -- I need your help. Fellow conservative, our House majority is extremely slim. That means we can’t afford to lose a single seat - especially in the Republican stronghold of Florida. I’m holding down the fort to keep our nation free from the liberal socialist regime, but I’m going to need reinforcements. Thank you, | | | | Rep. Maria Elvira Salazar | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I'm proud to be on Team Terán.

Hey Peter,
Senator Mark Kelly here. I wanted to tell you a little bit about my friend Raquel Terán and why I’ve endorsed her campaign for Congress in Arizona’s 3rd District. I’ve watched Raquel time and again build broad coalitions of voters in our community to do things we’ve heard couldn’t be done. It’s that can-do attitude we need more of in Washington, and that’s why I’m on Team Terán.
If you’re ready to join me on Team Terán, can you chip in $25 or whatever you can afford to give Raquel the resources we need to send Raquel to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_032324_marcheoqkelly_1&amount=25]
One of the most important lessons I’ve learned in my life is the value of teamwork. And I know Arizonans need Raquel on our team in Washington. Her tireless advocacy for working families has been a driving force behind her accomplishments. And together, we can fight for policies that uplift our communities, create opportunities, and protect the most vulnerable among us.

Raquel knows how to win – she was an integral part of our winning campaign in 2022! And the secret to winning campaigns is you. Without your support, your encouragement, and, yes, your contributions, none of this would be possible.
So Peter, will you join me on Team Terán and make a $25 contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_032324_marcheoqkelly_1&amount=25]

name: Conservative Intel
subject: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vswq_H9iN7

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oswq_H9iN7

Hi
Friend,
One of
the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of
socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want
life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness,
happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of
socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is
equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other
or are they in conflict?

In this
25-page commentary, "Created Equal", legendary economist and
Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions
in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he
wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of
Independence and how the meaning has changed through American
history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates
differences between equality of opportunity and equality of
outcome.
With many
today striving to increase government power in the name of a
concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those
who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up
with both greater freedom and greater equality.

Please
follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.

Thanks,

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Can we be real for a second, team?
We know you probably have a lot of political emails in your inbox, especially with all the news coming out of Washington.
We also know that the barrage of emails can get pretty annoying. Trust us, we get it. That’s because a _real_ person wrote this email (👋 Hey!), not an AI machine that doesn’t understand that connecting with our supporters is our number one priority.
So we hope that the feeling you get when you open our emails is different from other political emails. _Because**NextGen** is different._
We’re not interested in compromising our mission to empower young voters across the country. That means no bowing to special interests. No backroom deals. No shadowy corporations pulling our strings.

name: Team DASS
subject: Shocking statistics (re: election workers)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: There’s a real possibility that the Supreme Court could block access to abortion medication.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s all thanks to Josh Hawley and his corrupt family business. Please let me explain:
#
Peter,
This coming Tuesday, the Supreme Court will hear arguments in the mifepristone case to ban the most commonly used abortion pill in all 50 states.
This is the case led by Josh Hawley’s wife and decided by his donor judge.
The Hawley Family Business is responsible for stripping away reproductive rights in our country — from banning abortion meds to overturning Roe v. Wade — and Josh Hawley has abused his power as Missouri’s U.S. Senator to do it all.
**This email is longer than usual, but I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44716?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9)
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44716?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9)**
Let’s start at the very beginning, before Josh Hawley was even elected.
**In 2017, Matthew Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the North Texas district court.** His confirmation stalled for years due to bipartisan opposition over his bizarre obsession with controlling people’s bodies, an issue he was even caught lying about during his nomination process:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44716?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9)
The next year, while his nomination stalled in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an investment in his future by becoming a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**As soon as Hawley was sworn into the U.S. Senate in 2019, he decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge.** Hawley became the deciding vote to confirm Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court, despite even more bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
Now let’s flash forward to June 2022. An organization called “Alliance Defending Freedom” — a group of activist attorneys that just so happens to employ Josh Hawley’s wife — successfully overturned Roe v. Wade.
This was the first big win for the Hawley Family Business. But it wasn’t enough.
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44716?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9)**
**Just weeks after Roe was overturned and Missouri enacted an exceptionless abortion ban, Hawley co-sponsored a national abortion ban in the U.S. Senate.** But the Hawley Family Business didn’t stop there.
In November 2022, a lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court — where Hawley’s campaign donor serves as a federal judge — by that same organization, “Alliance Defending Freedom,” to ban the abortion pill, mifepristone, nationwide. _Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions._
**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
It shouldn’t surprise anyone that Hawley’s DONOR judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s WIFE, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill in all 50 states — the first time a judge has _ever_ unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections.
Just days after Kacsmaryk’s ruling, Josh Hawley used his taxpayer-funded Senate office to submit an amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication.
It didn’t work, and for now, mifepristone is available for those who need it. **But after the Supreme Court hears arguments in the case next week, there’s a real possibility that abortion medication could be outlawed across the country.**
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44716?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9)**
**Even the federal judiciary knows that this is what corruption looks like.** Earlier this month, they updated the process for assigning cases to judges — eliminating “judge shopping,” as they admitted happened in the mifepristone case.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44716?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9)
**This election is our only opportunity to hold Hawley accountable for all of this.[So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion, shut down the Hawley Family Business, and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44716?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44717?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44717?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44717?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44717?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44717?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44717?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44716?refcode=em20240323-5110&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=5110%2E614464%2EH1Rvt9)
---
We have a real chance to take back power from control-obsessed elites like Josh Hawley and give Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back to real, everyday people this November — and we can’t afford to waste it.
— Lucas

| I trust this message finds you in good health and high spirits. I am writing to share the exciting news that we are entering the second phase of our campaign for the United States Senate from the great state of Tennessee. Last month, we submitted our petitions to officially be the first (#BeThe1st) Environmentalist and Woman of Color to represent the great state of Tennessee in the U.S. Senate. [Over the years, my commitment to serving our community and championing the issues that deeply resonate with us has only strengthened. Now, I am thrilled to elevate that dedication by pursuing a seat in the United States Senate. My aim is to instigate positive change and serve as a steadfast advocate for our shared values and aspirations.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABl_wSaeGiaX-sSxw2G6HITIAwyi4okGfvMppZ1BGeUg_0Vt-lMgM1mvIq-nDPYI8sqPDXvSfUpoPz4oPHl7Ar-dAQTUwlUCvneAWZEqEJuenCcr-_GhnvLE4UADMpxPw_a0gRirY8k7eNWSOpFQr_kDYUFpJVAzWoSLH9cI2BSEEsNQx4AhdeOSn0aZ_iDOvViHB9V0C31sjfxY4K4WfHlTsxtNkZvYeRW_iaXGkPIoxadXOxMCU_Ov-Kj0j8jnU6iTHVP3fnbao5n5uCdFs0ltz78c16aav6j6Ak0kF5SSfKZywYeGizhS0NoWinWS4neLdWcOaAlrRpLm5qy36X-LMx8jUHzJ8UFzksil5U38NbaH5FxgVyzvaiMOpzHQa3CNNOh) Having been actively involved in community service, I have consistently witnessed the challenges faced by everyday Americans. I have dedicated myself to crafting practical solutions and policies that directly address these challenges, placing healthcare reform, economic equality, environmental protection, education, and social justice at the forefront of my platform. [I firmly believe that through collaborative efforts, we can forge a brighter future for all Americans. subject: UPDATE: new poll >>

body:
A new poll shows me in second place!
| _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider[**splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64887?t=6&akid=13584%2E878179%2EHIOx1C)_ [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64888?t=7&akid=13584%2E878179%2EHIOx1C) Team: I just got some really important news!!

**A new poll shows this race is in a dead heat – this is HUGE!**

But there's about 50% of folks that are undecided on how they will vote. And I intend to prove to them why I'm the best candidate for the job. But I need your help to do it.

[**Will you rush $10 (honestly, $25 would be amazing!) to my campaign? I've got to raise $50,000 so I can keep knocking on doors, placing yard signs, and hopefully launch some TV ads, and I've got to do it by midnight!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64888?t=8&akid=13584%2E878179%2EHIOx1C) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Harry Dunn and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64889?t=9&akid=13584%2E878179%2EHIOx1C)

I'm not a tenured politician – but I am a tenured public servant.

I don't have some long history of being bought by this lobby or that lobby, but I do have a long history of protecting our democracy.

On January 6, I protected our democracy, our Capitol, and everyone inside of it with my own two hands.

And every day since then, I've been ringing the alarm bells. Our democracy will not survive if we don't put people who intend to protect it in power.

[**I'm ready to make my return to the Capitol and polls show that a lot of Marylanders agree. We can't slow down right now, not with an end-of-quarter deadline looming. Please, will you rush $10 right now?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64888?t=14&akid=13584%2E878179%2EHIOx1C)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=17ed4740c85f4ae7a02d43097f7fd1aa&_e=x1mh6EwwkFDosJBrtuRGvJsuL7YeH5JkPkuwdmipDPZecsyPYRD3higKdgbkdDJ8k-rDnQdoPlVzUp85KiyfD38E-RaJBGAuBufgzLuznVyxrOb3lLRWyHL4SvJ5qLieiP6AiZW2r5BxEyU90c1hsiFB0_cIQfYaGV1roBO4dIcPA0t2hc7y0m-rj51rkuDCikZbtcURlp2PtVfOTZ9rjnQIjdBqYzMF4CZDpe1-pDXfbhuBODE4nyfDrEV2phGG2EQr-kYP93xE7TrM3pUk3dRJjX5736YcyrjaniCh8FJH-42GtqKIWCq-BQf-XU_PjXA2RubbUM9sai_6sJfGcFeFdIvU6Lk1VwAOzwrNCfSXBfHJxX-gb_VzzOfYkPXoTHVJDPVgWyxXUNM6qfx8XA%3D%3D)

| Hi, it’s Sam Eppler.

**I’m proud and honored to officially be the Democratic nominee for Congress in Texas’ 24th District.**

The Associated Press called the race for us earlier this month, with our campaign earning about 59% of the votes!
---
| [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81522753/462713015/-1392637619?refcode=BLU_EM_SEC_2024-03-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk0Y2E1YjItMzRlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFmeVO2RK5CWpjyizlpczYVcFy6Bcv077lk6nS5s2uc=)

Thank you so much for your support throughout this primary. Since we launched this campaign last year, we’ve grown so much, and none of it would have been possible without your help.

I decided to run for Congress because Texans deserve better. MAGA extremists like my opponent, Beth Van Duyne, are more interested in pushing a radical political agenda instead of actually helping the working families in our community. Now more than ever, we need a new generation of leadership to build a brighter future for everyone.

clean_body: I’m proud and honored to officially be the Democratic nominee for Congress in Texas’ 24th District. | = | Hi, it’s Sam Eppler. I’m proud and honored to officially be the Democratic nominee for Congress in Texas’ 24th District. The Associated Press called the race for us earlier this month, with our campaign earning about 59% of the votes! | = Thank you so much for your support throughout this primary. Since we launched this campaign last year, we’ve grown so much, and none of it would have been possible without your help. I decided to run for Congress because Texans deserve better. MAGA extremists like my opponent, Beth Van Duyne, are more interested in pushing a radical political agenda instead of actually helping the working families in our community. Now more than ever, we need a new generation of leadership to build a brighter future for everyone. While we’re celebrating our victory, we still have a long way to go before we flip this seat from red to blue. = | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation, Sam * | | = Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress Sam Eppler for Congress 3419 Westminster Ave Box #268 Dallas, TX 75205 United States | | ---|--- = = Communicating by email is a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you no longer would like to receive emails, you can click here to

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My opponent wants to fully repeal the ACA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m working my heart out to protect our health care.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2279%2E35263%2E5aR4le)
Peter — 14 years ago today, President Obama signed the _Affordable Care Act_ into law, protecting those with pre-existing conditions and expanding affordable health care for millions of Americans. But Republicans have been trying to repeal the law and throw millions of people off of their health insurance ever since — including my Republican opponent, Eric Hovde. **There are no parts of the law that he supports. He wants to fully repeal the ACA, including protections for people with pre-existing conditions and coverage for young adults.** Americans should never have to worry that their elected leaders will pull their health insurance out from under them. Affordable health care for people with pre-existing conditions and other protections under the ACA should be a guarantee. That’s exactly what I’m fighting for and more. **[I’m working my heart out to protect our health care from Republicans who want to move us backward. If you’re with me, will you sign your name to my petition in support of protecting the ACA on its 14th anniversary?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2403_ACA/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240323_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2279%2E35263%2E5aR4le)** | [PROTECT THE ACA](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2403_ACA/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240323_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2279%2E35263%2E5aR4le)
---
Thank you, as always, for taking action.
— Tammy

| Republicans poured more than $77 million into Wisconsin’s Senate race in 2022 and won by 1%. They plan to spend whatever it takes to defeat Tammy this year, and we need your help to fight back. **Donate to Tammy's reelection campaign to help her win this toss-up race and defend our Democratic Senate majority.** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240323_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2279%2E35263%2E5aR4le)

name: Team Casey
subject: 14 years ago, the ACA became law

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2427%2E552475%2EUVKDFx)
Peter —
Fourteen years ago, the Affordable Care Act became law, expanding health care coverage to millions of Americans, including those who were previously denied coverage due to a pre-existing condition.
Today, Donald Trump is promising to repeal this life-saving legislation if Republicans take control in 2024.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-2?refcode=em20240323-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2427_552475_UVKDFx&akid=2427%2E552475%2EUVKDFx)
**[Chip in to protect the ACA ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-2?refcode=em20240323-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2427_552475_UVKDFx&akid=2427%2E552475%2EUVKDFx)**
We need to hold our majority, but Democrats have no chance of holding the Senate and the White House without defending Pennsylvania.
**If Bob Casey loses, he’ll be replaced by Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate who would vote with a Republican majority in the Senate that would terminate the ACA.** That’s why the GOP is doing everything they can to flip PA red, including dropping a $1 million ad buy against Bob.
**[This November, health care is on the ballot, and we need your help to protect it. Will you chip in $5 or more to help re-elect Bob Casey and keep the Senate (and the White House) blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-2?refcode=em20240323-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2427_552475_UVKDFx&akid=2427%2E552475%2EUVKDFx)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._

body:
**** | **PA: We are officially ONE MONTH out from the primary election!**
We’re working hard to re-elect Mad but we need your help! | | [ **RUSH $30** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81524832/462715782/493843435?amount=30&refcode=03232024_md_primaryonemonth_fr_1&refcode2=e26615cb-36e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjY2MTVjYi0zNmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVJ8rRGcLcYjoni3QyJt7Pu_g2rjZJxKbokMjU5Dw04=)
---

We’re establishing a solid, district-wide ground game to turn out voters, run up our margins, and bring a blue wave to PA. And with just one month to go, we’re officially in the final stretch of the primary election. Getting this groundwork done early helps us be as prepared as possible for the general election.

This election year will be unpredictable, and we don’t have the luxury of taking anything for granted. With a rise in MAGA candidates, an all-but-certain Trump-versus-Biden rematch, and the House majority on the line — now is the time to gather our resources and get to work.

Peter, as you may know, I was NASA Chief of Staff under President Obama.

At NASA, it was never about self-interest and party politics. Did we have our differences? Sure. But we worked together to solve problems and move the country forward.

That’s what we’re missing in Congress today, and there’s no bigger offender than my opponent Mike Garcia. His actions have shown he’s loyal to the Republican Party above all else – including the needs of our community:
* He’s voted for a national abortion ban, despite the vast majority of our community opposing it.
* He’s voted to give himself a pay raise, despite many in our district struggling to make ends meet.
* He’s voted in lock-step with the GOP, even when it’s against our community’s best interests.

That’s why it’s so important that we unseat Mike Garcia and take back the House majority.

**[Our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the Election Year is around the corner, and this is our opportunity to prove to Garcia and the GOP that we have the power of the people behind us. clean_body: | = = Peter, as you may know, I was NASA Chief of Staff under President Obama. At NASA, it was never about self-interest and party politics. Did we have our differences? Sure. But we worked together to solve problems and move the country forward. That’s what we’re missing in Congress today, and there’s no bigger offender than my opponent Mike Garcia. His actions have shown he’s loyal to the Republican Party above all else – including the needs of our community: He’s voted for a national abortion ban, despite the vast majority of our community opposing it. He’s voted to give himself a pay raise, despite many in our district struggling to make ends meet. He’s voted in lock-step with the GOP, even when it’s against our community’s best interests. That’s why it’s so important that we unseat Mike Garcia and take back the House majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. **_BREAKING: Donald Trump sues ABC News and host George Stephanopoulos for defaming him during an interview with Rep. Nancy Mace._**

Peter - President Trump always fights for the truth.

After my interview with George Stephanopoulos, President Trump isn’t going to let the media get away with their lies.

In my interview, I corrected Stephanopoulos twice when he asked me an inaccurate question because President Trump has never been convicted of rape, but he doubled down – and now we’re going to fight back.

He not only shamed me continuously but also cited false facts against President Trump just because he disagreed with our politics. **Well, we’re not taking this attack from the liberal media lying down.**

[**President Trump has filed a defamation lawsuit against ABC and George Stephanopoulos for tarnishing his reputation with their FAKE NEWS.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b9589f85401d4f48afed8c8734f7a878&_e=Hbex8Y5RcbnLYYzJ_5GtvpxcFak1qjmk2O8f0y9VWliySCs-FdtUdULXQjl68-7FoAJfd2PrlSp_AZ7RtvLcl092qNR8XFskHAwSTzs47Tv80J5yrFs9c_Z-RJroGvLn_oyjc7wrdw8jG7wgIir58GmfXejUlJULSAvi4ZykCms0B0lLYtOpIN1ZIj5DnyX7v948GHcj2Vm3s5vNY69V1KEw1x0hNPtjlpcYn-wytBX1WfXVgtBwq_AEB0IbxCRstxf3LPZ5jJX8uskAQtAglgj33NrCGd-x1QPjJCAU24B0r93rxFsc6ehLh39OcUoEEiIAFQiCTURBW6YdgwEUCaTUOUPtFgLeUsYMbizUrH0mOpGr_gJkrq7uXCsslC3Dz-SBfGQtS6MM0CRG6YYRww%3D%3D)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

Team, **Lean red.** That’s how CNN classified Michigan in their recent 2024 electoral projections 👇 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81525260/462716385/-1832949506?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240323_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU5YjA1MGEtMzdlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jHbhwTk6UDaFr-5h4d3k73yMCmVuTEoZKfEZfZ5jmX0=) [**Will you please chip in to Fight Like Hell PAC to help us defeat Donald Trump in Michigan and keep our state blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81525264/462716387/-1832949506?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240323_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU5YjA1MGEtMzdlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jHbhwTk6UDaFr-5h4d3k73yMCmVuTEoZKfEZfZ5jmX0=) CNN’s electoral map shows that if the election were held today — **Donald Trump would win Michigan _and_ the White House.** This map doesn’t surprise us. Polls have consistently shown that we would be fighting an uphill battle to keep Michigan from going to Donald Trump in November. But it does serve as a good reminder of how much work we need to do in the next several months to keep Michigan blue. **The good news is that there’s still plenty of time left to do just that.** There’s a ton at stake in November — and our job is to reach every single possible voter we can in Michigan to make the case that President Biden and Vice President Harris are the _only_ candidates who will protect their fundamental rights and defend hardworking Americans. **But it won’t be cheap.** Donald Trump and his far-right allies are going to invest tens of millions of dollars into Michigan to attack the Biden-Harris administration and spread lies about his record. clean_body: | Team, Lean red. That’s how CNN classified Michigan in their recent 2024 electoral projections 👇 = = CNN’s electoral map shows that if the election were held today — Donald Trump would win Michigan and the White House. This map doesn’t surprise us. Polls have consistently shown that we would be fighting an uphill battle to keep Michigan from going to Donald Trump in November. But it does serve as a good reminder of how much work we need to do in the next several months to keep Michigan blue. The good news is that there’s still plenty of time left to do just that. There’s a ton at stake in November — and our job is to reach every single possible voter we can in Michigan to make the case that President Biden and Vice President Harris are the only candidates who will protect their fundamental rights and defend hardworking Americans. But it won’t be cheap. Donald Trump and his far-right allies are going to invest tens of millions of dollars into Michigan to attack the Biden-Harris administration and spread lies about his record. And we’ll need to rely on contributions from people like you to push back against Trump’s lies and make sure voters across Michigan know the truth. We don’t expect you to donate to every email, but occasionally donating a few times a month to emails like this will go a long way toward ensuring that we have the necessary resources to turn out voters for Team Biden-Harris and keep Michigan blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = There’s only one way we’re going to defy the odds and keep Michigan blue — and that’s together. Thanks for joining this fight. — Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

Folks — We don’t want to take up too much of your afternoon, but we wanted to make sure you had this before we start crafting our 2024 policy agenda.
At the core of this movement are the issues that impact everyday working families across Central and Southern Illinois.
Whether it’s the cost of groceries or prescriptions, or access to comprehensive reproductive healthcare, we want to know what’s on your mind as we head into November.

| Fourteen years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act (ACA) into law. While there’s still more work to be done to improve care, this was a crucial piece of legislation that gave millions of uninsured Americans access to quality, affordable healthcare. **Today, roughly 40 million people receive healthcare coverage through the ACA.** But since the day President Obama signed the landmark law, Republicans in Congress and across the country have fought to block it and then repeal it. Donald Trump only narrowly failed in repealing the law in 2017, and now he’s campaigning on a promise to **_“totally kill”_** the ACA if he returns to the White House. **Trump has made it perfectly clear:** He will not stop until millions of hardworking Americans are _kicked off_ of their health care. name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: “I didn't come to Congress to listen to lobbyists or CEOs.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It’s March 23rd, which means there’s just one month left until the
Democratic primary election in Pennsylvania: our first test of 2024.

Justice Democrats incumbent Rep. Summer Lee is up for re-election in
PA-12, and she’s being challenged by an AIPAC and Moderate PAC-backed
candidate.

Last week, Moderate PAC (funded by Jeff Yass, the richest man in PA and a
Republican billionaire) launched their first attack ad against Summer.
Now, she’s launched her first ad to fight back and set the record
straight.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240323-sl.TbcGtW&refcode=em20240323-33953&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=33953%2E1203867%2E0G9Gwn ]Check out Summer’s new ad, then split a donation to Justice Democrats
and Summer to help ensure she has the resources to win her competitive
primary →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240323-sl.TbcGtW&refcode=em20240323-33953&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=33953%2E1203867%2E0G9Gwn ]Screenshot of Summer Lee's campaign video

Summer didn't come to Congress to listen to lobbyists or CEOs. She did it
to give the people of Western Pennsylvania a voice in Washington.

She’s since delivered $1.2 billion to her communities, maintained a 100%
voting record, and stood up to Republican extremism.

Summer has stood side by side with striking workers on the picket line,
was one of the first members of Congress to call for a ceasefire in Gaza,
and has consistently fought to make life better for the people she was
elected to represent.

We can’t afford to lose Summer’s progressive leadership in Congress,
especially to a moderate challenger propped up by GOP megadonor-funded
groups. Unlike her opponent, Summer relies on grassroots support from
people like you — that’s how she won in 2022 against AIPAC’s millions of
dollars in attack ads, and it’s how she’ll win again this year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240323-sl.TbcGtW&refcode=em20240323-33953&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=33953%2E1203867%2E0G9Gwn ]With just one more month left, pitch in $5 or whatever
you can to help Summer win her competitive primary on April 23rd and
advance to the general election!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240323-sl.TbcGtW&refcode=em20240323-33953&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=33953%2E1203867%2E0G9Gwn ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240323-33953-footer&t=1023&refcode2=33953_1203867_0G9Gwn&akid=33953%2E1203867%2E0G9Gwn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=33953%2E1203867%2E0G9Gwn

Summer has stood side by side with striking workers on the picket line, was one of the first members of Congress to call for a ceasefire in Gaza, and has consistently fought to make life better for the people she was elected to represent. We can’t afford to lose Summer’s progressive leadership in Congress, especially to a moderate challenger propped up by GOP megadonor-funded groups. Unlike her opponent, Summer relies on grassroots support from people like you — that’s how she won in 2022 against AIPAC’s millions of dollars in attack ads, and it’s how she’ll win again this year. [ ]With just one more month left, pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help Summer win her competitive primary on April 23rd and advance to the general election! [ ]Contribute $5 In solidarity, Alexandra Rojas Executive Director Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Control of the Senate will undoubtedly run through Ohio this year. That means we have to build an undeniable, winning campaign – which starts with you. ****[Before I explain further, I have to ask: Can you donate $5 or more to fuel our efforts to re-elect Sherrod Brown here in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81527444/462721098/592897310?refcode=odp_em_240323_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ0OWIyOC0zOWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KzB3gh2vj12KKyG0w6Mnl3-1Nr87y5YrO0bwh4RcgVo=)**** What’s involved in a winning campaign? We have to talk to as many voters as possible, in every corner of Ohio. And then of course there’s our get-out-the-vote efforts. We need to provide food, water, and educational resources for our committed volunteers so they can hit the road and knock on the doors of Ohioans. And we can’t forget about Bernie Moreno’s war chest. Not only is he writing his campaign million-dollar checks, but national Republicans are pouring every penny they have into this race to take back the Senate. What we raise _now_ plays a huge role in how many voters we can reach ahead of the general election in November. We simply can’t afford to sit back and hope for the best on this one. Especially not when political pundits everywhere are saying this race will come down to the smallest of margins. ****[That’s why your contribution is so important. It’s an investment into winning this campaign for a brighter future for Ohio and our entire country. Please, if you can, donate $5 to defend Ohio’s crucial seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81527445/462721099/592897310?refcode=odp_em_240323_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ0OWIyOC0zOWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KzB3gh2vj12KKyG0w6Mnl3-1Nr87y5YrO0bwh4RcgVo=)**** Thank you, Liz Walters | ******Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. body:
|
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528169/462723303/1643342139?refcode=240323message&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmMDliMy0zYWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UtpE5ant0LlYt7nKoFOXiJdebm1UqcRS3I_oHfhuCdQ=)** Peter, I was honored to address Hoosier voters in a guest opinion column this week in the _Indianapolis Star_. The message is simple. Our state needs a more balanced outlook, one that finally puts people above special interests.

One-party supermajority rule has been bad for Indiana. **Over the last 12 years, Republicans have taken away reproductive rights, attacked workers’ rights, and lacked accountability.**

[_**Winning just four seats this year will end that Republican supermajority, and bring balance and accountability to a state legislature that badly needs it. Will you chip in to help us end the excessive supermajority in November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528170/462723304/405560545?refcode=240323message&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmMDliMy0zYWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UtpE5ant0LlYt7nKoFOXiJdebm1UqcRS3I_oHfhuCdQ=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528171/462723305/1643342139?refcode=240323message&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzhmMDliMy0zYWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UtpE5ant0LlYt7nKoFOXiJdebm1UqcRS3I_oHfhuCdQ=)** And the Republicans running for governor know that our state is falling short – you see it in their ads and their campaign rhetoric. _**But they’ve spent the last 20 years cheering on extreme policies and being in positions to do something, and they didn’t. body:

Peter, correct me if I'm wrong -- _but I 'm willing to bet you're frustrated by what you're seeing and hearing from Washington lately. _

**I know I am.**
**And I know millions of Americans feel the _same_ way. **
**Here 's three reasons why:**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6d100a76442f4d879148efc0624014fd&_e=uNPxZJUwghSx-pL9gjWaX4E6Hyjz_eP8AiBvHStF9goOZcea-u8TFG3BGYpb2A3BEQPNWHF-D-0OvH7s3u-yAwrAXDJ7u__j56mAPdryKPjbZy4NcAzoh5XP2oSrL35jSKRZVrsBdrOg-ts1S_6-_-dqaqO-gdorhzV1qWbMFjRJGVVtaAhc-0oRVSCH0sqWBx424uAKCAq-BWbneObGV_JvHlcSbC6Z7ezf4rpO_oM2JGK6K0hFJSPYi1o3OEVxLlgL09avwuIUljg7IgDV1TgiXNn1RkTsM6l4_5DWryttquvLA5GNXq3dnXuRiXbJEC9BARViaKNxvXHtzc0Lxj6NLM2tC7BrFBHPrvo9B-yq3xIM0A4OvVPgqRW_dAUO)
---
Washington has never been perfect, Peter.
Every American can agree on that.

But at the very least, we should be able to count on our leaders to _**tell the truth, listen to the people they serve, and put America FIRST. **_

---
**That 's why we're bringing patriots from every corner of the country together to fight for a RED WAVE in November**

---
[**STAND WITH US: CHIP IN $20.24**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6d100a76442f4d879148efc0624014fd&_e=uNPxZJUwghSx-pL9gjWaX4E6Hyjz_eP8AiBvHStF9goOZcea-u8TFG3BGYpb2A3BEQPNWHF-D-0OvH7s3u-yAwrAXDJ7u__j56mAPdryKPjbZy4NcAzoh5XP2oSrL35jSKRZVrsBdrOg-ts1S_6-_-dqaqO-gdorhzV1qWbMFjRJGVVtaAhc-0oRVSCH0sqWBx424uAKCAq-BWbneObGVzfAAbf6_oegnMoluVP2mqrIeQO296_an0-v081T6O1k_HtUKkYB4FWW-B84wfkv4AMHyVXUJ0bgRO3giFPEm1zHUmPeJzFMPq123-qqfHvGSRx2Z0CrJjVwVkdGoO2r8tkUacEmCL3Q2J4kuXCutUDZ9NMjdk-HoCObWe9HLqt1)
---
Peter, despite all the problems facing our country, the American Dream is worth fighting for.

Our best days can still be ahead.

We still have pride in our past -- and are working to give our children a bright future full of freedom and opportunity.

_**But none of that matters if we don 't have the right leaders in Washington.**_

Just look at what has happened under President Biden over the last three years:

**The strong border and record-breaking economy we worked so hard to achieve have been LOST and replaced with a failed, radical, left-wing agenda.**

America needs conservative leadership now more than ever before, and that's exactly why we MUST win Congress, the Senate, and the White House in November.

| | Peter – Securing the future of Clackamas County means ensuring that its leaders are committed to public safety, fairness, transparency, and financial responsibility. To that end, I'm excited to support [Craig Roberts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528751/462724899/1838186333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDM3OGJkMi0zYmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VkOnwsa8pCKoP6JekUu1uiR9kdy9IHvNHCF69WN83To=&emci=8382acca-c7e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=14378bd2-3be9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=29359352) in his campaign to be the next County Commission chair, and [Angela Brandenburg](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528752/462724900/-1668079330?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDM3OGJkMi0zYmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VkOnwsa8pCKoP6JekUu1uiR9kdy9IHvNHCF69WN83To=&emci=8382acca-c7e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=14378bd2-3be9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=29359352) in her re-election campaign as County Sheriff. clean_body: Clackamas County needs Craig Roberts and Angela Brandenburg | | | | Peter – Securing the future of Clackamas County means ensuring that its leaders are committed to public safety, fairness, transparency, and financial responsibility. To that end, I'm excited to support in his campaign to be the next County Commission chair, and in her re-election campaign as County Sheriff. Craig Roberts has devoted his life to making Clackamas County safe and livable. He proved time and again during 16 years as county sheriff that people are his priority, as he successfully made improvements on the local and statewide level that focused on our youth, individuals with mental illness, and those struggling with addiction. I have no doubt that as county chair, Craig will ensure that county government is as good as the incredible people it serves. Craig is committed to creating a local talent pipeline by bringing business owners together with our public schools, community college, and technical school partners to grow our workforce. He'll ensure that the county has the funds for affordable housing, healthcare services, and improved transportation. And he understands that Clackamas County is a special place worth protecting with some of the best parts of Oregon: a vibrant mix of urban cities and rural towns, healthy manufacturing, small business and agricultural economies, and a spectacular natural heritage. Angela Brandenburg succeeded Craig as County Sheriff in 2021. Since then, she's continued his legacy of making Clackamas County safer, been a financial watchdog, increased the Sheriff's Office public accountability, and been a strong voice for Clackamas County taxpayers. In fact, under her leadership, Clackamas was the safest metro county in both 2022 and 2023. Angela has led successful efforts to fund over two dozen new deputy positions, bring mental health and medical beds to the county jail, and implement a comprehensive body camera program. During her tenure, a record number of firearms have been taken off the street, and the sheriff's office has improved its processes for delivering aid in response to emergencies like search and rescue and wildfires. # [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6037%2E5257348%2E62_V5f)
Hey Derek, do you have a minute?
My campaign is facing a huge milestone in a little over one week: our end-of-quarter FEC deadline. Our first FEC deadline of the year _and_ the first since the primary election.
After this deadline, all our fundraising data will be made public and scrutinized by everyone from _Fox News_ pundits to Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies in Congress.
Since I advanced to the general election, Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans have been doing everything they can to undermine our campaign – and it will continue when they scrutinize every detail of our FEC report. If they detect _any_ slowdown in our momentum, they'll spare no effort in pouring money into my opponent's campaign to defeat us.
**So let's prove them wrong.**
My team has set a goal of raising $250,000 by midnight on March 31st to regain momentum.**[Will you contribute $10 now to help us reach this goal?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=mar2024_abs_em_t2.VxyWwN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240323_PM1_T2_S1&email=&t=18&akid=6037%2E5257348%2E62_V5f)**

---
Despite facing relentless insults and attacks from Republicans since advancing to the general election, you’ve demonstrated time and again that we’ll remain resilient and _always_ fight back.
Donald Trump never misses a chance to attack me onstage, resorting to childish name-calling. _Yet here we stand!_ It’s the story of our campaign, and **it’s the story of our democracy.**
No matter how many times they try to attack us, we will always fight back. Now, I need your support to demonstrate that our grassroots momentum is only growing stronger.
**[If you can, will you donate $10 to my campaign before March 31st to help us continue this fight?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=mar2024_abs_em_t2.VxyWwN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240323_PM1_T2_S1&email=&t=20&akid=6037%2E5257348%2E62_V5f)**

My team has set a goal of raising $250,000 by midnight on March 31st to regain momentum. Despite facing relentless insults and attacks from Republicans since advancing to the general election, you’ve demonstrated time and again that we’ll remain resilient and always fight back. Donald Trump never misses a chance to attack me onstage, resorting to childish name-calling. Yet here we stand! It’s the story of our campaign, and it’s the story of our democracy. No matter how many times they try to attack us, we will always fight back. Now, I need your support to demonstrate that our grassroots momentum is only growing stronger. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you for your support! — Adam | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: COURIER
subject: Sponsor a newsroom before March ends, Peter?
body:
Sponsor a battleground newsroom in 2024.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528876/462725292/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4NGRhZTQtM2NlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8sw9tlsjboaw8DabQhDCNEhfKS8_DyH2OXAoCHnqs88=&emci=2545c3de-3ce9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=3884dae4-3ce9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
Hey Peter,
Trump is at the top of the ticket. Right-wing extremists are on the ballot across the country. 2024 is set to be one of the most consequential election years ever for American democracy.
With so much at stake, access to trustworthy local news has never been more important. **And we’ve seen the impact this kind of coverage can have.**
Take Moms for Liberty, for example. The far-right PAC dominated elections and the news cycle in 2022 over their opposition to LGBTQ and racially inclusive education and their efforts to ban books.
But after consistent, factual reporting on their extreme political views and ties to hate groups like the Proud Boys, Moms for Liberty is imploding. They lost big time in 2023 elections, and they seem to be losing steam in 2024.
**This is why we launched COURIER, Peter.** Right now, our journalists in 10 battleground states are on the ground providing critical local news coverage to communities without access to trustworthy news.
[**But in order to keep providing this service, we rely on the generous support of donors like you. That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to participate in our Sponsor A 2024 Battleground Newsroom Project:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528877/462725293/1184252563?refcode=20240323-EM-Sponsor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4NGRhZTQtM2NlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8sw9tlsjboaw8DabQhDCNEhfKS8_DyH2OXAoCHnqs88=)
**You’ve been chosen to sponsor our local news teams! Your donation will support our newsrooms across ten battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Virginia, New Hampshire, and Wisconsin. And that’s not all. COURIER plans to open a newsroom in Texas before the 2024 election. ** **We’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 before March ends, so can we count on you to chip in $10 now and help our newsrooms spread their stories across their states?** **[Chip in $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528878/462725294/1184252563?refcode=20240216-EM-SponsorANewsroom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4NGRhZTQtM2NlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8sw9tlsjboaw8DabQhDCNEhfKS8_DyH2OXAoCHnqs88=)**
---
**We’re at a critical turning point in the fight against misinformation, Peter.** Trustworthy local news sources are rapidly disappearing. Media companies are laying off reporters at historic rates. As a result, many communities are relying more and more on right-wing propaganda to get their news.
**COURIER is on the frontlines of protecting access to high quality local news that makes an impact.**
**We protect democracy by publishing factual, left-leaning local news in the online spaces where right-wing lies thrive.** Our newsrooms in 10 battleground states fearlessly call out right-wing lies and misinformation in real time.
And in order to keep our journalism accessible to the communities who need it most, _none_ of our stories are locked behind paywalls or subscription fees. All of our news is free to read in the online spaces where right-wing lies spread.
**[But we can’t do it without you. Our ten battleground newsrooms rely on donations from supporters like you to keep the lights on and the presses running. Can we count on you to give $10 to sponsor one of our newsrooms?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528879/462725295/1184252563?refcode=20240323-EM-Sponsor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4NGRhZTQtM2NlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8sw9tlsjboaw8DabQhDCNEhfKS8_DyH2OXAoCHnqs88=)**
Thank you for your continued support,
COURIER team
* * *
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
[**Become a member! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81528880/462725296/1028889122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4NGRhZTQtM2NlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8sw9tlsjboaw8DabQhDCNEhfKS8_DyH2OXAoCHnqs88=&emci=2545c3de-3ce9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=3884dae4-3ce9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=14016711)

That's why I'm so _thrilled_ to share this amazing news, Peter:

**I'm now 2 POINTS AHEAD of Mitch McConnell's handpicked, GOP opponent in my race, that will likely decide Senate control!**

The GOP is coming after me with everything they've got. Donald Trump himself has been flying to Nevada to rile up Republican support, and in the last quarter, my right-wing opponent broke a major fundraising record.

That's why I need supporters like you to step up in these critical moments and keep this campaign’s momentum going, and I'm really counting on you right now, Peter.

clean_body: I'm now 2 POINTS ahead of my opponent in this must-win race. | From shady dark-money groups to MAGA billionaires, this grassroots team is up against a lot. That's why I'm so thrilled to share this amazing news, Peter: I'm now 2 POINTS AHEAD of Mitch McConnell's handpicked, GOP opponent in my race, that will likely decide Senate control! = = Peter: After months of being tied in the polls, this surge proves that we have what it takes to defeat the GOP and win this critical battleground race in Nevada – but it also means we cannot let up. The stakes haven’t changed: I'm still the most vulnerable Democratic woman up for reelection. Experts still say this race is the one that will likely decide Senate control. And everything – from reproductive freedom to our very democracy – is still on the line. The GOP is coming after me with everything they've got. Donald Trump himself has been flying to Nevada to rile up Republican support, and in the last quarter, my right-wing opponent broke a major fundraising record. That's why I need supporters like you to step up in these critical moments and keep this campaign’s momentum going, and I'm really counting on you right now, Peter. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being part of this critically important grassroots team. – Jacky Rosen | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. body:
Our ability to support climate champions depends on a lot of individuals supporting our work however they can.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81529263/462726516/1328794144?refcode=ea.d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZWE1NWViLTNkZTktZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qk135uUMMbhZH01GN9prZXi_uKLypU7xzXE96uGhdHo=&emci=b7084ae3-74e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4823105)

Hey. It’s Jane. There’s an old saying I think about often: If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together. I couldn’t agree with this more. That's why the Jane Fonda Climate PAC champions the power of unity in our fight against climate change. Our ability to elect climate champions depends on a lot of individuals supporting our work however they can. So the stronger our grassroots support, the stronger our impact. Our strategy is clear: We provide direct financial support to candidates who are committed to fighting the climate crisis. Our endorsed candidates refuse support from Big Oil and other corporate polluters, relying instead on building broad coalitions of supporters who share their vision for a clean and sustainable future. This stance means that the small-dollar donations we receive can go even further, amplifying our impact where it counts the most. Now, as March draws to a close, we find ourselves on the cusp of another end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Meeting our goal allows us to amplify our efforts, to dig deeper, and to push harder against the greedy fossil fuel industry. **[Your support has been indispensable. If you are in a position to contribute, I urge you to chip in any amount today. Every dollar empowers us to continue our vital work here at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81529265/462726518/2105508926?refcode=ea.d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZWE1NWViLTNkZTktZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qk135uUMMbhZH01GN9prZXi_uKLypU7xzXE96uGhdHo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81529267/462726521/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZWE1NWViLTNkZTktZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qk135uUMMbhZH01GN9prZXi_uKLypU7xzXE96uGhdHo=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81529270/462726522/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.d9ea55eb-3de9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZWE1NWViLTNkZTktZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qk135uUMMbhZH01GN9prZXi_uKLypU7xzXE96uGhdHo=)

name: Katherine Clark
subject: We need to elect Janelle Bynum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Happy Women’s History Month! My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81529458/462727204/2041436108?refcode=em_fr_2024.03.23_b1_kc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU5NDZjYmYtM2VlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZbRaqLI1JJWRRSDY6mx_DwG3A8H_InjImJqW1wA7uNE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81529459/462727205/2041436108?refcode=em_fr_2024.03.23_b1_kc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU5NDZjYmYtM2VlOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZbRaqLI1JJWRRSDY6mx_DwG3A8H_InjImJqW1wA7uNE=) Happy Women’s History Month! My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip. It wasn’t too long ago when there were hardly any women serving in Congress at all. When I first came to Congress in 2013, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse (multiple times), making it difficult to even get into the Chamber to cast a vote. Fast forward to today, and thankfully, things have improved. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!** I’ve been adamant about bringing more women into Congress because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color. **And with MAGA extremists threatening to take our country backward, we need to keep our momentum growing and expand our ranks in the halls of Congress. **

**[That’s why I’m writing to you today. Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.
Lifting up others is one of my core values — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we _all_ do better.
**Together, we can continue the fight for gender equity, women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve.**

All my best,
— Katherine

If we’re going to win this November and protect North Carolina from extremists like Robinson, we need your help. = | = | = | = | = | = We’re in this together Team Foushee * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. body:
Demand Republicans keep their hands off the Affordable Care Act [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81529546/462727657/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2I1MmQyOC0zZmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Ir994IXiy3QjGI5ktyLNQ7kb4FFn85-jrIPrcDdMT0=&emci=27c421a0-78e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=93b52d28-3fe9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

**Fourteen years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act (ACA) into law.** This historic legislation made healthcare more accessible for over 40 million Americans.

As a pediatrician and person with Type 1 diabetes, I understand how impactful this legislation has been for Americans. Now 92% of Americans have insurance that covers pre-existing conditions. And for the tens of millions of hard-working families across this country who weren't insured, the ACA has given them the security of affordable insurance and access to medical care. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81529547/462727659/1189535128?ms=em24_240323_acapet_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&refcode=em24_240323_acapet_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&source=em24_240323_acapet_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240323_acapet_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=bZHVbaK+nQKMBWQL3X8RHKyEeXqdol5zcdUm/JZzoU6PGKmEFGtrtN8rfFyqO7b41LkfvmDXwYuvmEIFjAHRbJngOg3EVVq00xfdoJGCUUmvMnsHC1UZbG6DXiNW1tn+IjZRTURRzW98nIfSserQ1WjO2tYMeVDLGHayl6+A1uc=&refcode2=93b52d28-3fe9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2I1MmQyOC0zZmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Ir994IXiy3QjGI5ktyLNQ7kb4FFn85-jrIPrcDdMT0=&emci=27c421a0-78e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=93b52d28-3fe9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=15820338) In 2017, Congressional Republicans announced their plans to overturn the Affordable Care Act. Seeing the danger this would pose to my patients and families across America, I joined three other doctors from my clinic in taking action. We held an urgent meeting with our representative to explain how the ACA helped protect the people in this very District – and yet two days later, our congressman betrayed WA-08 and voted to overturn the ACA.

**That was the final straw for me.**

Sensing I could do more for the good for the children and families of Washington's 8th District, from a seat in the House of Representatives than I ever could in the four walls of my exam room, I packed up my office and left the job I loved to run for Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81529548/462727661/1189535128?ms=em24_240323_acapet_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&refcode=em24_240323_acapet_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&source=em24_240323_acapet_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240323_acapet_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=bZHVbaK+nQKMBWQL3X8RHKyEeXqdol5zcdUm/JZzoU6PGKmEFGtrtN8rfFyqO7b41LkfvmDXwYuvmEIFjAHRbJngOg3EVVq00xfdoJGCUUmvMnsHC1UZbG6DXiNW1tn+IjZRTURRzW98nIfSserQ1WjO2tYMeVDLGHayl6+A1uc=&refcode2=93b52d28-3fe9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2I1MmQyOC0zZmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Ir994IXiy3QjGI5ktyLNQ7kb4FFn85-jrIPrcDdMT0=&emci=27c421a0-78e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=93b52d28-3fe9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=15820338)
Thanks to the support of this incredible grassroots team, we flipped WA-08 blue for the first time ever, and kept it blue in 2020 and 2022. Since then, I've been fighting to keep the ACA alive through multiple attempts by extreme Republicans to repeal it.

In fact, in the last Congress, with Democrats in charge, we improved the ACA! We made health insurance more affordable and gave Medicare the power to negotiate the cost of prescription drugs. And I’m the sponsor of a bill to allow people to buy into Medicaid.

Despite our progress and the benefits the ACA has provided to millions of American families, Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans continue to make repealing the ACA a top priority of their legislative agenda.

As your congresswoman, I'll always fight back against these attacks and work to ensure that every person has access to the care they need. But I need your support to continue this important fight.

clean_body: Demand Republicans keep their hands off the Affordable Care Act Peter, Fourteen years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act (ACA) into law. This historic legislation made healthcare more accessible for over 40 million Americans. As a pediatrician and person with Type 1 diabetes, I understand how impactful this legislation has been for Americans. Now 92% of Americans have insurance that covers pre-existing conditions. And for the tens of millions of hard-working families across this country who weren't insured, the ACA has given them the security of affordable insurance and access to medical care. In 2017, Congressional Republicans announced their plans to overturn the Affordable Care Act. Seeing the danger this would pose to my patients and families across America, I joined three other doctors from my clinic in taking action. We held an urgent meeting with our representative to explain how the ACA helped protect the people in this very District – and yet two days later, our congressman betrayed WA-08 and voted to overturn the ACA. That was the final straw for me. Sensing I could do more for the good for the children and families of Washington's 8th District, from a seat in the House of Representatives than I ever could in the four walls of my exam room, I packed up my office and left the job I loved to run for Congress. Thanks to the support of this incredible grassroots team, we flipped WA-08 blue for the first time ever, and kept it blue in 2020 and 2022. Since then, I've been fighting to keep the ACA alive through multiple attempts by extreme Republicans to repeal it. In fact, in the last Congress, with Democrats in charge, we improved the ACA! We made health insurance more affordable and gave Medicare the power to negotiate the cost of prescription drugs. And I’m the sponsor of a bill to allow people to buy into Medicaid. Despite our progress and the benefits the ACA has provided to millions of American families, Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans continue to make repealing the ACA a top priority of their legislative agenda. As your congresswoman, I'll always fight back against these attacks and work to ensure that every person has access to the care they need. But I need your support to continue this important fight. Thanks, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress.
