name: Dovid Efune
subject: Americans are waking up
body:
Our aim is for every interaction with the Sun to inform, educate, inspire, and uplift our readers.
Join the Sun and restore American journalism.

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7df8112cfaee42778ddb24c35a244ec3&_e=h2YMjN9W48OBmuibHEZiarEZqUa5jEjaXKc65ePmYhfeT1rSd1A0oECYa42FSHBsv62NOKeiKwJtzH_A6Pejr4IZ0tOSOvW4lnaHbdXbR_1_djExK9fkSVJeW5jFfXJN0ma25ChWUT5Qp3KqKb89wAdPi3ksYaY3UNGAN3r1b16KfAv0L_OzJPOIYiRy1MPqdKIL55gTc9uO_vUZ4svssA8-OF69FeHP-xEAr8FIzd2nPKURUlidZqgS9BIOnwRzhxiuj3TEr0_GSB9mqCj4E0Tws2vdZsCXiY1Um0zGJqpmd9EgZ98_qZhRoU1jQaZb60CPm3baxk0314mpNQvRziipIst4oKASBXTx9slKly87gzpKu5G12o84IRoknu5r)
---
|
---
| | _Dear Peter,_ _It's no secret that the mainstream press is failing the American people dismally. And yet, I'm optimistic about the future. Americans are waking up, and the movement to save American journalism is gathering speed._ _It is the honor of my life to help lead the charge by returning the famed New York Sun to the center of the national conversation. Below is a note I just shared with my fellow citizens on the recent anniversary of our return to publication. I hope you'll take a moment to read it and consider joining our fast growing movement._ _We need you. We need every patriot to stand with us._ *** As we mark this year the second anniversary of The New York Sun's return to national daily publishing, reports on our industry are dire. Layoffs are everywhere. Last month, Los Angeles Times fired 20 percent of its newsroom. The Wall Street Journal reduced the staff of its Washington bureau. NBC News, ABC News, Time magazine, Sports Illustrated, National Geographic, Insider, NPR, Vox, Conde Nast, and CBC all announced layoffs. Buzzfeed News, Pitchfork, and the Messenger shuttered their doors completely. A Northwestern University study released in November finds that nationally, newspapers are closing down at a rate of 2.5 a week, mostly weekly publications issued locally. Questions swirl about the future of the industry. One headline in the Atlantic asks, "Is American Journalism Headed Toward an Extinction-Level Event?" Predictions are dire. Uncertainty is rampant. The mood, in general, is grim.
---
| | [JOIN THE SUN](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7df8112cfaee42778ddb24c35a244ec3&_e=h2YMjN9W48OBmuibHEZiarEZqUa5jEjaXKc65ePmYhfeT1rSd1A0oECYa42FSHBsv62NOKeiKwJtzH_A6Pejr4IZ0tOSOvW4lnaHbdXbR_1_djExK9fkSVJeW5jFfXJN0ma25ChWUT5Qp3KqKb89wAdPi3ksYaY3UNGAN3r1b16KfAv0L_OzJPOIYiRy1MPqdKIL55gTc9uO_vUZ4svssA8-OF69FeHP-xEAr8FIzd2V0UwW-OxTggDSCAkw8z35WwVBJQUqViOAk5OPCY8Eog22v3TJCZxXCrPm2VRhGopyDE7pFx8AGQ_Xdi2uzfOiTCfpRFrQ8GrS-mTZtHy9ZMRYT2VexzwiyYFDbJFX3uWu0VbMRNo6mzE5oHxIhmnH)
---
| | It would be a mistake, though, to ignore the fact that human nature is a constant. The uniform desire - nay, need - to be informed has obtained since the birth of civilization. “The newspaper is an article of primary necessity," the Sun's pioneering 19th century editor, Charles Dana, once said. "You must have your breakfast, but you must have your newspaper too." Indeed, news consumption on the whole remains high. It seems, then, that what appears as a contraction is in fact a form of correction. The market is offering a vigorous reminder of its most enduring truth, that a newspaper's primary customer is its reader. It's a principle that in many quarters has faded over time, more so amid the industry upheaval that has in recent decades accompanied the digital revolution. This and other factors have led to a realignment of priorities at many of our country's most storied publishers. They have come to serve other masters. First among them are advertisers. The temptation is understandable. They've long paid the newsman's bills. The Sun, we must confess, played a role in introducing this model. As the first penny daily, it sold for a fraction of the price of competitor papers. It pioneered front-page advertising to offset the lower subscription price. Later, Charles Dana was described as being "barely tolerant" of advertisers and dreamed of a newspaper that was wholly supported by readers.Other papers have come to prioritize the politics, leading to a deliberate effort to downplay important stories of public interest. There have been newspapers acquired as status symbols by billionaires and deployed as ideological playthings. Others have been designed or repurposed as government organs. The Telegraph in Britain, a fine newspaper, is now at risk of being swallowed up by the United Arab Emirates. There are even calls for government funding of newspapers and journalism en masse, a terrible idea, and fully incompatible with the democratic vision of a free press. At the Sun, we hold the view that the opportunity remains greater than ever for any newspaper that is compiled with a view to serve the reader above all. In the words of Charles Dana, a newspaper "must correspond to the wants of the people. It must furnish that sort of information which the people demand, or else it can never be successful." Our aim is for every interaction with the Sun to inform, educate, inspire, and uplift our readers. To do battle on their behalf to protect the "social freedom" that our republic is in danger of entirely losing. So that "every intellectual plant grows vigorously and bears its fruit without hindrance from any quarter." We’ve been encouraged by the public reception so far. I'm pleased to report that our readership has grown by more than 300 percent over the past year. Paying memberships, sustaining the Sun's journalism, have grown by 500 percent. We've added new, exciting talent to our newsroom. Daily we hear from young people who are hopeful about making a career of journalism. We're not guided by the subjective and parochial analysis of what might be decreed "fit to print." We're a paper that for nearly 200 years has borne the promise to "shine for all." That means relentlessly seeking the benefit and welfare of our readers and all of the public which we serve. Nothing less will do for the Sun. So may I take this occasion to express, on behalf of my colleagues as well as myself, my sincerest thanks to each of you who have joined us over the past year. And to declare that our arms are held open to all Americans who have yet to make the Sun their home.
---
[JOIN THE SUN](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7df8112cfaee42778ddb24c35a244ec3&_e=h2YMjN9W48OBmuibHEZiarEZqUa5jEjaXKc65ePmYhfeT1rSd1A0oECYa42FSHBsv62NOKeiKwJtzH_A6Pejr4IZ0tOSOvW4lnaHbdXbR_1_djExK9fkSVJeW5jFfXJN0ma25ChWUT5Qp3KqKb89wAdPi3ksYaY3UNGAN3r1b16KfAv0L_OzJPOIYiRy1MPqdKIL55gTc9uO_vUZ4svssA8-OF69FeHP-xEAr8FIzd2_G3kjsEVixH1c39dUZf2m71UAzbsjfzaL--HpaAiQ-Gb2p2iSSfS06MvL5qSQUJm5Mcs9EygLICRljR-LJYKieqr4VwcS99s6iYqZeyUSjfd8DNOZj8D5OyJ1COpoV5N3He5yf6OJXUeQfqOw6hvl)
---
Yours sincerely,
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7df8112cfaee42778ddb24c35a244ec3&_e=h2YMjN9W48OBmuibHEZiarEZqUa5jEjaXKc65ePmYhfeT1rSd1A0oECYa42FSHBsv62NOKeiKwJtzH_A6Pejr4IZ0tOSOvW4lnaHbdXbR_1_djExK9fkSVJeW5jFfXJN0ma25ChWUT5Qp3KqKb89wAdPi3ksYaY3UNGAN3r1b16KfAv0L_OzJPOIYiRy1MPqdKIL55gTc9uO_vUZ4svssA8-OF69FeHP-xEAr8FIzd28j28GC17D0i3C10kVFFloTPWoTn7kXUzGolBHIzjk3objgG8f72TydFcKuGlTRcIzFOlC2VxXKj_gVxF75zmDIBGXlveW_cPSjrt_J_lhHljo7mqwHdY8icYYAESc5yQtxe7mOjdV3NVwjznRUrfK)
---
| **Dovid Efune**
Publisher, The New York Sun
---
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=7df8112cfaee42778ddb24c35a244ec3&_t=BwCjt3o-JQzDF8ebcqFjY0E76Bpf0huXSnSzzZhp3Yram6mibB3TzIQPHSj2tPXKcfG2wgcjWxWKx1OX7NFDEpmpWSyrMQ0wr4cZpbolq5E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=7df8112cfaee42778ddb24c35a244ec3&_t=BwCjt3o-JQzDF8ebcqFjY0E76Bpf0huXSnSzzZhp3Yram6mibB3TzIQPHSj2tPXKcfG2wgcjWxWKx1OX7NFDEpmpWSyrMQ0wr4cZpbolq5E%3D)

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Help Ruben hold the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Trump, National Republicans, and the MAGA-right are all backing Kari Lake because they know that control of the Senate and the White House is going to come down to Arizona.
#

**FIRST:** Kari Lake started creeping ahead in the polls late last year, with several showing her leading Ruben Gallego.
**THEN:** She locked down the support of the entire GOP - from the far MAGA-right to the Republican elites and the party establishment in DC.
**NOW:** She’s campaigning around the country for other Trump-backed MAGA candidates while the Republican elites raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for her at high dollar fundraisers — $330,000 in one night in DC.
We’ve got to be really direct right now: Trump, National Republicans, and the MAGA-right are all backing Kari Lake because they know that control of the Senate and the White House is going to come down to Arizona.
This is going to be one of the closest and most expensive races in the entire country.
To win, we need our supporters to match the massive party machine that Kari Lake has behind her. Ruben’s counting on your support, can you chip in?
[**Can Ruben count on you to chip in $3 and help win this U.S. Senate race in Arizona? We’ve got to meet Kari Lake’s momentum with our own if we’re going to have any chance.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240323-2-160&t=1&akid=2109%2E734936%2Ep7tDBX)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-mar24.2pPbzX&refcode=em240323-2-160&t=20&akid=2109%2E734936%2Ep7tDBX)**

➡ There are over ** 13.4 million ** registered voters in Florida — that's the third largest base in the entire country.
➡ Ad spending in Florida's 2018 Senate race was the **_most expensive_** , at a whopping ** $128 million. **
➡ And last time around, Rick Scott and his GOP allies reserved** $70 million** in ad spots to drown out his opponent and buy Florida's seat.
➡ Now, this 2024 race is gearing up to once again be one of the most costly battles this election — _and Rick Scott knows it!_ That's why he's already contributed over **$3 million** **** of his personal mega-fortune.
➡ The only way we can compete with Scott's flood of self-funded attack ads is by making early — _and big_ — investments now. That's why we must hit our ** $200K weekly fundraising goal ** to keep our ads on the air.
**➡ But right now, we're still $18,492 short ahead of our midnight deadline.**
**_[We refuse to sit back while Scott blankets the airwaves with his dangerous lies, but we rely on the power of grassroots supporters like you, friend. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: URGENT: Tell Joe NO!
body:
A disheartening reality is unfolding before us.
__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=d41c9244fe3e4fdebe1b71dc256b38d3&_t=63151LM55x1Xf0j-kbUVdJv9JbyH3Gqm8q-o9uNG4jIDnfv-HQ6Gqh_qoRmm4Y4qahOXUP1VE14z3w2TqrosMVm0RTu439iO4k_Z0Hyk5XY%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d41c9244fe3e4fdebe1b71dc256b38d3&_e=h73e5jZXH7EEWEjlL4i0fqiBGSgBScc-WBYG_maGSfBT8JZsZ9ZWZcta9BJHuzd1bARMNGn5dNOI3rqwU5cPJ1oE5_yDxME0M0kp9K4xtruoMfO1x4A1wrhW6T0Q1Uo8bQFtkbh2-8_b9iQcqDOIA87vAmICK97pMXS-E4VsP0IK0JSUCaVyXd-SOciVmQ5gBwwQakLh9DhE3HQpQUyE2WcQ38Chs1BfYec19OvLJj9hn6KzeNtC2MsotRCsxkM9wFWZflr-VotEP5Ea2OWrz4kB1YlmYHnPiJzi6zVTdjAX5651dlweHLm1ZbKRM3fd0VQbp2FwfgEMKWsrWT2WXxKPzYTbhxJircGVQFLQVdsoNrc7XZlnqvvkqA1tXYk0)

---
| |
Fellow American,

Our pro-life values, the lives of thousands of unborn babies, and the hope for a pro-life America are under unprecedented threat.

The Biden administration is advancing the most pro-abortion agenda in our nation's history. It's up to us, the committed defenders of the unborn and their mothers, to say NO to Joe!

From supporting late-term abortions to promoting widespread access to abortion drugs, this administration is sacrificing the precious gift of life for political expedience. In Washington D.C, they've even encouraged the cover-up of infanticide. This is an attack not just on the unborn, but on our core beliefs as pro-life champions.

Each pro-abortion policy backed by the Biden administration deepens the wound in our nation's moral fabric, undermining the dignity and value of life. We must act now and stand together, for the sake of the unborn, for the dignity of women, and for the love of life that unites us all.

As believers in the sanctity of life, the power is in our hands to make a difference.

We, at SBA Pro-Life America, invite you to join us in asserting our unwavering commitment to life and in defiantly declaring NO to Big Abortion's deadly agenda.

**Tell Joe NO by giving a gift _TODAY_ that saves lives and shows your solidarity with the pro-life majority of America.**

By stepping forward and giving today, you enable SBA Pro-Life America to keep striving for a pro-life tomorrow. Our voices, united in defense of life, have the power to enact real change. But we can't do this crucial work without you.

Tell Joe NO!

**[Give a gift that saves lives now>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d41c9244fe3e4fdebe1b71dc256b38d3&_e=h73e5jZXH7EEWEjlL4i0fqiBGSgBScc-WBYG_maGSfBT8JZsZ9ZWZcta9BJHuzd1bARMNGn5dNOI3rqwU5cPJ1oE5_yDxME0M0kp9K4xtruoMfO1x4A1wrhW6T0Q1Uo8bQFtkbh2-8_b9iQcqDOIA87vAmICK97pMXS-E4VsP0IK0JSUCaVyXd-SOciVmQ5gBwwQakLh9DhE3HQpQUyE2WcQ38Chs1BfYec19OvLJj_YavcWbzbqm-9SYXQfm8B2UJcE-X-bz5y33t4TCMqT6nSSY0QyrOK9BGAHDj5y_cxZaZeIp6dmejVZWXaLg5qWqtOVBrNGSmc6Cs5_G99MX_FP50UQYfrTxLBKZooYkRAdTZS4hBnGfO44e3m-EZFC)**

Only by standing together can we say "NO" to this destructive agenda and champion the cause of life in our great nation.

Together, a pro-life America is within our reach!

For Life,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

clean_body: A disheartening reality is unfolding before us. Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Fellow American, Our pro-life values, the lives of thousands of unborn babies, and the hope for a pro-life America are under unprecedented threat. The Biden administration is advancing the most pro-abortion agenda in our nation's history. It's up to us, the committed defenders of the unborn and their mothers, to say NO to Joe! From supporting late-term abortions to promoting widespread access to abortion drugs, this administration is sacrificing the precious gift of life for political expedience. In Washington D.C, they've even encouraged the cover-up of infanticide. This is an attack not just on the unborn, but on our core beliefs as pro-life champions. Each pro-abortion policy backed by the Biden administration deepens the wound in our nation's moral fabric, undermining the dignity and value of life. We must act now and stand together, for the sake of the unborn, for the dignity of women, and for the love of life that unites us all. As believers in the sanctity of life, the power is in our hands to make a difference. We, at SBA Pro-Life America, invite you to join us in asserting our unwavering commitment to life and in defiantly declaring NO to Big Abortion's deadly agenda. Tell Joe NO by giving a gift TODAY that saves lives and shows your solidarity with the pro-life majority of America. By stepping forward and giving today, you enable SBA Pro-Life America to keep striving for a pro-life tomorrow. Our voices, united in defense of life, have the power to enact real change. But we can't do this crucial work without you. Tell Joe NO! Only by standing together can we say "NO" to this destructive agenda and champion the cause of life in our great nation. Together, a pro-life America is within our reach! For Life, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, SBA Pro-Life America | | | | | | | | Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803 Arlington, VA, 22206 .

| | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees......well, as they say, “Those were the days.”But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.

| | **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bfdac6ef4ea24c5c92874d994e938aac&_e=6mXM9lSxTaaqBnL4Z5XumoTZfzM-7GS6D5eaK5kSAm9O2VLSC6KunXmrgLzUavd1D7SM-YyPrTTLEsvfZhwcTYP7mKqwUVjjuqoZa4AinRm2SC69XiI9G4tJzqp0VA7PcEAXiwB71RMT8Ifp-7VzWbj_PTmXxvy8YXpPTHVy4eaYtGpKuY-vxQXf3mFoAlAssKCPBuR5zEBEMWPpVt0Fvfl-3InJ96QlMu4C9Rd_noG601rIuf1EuKCcU1LOcau9R_yEAzLfwfWJUHu3adgZuSJtAlZbbVngSqAra7IEYCX3HBTiBLXQ_5fQ07AFTIQ8UoIEZvpsknvBfSjGwoCMWxvFLZ40Vp8C65TMPao40-c_4AD8Z-cT1TkN0DUDJWGvL41QiVZFfCqg-5x9k2aQoQ%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November.Democrat policies have brought America to its knees.There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California.Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And that’s why I’m running for Senate.**_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.**And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do.But there is no way I can pull it off without you.**[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=bfdac6ef4ea24c5c92874d994e938aac&_e=6mXM9lSxTaaqBnL4Z5XumoTZfzM-7GS6D5eaK5kSAm9O2VLSC6KunXmrgLzUavd1D7SM-YyPrTTLEsvfZhwcTYP7mKqwUVjjuqoZa4AinRm2SC69XiI9G4tJzqp0VA7PcEAXiwB71RMT8Ifp-7VzWbj_PTmXxvy8YXpPTHVy4eaYtGpKuY-vxQXf3mFoAlAssKCPBuR5zEBEMWPpVt0Fvfl-3InJ96QlMu4C9Rd_noGuZ5u8s954iULA82iVJeUc8Va9huceDh2_cgUHxy791h5UJCUiK2lsTEajDLi0Fwp4-ieGiWwDzTlDlI8ze-0eaLOSlMjZnGrclBUyM3TzoDxzxcslC4l0qqiBEWRTOX3LbUDfg9g1ddp3lY9SqZ6_T8hhJW3cUKoVpWIga3eNEA%3D%3D)** I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff...**...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,

| | I’m sure you get plenty of emails from campaigns this time of the month, lecturing you about fundraising deadlines and donations. Believe me when I say – asking for donations is my least favorite part of running a campaign. **But the fact of the matter is that these fundraising deadlines couldn’t be more important.**

At the end of this month, we are up against an FEC filing deadline, meaning that ALL of our numbers will be made public. This is our first major deadline of the election year, and the NRCC will be watching our numbers carefully to see where our campaign stands.

[We’ve set a goal of raising $20,000 by midnight on the 31st so we can show the NRCC exactly how strong our grassroots campaign is. Now here’s where you come in – can you chip in $10 or anything you can to help us reach this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81534422/462743962/1809543647?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20240323_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_EOQ1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjEyYWExMC01MWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iltzk9w3vhH551k93z8T6oajyOZOr0UdfiyjOm8w8pA=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | I’m sure you get plenty of emails from campaigns this time of the month, lecturing you about fundraising deadlines and donations. Believe me when I say – asking for donations is my least favorite part of running a campaign. But the fact of the matter is that these fundraising deadlines couldn’t be more important. At the end of this month, we are up against an FEC filing deadline, meaning that ALL of our numbers will be made public. This is our first major deadline of the election year, and the NRCC will be watching our numbers carefully to see where our campaign stands. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Extremists are determined to push their right-wing agenda onto New Jersey – and they are starting with our opponent Mary Jo Guinchard. Team,

We’re running a very special contest, and we want you to join in.

For the last few months, Jason has started growing a new beard. It’s been a contentious debate on our team.

Now with the election less than 250 days away, Jason is throwing the question to you: Should the beard stay?

There are two buttons below — one supporting the beard, and the other telling him to shave it. Jason has agreed that he will honor whichever side raises the most donations by our end-of-quarter deadline on 3/31. Donate now to cast your vote:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-march-2024?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-march-2024?amount=10]

GROW THE BEARD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-march-2024-keepbeard?amount=5]

Thank you so much for your support. Your donations will help us re-elect Jason and continue fighting to bring servant leadership to Congress (beard TBD).

— Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in $10 to help him continue working for us?

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: We must get Julie Su across the finish line
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81534788/462745056/-1474444529?contactdata=HwaqLDs36FIsrYJrMsoFrTnwWHLq7v2GGHpb4/T9GRCNaAYRVkvIUYgFhvYmn41m/er7dzTl68bNUYMwhTHtHUCHtBhkUUNxB51cJ/qBzWrOb0G5rF0Xior+m4PGBPKZIkaPJWPkFNoQQOMHqWM15BfmNaClSLtDAQ6GndjHP08=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240323_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2M1MWQxZC01NGU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=81u2MUTmmrjdaKu5Kc6MOzXmzsVl8i8Va0gLcFKEJ7s=&emci=ea962247-49e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=27c51d1d-54e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=23190490) Aloha Peter, Ever since President Biden nominated Julie Su to be our country’s next Secretary of Labor, I have been fighting to get the Senate to confirm her. Her nomination is historic. If confirmed, she would be the first AAPI Cabinet-level Secretary in the Biden administration — bringing critical diversity and lived experience to a role that will advance Democrats’ agenda to build an economy that puts workers first. And beyond that, she is simply the right choice. Throughout her career, Julie Su has been a fierce advocate for workers — fighting to combat wage theft, create jobs, and ensure workers are granted the dignity, respect, and protections they deserve. She represents the best of what this country can be. But for almost _two years_ , Senate Republicans have refused to move her nomination forward — caving to powerful special interest groups who are determined to continue rigging the economy in their favor and rolling back the power of organized labor. **[We need to confirm Julie Su. American workers cannot afford to wait any longer. clean_body: | Aloha Peter, Ever since President Biden nominated Julie Su to be our country’s next Secretary of Labor, I have been fighting to get the Senate to confirm her. Her nomination is historic. If confirmed, she would be the first AAPI Cabinet-level Secretary in the Biden administration — bringing critical diversity and lived experience to a role that will advance Democrats’ agenda to build an economy that puts workers first. And beyond that, she is simply the right choice. Throughout her career, Julie Su has been a fierce advocate for workers — fighting to combat wage theft, create jobs, and ensure workers are granted the dignity, respect, and protections they deserve. She represents the best of what this country can be. But for almost two years , Senate Republicans have refused to move her nomination forward — caving to powerful special interest groups who are determined to continue rigging the economy in their favor and rolling back the power of organized labor. | | Thank you, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

name: Biden Campaign
subject: Do you think $25 would be worth keeping Donald Trump out of the White House?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Can President Biden count on you today? | | |
---
$25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who are willing to destroy democracy to hold onto power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. clean_body: Can President Biden count on you today? | | | $25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who are willing to destroy democracy to hold onto power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you very much, The Biden Campaign

Peter, few moments are more inspiring than the first few weeks of the New Year. It's a time for both reflection and looking forward, a time to weigh the ultimate question: "_How can we do better this year?_ "
And that's exactly why I'm reaching out to you now.
You see, we had a few wins for progress in 2023: States like Ohio and Minnesota moved to definitively defend reproductive rights, in California, lifesaving prescription drugs like insulin were made more affordable, and state leaders across the nation fought to protect and codify transgender rights.
But 2023 came with a series of devastating setbacks to our fight for justice too: More than a dozen states have banned abortions, book bans in schools and libraries in Republican-led states soared, our nation suffered from over 600 mass shootings, the conservative Supreme Court handed down a ruling that further striped away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community, and we experienced the hottest year ever recorded.
**And 2024 is not going to be _any_ easier.

This year, we're facing another defining presidential election and a decisive year for our fight for progress. That's why I'm working tirelessly to ensure that regardless of who wins the White House, the Senate, or the House of Representatives, _your_ life gets better. But to do that, I need to know which fights you want to see prioritized.**

**[That's why I'm counting on _you_ and [500] other Fearless Fighters to share your top priorities of 2024. Your response will help me shape my fight for you this year, so please: Will you take my 2024 Priorities Survey before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81534936/462745424/47505959?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1389-su-nd&refcode=jtk1389-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjQ3MjI4OC01NWU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yw9hi1s3iXrd0_vL1QC9ZMa2MJRrdlVHLHDheKC-BF8=&emci=bf13da87-9fe7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=cb472288-55e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=25369504)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Devastating Crisis No One Sees Coming
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kL1u8jAYha_mzUZkH5s4DB4-PpQOSFVHGE3sNKZxHZyARa--IqVd35_nPDomjIPv7prUloDe24kAEv8IuBxzSNdz2L-svvIxri7Va1g_tvhPwHwf3d_pk1K6YPzwmKpdYbXoLJOF01xxDqgam6LXykreWbWpeWWl3DgGgYqvwVhraqPqwmswSCYgwJngqjyZ6tQxWGlhnOg6kmzJKU1wybeGT3M2KcUYyjaGYtD9PI_TItYQmpxi-XltB3edft7aGAjNU5nQ3AhNde_z7fzhDlsSzdKC2Amzv7WHt-iKpO2Y_TD4qVIk2fsv5jsAAP__wk9hFA)

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjs1uozAUhZ_msgPZ18bghRfJIEajUdt1VpHxT-IGF2KcovTpK6K2iy7vOZ_u-XScx-DvCpo9IJ6DXQAR2A4Qr4c1pttr_P-3_FgPU3kVz7HeWvwDiPk-ux_060vlog7jljZdYRXzlvDCKdpQiti0KIuz8tY4bWvLayokF8haRqTjrWyFwKFti6CQICcMGVLCaFMNWgyeoOUWtWPeAyePnUpHl4LRdMmrTmmaYmWmWIzqnPO8PMR6wJ7POV2Qbh1gb8ZgLsD6nN6DBdZRlEQCil3_r9tOImtAob0_LrdhC1pGym-hcg8objkejY6zDqc3YB17eil_QUVSdl7DOIZFNMDJ6WFrpvgZAAD__zQeaRw). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjs1uozAUhZ_msgPZ18bghRfJIEajUdt1VpHxT-IGF2KcovTpK6K2iy7vOZ_u-XScx-DvCpo9IJ6DXQAR2A4Qr4c1pttr_P-3_FgPU3kVz7HeWvwDiPk-ux_060vlog7jljZdYRXzlvDCKdpQiti0KIuz8tY4bWvLayokF8haRqTjrWyFwKFti6CQICcMGVLCaFMNWgyeoOUWtWPeAyePnUpHl4LRdMmrTmmaYmWmWIzqnPO8PMR6wJ7POV2Qbh1gb8ZgLsD6nN6DBdZRlEQCil3_r9tOImtAob0_LrdhC1pGym-hcg8objkejY6zDqc3YB17eil_QUVSdl7DOIZFNMDJ6WFrpvgZAAD__zQeaRw) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjs1uozAUhZ_msgPZ18bghRfJIEajUdt1VpHxT-IGF2KcovTpK6K2iy7vOZ_u-XScx-DvCpo9IJ6DXQAR2A4Qr4c1pttr_P-3_FgPU3kVz7HeWvwDiPk-ux_060vlog7jljZdYRXzlvDCKdpQiti0KIuz8tY4bWvLayokF8haRqTjrWyFwKFti6CQICcMGVLCaFMNWgyeoOUWtWPeAyePnUpHl4LRdMmrTmmaYmWmWIzqnPO8PMR6wJ7POV2Qbh1gb8ZgLsD6nN6DBdZRlEQCil3_r9tOImtAob0_LrdhC1pGym-hcg8objkejY6zDqc3YB17eil_QUVSdl7DOIZFNMDJ6WFrpvgZAAD__zQeaRw) on these survival food kits while you can. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjs1uozAUhZ_msgPZ18bghRfJIEajUdt1VpHxT-IGF2KcovTpK6K2iy7vOZ_u-XScx-DvCpo9IJ6DXQAR2A4Qr4c1pttr_P-3_FgPU3kVz7HeWvwDiPk-ux_060vlog7jljZdYRXzlvDCKdpQiti0KIuz8tY4bWvLayokF8haRqTjrWyFwKFti6CQICcMGVLCaFMNWgyeoOUWtWPeAyePnUpHl4LRdMmrTmmaYmWmWIzqnPO8PMR6wJ7POV2Qbh1gb8ZgLsD6nN6DBdZRlEQCil3_r9tOImtAob0_LrdhC1pGym-hcg8objkejY6zDqc3YB17eil_QUVSdl7DOIZFNMDJ6WFrpvgZAAD__zQeaRw)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kDFPwzAQhX_NZWtkP7txGTwAVRgqIUY6OrFNjeI6tROi8utRS2B99-67T2fiOAR_1aSeCDgFWwgg8UjA5bjEPH_Gw8vmezmmzaV5jdvbFM8ETNfR_VdXSu2iCcMtVfvKauEtk5XTXHEOqB0eqpP2HYcVkgmuBHOyUQzGWS-YUlspt7sqaDBIJiDAb626M03nGay0ME54T5Ld79Qmuhx6w8u0mJxTinWfYjXo0zSN5S7WEtolp_o894Oby-9anyKhXZUJbZm70ucwTiGdC6Gdz2vSORLt_SViL8zhq39_S67K2o5LGIZQGkWSffwxfwIAAP__JDJm9g)

I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."

# Everything Woke...
Dear ,

If I were in Congress, I would have voted "no" on this disastrous spending bill, and I would have helped lead the charge to stop it.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=eb2521fa91&e=5bb5efcda7)
Here's the ['Ominous Omnibus Budget' ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=80319a60c9&e=5bb5efcda7)passed at 2 a.m. this morning. I've linked it here so you can read for yourself. My apologies for the longer e-mail but I've listed just some of the crazy funding below.

Every single one of my opponents in this race ignored this major attack on our freedom and instead support those who passed it with their "likes, winks and nods" and an attempt at diversion from answering the issue.

One posted instead today about "puppies" - of course we all love puppies, what a nice distraction; **_three others posted their genuflecting shout-outs to a famous globalist "shutdown" candidate in a MD US Senate race who supported passing this WHO-supporting budget, ironically, so we don't 'shut down the government.'_**

And the Dems? One prominent Senator said "2 - a.m.-ers. We passed [it]. You're welcome."

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=012094a1d7&e=5bb5efcda7)
I don't know what I'm more upset about - the list of WOKE items, the lack of procedure and transparency in passing this at 2 a.m. after less than 24 hours to read the 1012 pages, _or the fact that Congress just funded the worst national Red Flag attack on Gun Owners in our history_.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=9dfc386adc&e=5bb5efcda7)
And breaking news just now - reports indicate at least one of the terrorist attackers who murdered at least 150 peaceful civilian men, women and children at a concert yesterday in Russia is a Ukrainian citizen who fought in the war there as recently as 2022. And one of his accomplices claims he was paid $11,000 and given weapons by someone posing as an aid on Telegram who messaged him and made the offer in exchange to kill anyone he could at the concert.

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=b9585af08b&e=5bb5efcda7)

Consider the 'budget busting' bill includes:
* money for Biden's Illegal Alien Flights from their home countries directly into the United States to be resettled in your neighborhood
* funds NGOs trafficking Humans into the United States
* funds The WORLD HEALTH ORGANIZATION - with its pending pandemic lockdown treaty
* full funding for Merrick Garland's 'lawfare' weaponizing of DOJ who today announced with this new money he is launching a national RED FLAG department against Gun Owning Americans to assist in gun confiscation by using EVERY SPY TOOL available to violate American's Second Amendment rights
* $850k for a gay senior home (none for a Veterans home, though)
* $15 million to pay for Egyptian's college tuitions
* $300k for trans organizations encouraging chemical castration of boys and 'Breast-binding' surgery for minor girls to become 'trans'
* $400k for a gay activist group to teach elementary kids about being trans
* $500k for a DEI zoo, an anti-racist nature appreciation program
* $400k for a group to gives clothes to teens to help them hide their gender
* $1.5 billion Green New Scam funding
* $300-500 million to Ukraine Secretary Assistance Initiative = funding nefarious 'asymmetric warfare' and 'surprises'
* Continues funding Joe Biden’s border invasion
* 12,000 Afghan Special Immigrant Visas and authorization to support loans to the International Monetary Fund.
* Benefits for illegal aliens
* late term abortions funding at home and abroad, per UN funding
* DEI funding initiatives across the nation
* Funds FBI New Headquarters while they illegally target President Trump and Catholics
* increases our national debt to $52 TRILLION dollars

As President Trump has said, 'everything woke turns to &#*@!'

Unless we elect new leadership in strong support of America First, our country will continue to be destroyed by the Left.

Nobody else in this race appears to be fighting for you. Do you want an experienced fighter such as myself to bring my 20 years of legal advocacy and force of reason with backbone to the table on your behalf, or do you want wishy washy go-alongs with robber barons of your freedom representing you?

I hope you will support me. If you have already, thank you. I have a crucial FEC deadline in just 8 days. I still need to raise another $15k immediately.

_**Your contribution right now is crucial to help me win. Thank you.**_

Freedom and Victory,

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e27c8b47f8&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dan Cox, Candidate to be YOUR VOICE in Congress (R-MD6)

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: At my wit’s end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8b28d6c5f46847f7a568941651cb2c0a&_e=otAzOKU3Xy3_SH3P64hV7hxmU_-hpVVZl4O1GUKdRl5XKdrPlL_REJoDEVp4xQIGGn_sAUgK1-zwnaVx3Cgfxn_LoFceiJEw-6zNhl41TXgOBNwkeDRbWKdGJa99BBMQhtIejDBvrUCZXBfg2Tzh-MLDP8ho3iHdOndZadlZw0fvEAc25zq2RdYRiUXYRj_Y7uhxI1YXVwpK1bXdfFdJqIS1yoH4YXZVdKFTKDnn2LbPH8skpO-vQOqC2KCYf1CGAzDJWSGRdsnNkb06B1OSnw%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, I'm at my absolute wit's end.
It's CAPT Hung Cao, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in one of the biggest races in America.

I'm ready to FIGHT to take back our country from the radical Left, but Pelosi and Biden have over $100 MILLION lined up to defeat Republican candidates like me.

The fate of this race, control of the Senate, and the future of America is in our hands, and we're running out of time.

**[Can you pitch in a few dollars or whatever you can NOW to elect a Republican Senator in Virginia and TAKE BACK our majority?](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8b28d6c5f46847f7a568941651cb2c0a&_e=otAzOKU3Xy3_SH3P64hV7hxmU_-hpVVZl4O1GUKdRl5XKdrPlL_REJoDEVp4xQIGGn_sAUgK1-zwnaVx3Cgfxn_LoFceiJEw-6zNhl41TXgOBNwkeDRbWKdGJa99BBMQlUKy6nre-L7WR8dUAZ5RCz30QcxG5o49R7gaDVj2IqLgOviAOsprBtQ54bXxWXMy5P13Ap5hemAcMVqB8GnVQmtLuxCkWpbCV-hm5bNWtTTNIBIROOmZbV0Ibm7KtKWX5Oxo81h1CKc5JYn7fpIo0A%3D%3D)

Now, I'm taking my fight to the U.S. Senate to defend the same freedoms I fought for during my Naval career.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Before happy hour can you help my friend, Bob Casey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
**_Happy Saturday_**** _Peter!_**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?refcode=em20240323-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v)
I know that I’m looking forward to happy hour, and I bet you are too – but I have one request for you before you log offline.

[**Can you donate $5 to support****Bob Casey's****campaign before midnight tonight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-3&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-3&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v)
---
I know your inbox is probably full of these requests, but here’s why this is important:

**In 2020, we flipped this seat from red to blue, and in 2022, Democrats defied the odds to expand our Senate majority.****
****
**As a first term senator, I know what it’s like to have all eyes on an FEC report to see if you have the strength to keep up the momentum.

And I also know that Bob Casey has one of the strongest grassroots teams in the country, and I’m so grateful to be a part of it. But, I’ll be honest with you, they really need your help.

[**Let’s show them what this team is made of. Pitch in any amount you can before tonight and send a message to prove how strong this grassroots team is →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-3&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v)
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240323-3-el&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240323-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240323-3&refcode2=2395_552475_V3s07v&akid=2395%2E552475%2EV3s07v)

**Cheers folks! 🍻
John Hickenlooper **

Friend,
Since taking office, President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have made historic progress in passing gun safety legislation, capping prescription drug costs, protecting our democracy, expanding access to affordable health care and growing our economy.
But now, they're facing off against a twice-impeached former president who is facing 88 criminal charges and promising to be a "**_dictator_** " on day one if reelected. _And it's not looking good._
Right now, Donald Trump is _ahead_ of President Biden in the polls, and he and Mitch McConnell are raking in **_millions_** from dark-money megadonors.
**With the GOP rallying around Donald Trump and other MAGA extremists, President Biden and Vice President Harris need to know if Democrats like you still support their vision of progress for our country.**
**That's why you have been selected to represent 43614 in our new opinion survey.****_Will you please respond before midnight?_**
**What grade would you give the Biden-Harris administration?**

* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81536399/462748453/1575385346?code=jtk4918-su-nd&refcode=jtk4918-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMjY0ZS01ZmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_dZqX-c99_ao4PWE-qevug-zqn5XKCWKMFxa2HWWjU=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81536400/462748454/1575385346?code=jtk4918-su-nd&refcode=jtk4918-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMjY0ZS01ZmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_dZqX-c99_ao4PWE-qevug-zqn5XKCWKMFxa2HWWjU=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81536401/462748455/1575385346?code=jtk4918-su-nd&refcode=jtk4918-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWEyMjY0ZS01ZmU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_dZqX-c99_ao4PWE-qevug-zqn5XKCWKMFxa2HWWjU=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: you have been selected to represent 43614 | | | | | dpwillis67@gmail.com: You were selected to represent 43614 in our new exclusive live poll, but your response is still MISSING. Please tell us now: What grade would you give the Biden-Harris administration? You were one of 42 people selected from 43614. Please submit your response before 11:59 p.m. for it to be counted. Friend, Since taking office, President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have made historic progress in passing gun safety legislation, capping prescription drug costs, protecting our democracy, expanding access to affordable health care and growing our economy. But now, they're facing off against a twice-impeached former president who is facing 88 criminal charges and promising to be a "dictator " on day one if reelected. And it's not looking good. Right now, Donald Trump is ahead of President Biden in the polls, and he and Mitch McConnell are raking in millions from dark-money megadonors. With the GOP rallying around Donald Trump and other MAGA extremists, President Biden and Vice President Harris need to know if Democrats like you still support their vision of progress for our country. That's why you have been selected to represent 43614 in our new opinion survey.Will you please respond before midnight? What grade would you give the Biden-Harris administration? | | | | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Kennedy’s Pick:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Already, Team Kennedy's campaign is historic.

|
---
| | | **[Already, Team Kennedy's campaign is historic.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_23_24_nd3&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_23_24_nd3&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Team Kennedy is ready to announce Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s Vice Presidential pick on March 26, in Oakland, California. This announcement will be a game-changer.
Already, Team Kennedy's campaign is historic. With the highest favorability polling of any candidate for President, Kennedy is also leading among voters under 35 and independents.
_And remember, those independents now represent 52% of the voting public, because people are fed up with the two-party system!_
Now, Kennedy is ready to announce a candidate who supports American values, medical freedom, government transparency, opposes endless wars, and champions policies that grow the Middle Class, including increasing homeownership among younger people.
Team Kennedy is now on the ballot in 5 states, and with the running mate announcement, we will proceed with collecting more than 1 million signatures nationwide, at a cost of almost $15 million.
Right now, almost all of the campaign budget is devoted to achieving ballot access in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. Other candidates don’t have to do this, but we do, we can, and we will – with your help!
Kennedy needs your help now, during this crucial ballot access window. [Please make an urgent contribution now while there is still time. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kennedys_pick_3_23_24_nd3&n=3)

name: David Hogg
subject: The NRA is personally attacking me (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
The NRA can bash me all they want. We aren’t backing down.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81536828/462749935/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTY5ODM3OS02NGU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImNG2uDx2yIEBFRxR18WP6fPYFhHbWEQ6VDjt6yVjzI=&emci=359bf07e-69e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=f1698379-64e9-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=43566853)

| | I noticed a familiar face in a recent issue of _American Rifleman._ (Yes, I really read it. You’ve got to keep your friends close and enemies closer, after all.)

To no one’s surprise, the NRA took out a full-page ad bashing me — and by extension, all of the folks who are a part of this movement to reform our gun laws, make progressive change, and elect the next generation of bold, young leaders.

The ads in these magazines are always good for a laugh — but this kind of stuff also reminds me how scared of us they really are. I’ve said it before, but **Gen Z will most certainly outlive the NRA.** The gun lobby’s glory days are behind them now.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81536829/462749936/-2074411583?refcode=20240323.2_DH_3AO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTY5ODM3OS02NGU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImNG2uDx2yIEBFRxR18WP6fPYFhHbWEQ6VDjt6yVjzI=)**

_This image is from a real NRA ad in a recent issue of_ American Rifleman. **The best way to fight back against the NRA’s fear-mongering is to show them that we aren’t going away by bringing the school shooting generation into office.**

[_**By splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and the GA Dems today, you’ll be playing a big part in powering our work to elect the next generation of leaders and put the NRA and their puppet politicians in the dustbin of history where they belong. Split $20 now to help us do it.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81536830/462749937/-2074411583?refcode=20240323.2_DH_3AO&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTY5ODM3OS02NGU5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImNG2uDx2yIEBFRxR18WP6fPYFhHbWEQ6VDjt6yVjzI=)

Thank you,

David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=YCxX%2F4BdJaXY95jVbzHfaB4yHDgMnuliOSY1L%2F0FYPrglOxtt9LtsT5LOzBh0hI1kNrj%2F%2BoSuDU4mxj6WQ%2BcqYu9sMWCj6aADzhelCsM76h%2BEmshWBaqBqYtn5R%2Fn7Y9XpxRRG%2BY8sDM45u%2Fml%2FTPfyP0qcW%2BdM1mVw2xj8Wod2vFpn5962KqMfbqdn0JPs%2FdhXfBCEgiH4jkJ7hEbxtG7iR3qSDW%2Bz0lAqIqSy7GuWApiZGwGh7I8RQ4cMLeXHF3V%2F72t7%2FvEBTafgytR6UkL0SndR%2BrKXYtGZp%2F4Lb9UyvizeLApFKIxmqUTg4RLh4%2FulLzKpTi4qT4hp6oUuLKGSwk2nSUWnFLWvgsX0MZFIwjvrJce3uEPlVLb9N42bZkejt%2F8iKndewYaGfnZWOS9ej6kG3%2B7Pfe%2BCzqDzDwhigf6%2FBe96gvdRGKg5pWU2p).

clean_body: The NRA can bash me all they want. We aren’t backing down. | | | I noticed a familiar face in a recent issue of American Rifleman. (Yes, I really read it. You’ve got to keep your friends close and enemies closer, after all.) To no one’s surprise, the NRA took out a full-page ad bashing me — and by extension, all of the folks who are a part of this movement to reform our gun laws, make progressive change, and elect the next generation of bold, young leaders. The ads in these magazines are always good for a laugh — but this kind of stuff also reminds me how scared of us they really are. I’ve said it before, but Gen Z will most certainly outlive the NRA. The gun lobby’s glory days are behind them now. = This image is from a real NRA ad in a recent issue of American Rifleman. The best way to fight back against the NRA’s fear-mongering is to show them that we aren’t going away by bringing the school shooting generation into office. = Thank you, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

| | | Peter,

Our Second Amendment rights are under attack like never before. **Radical politicians are pushing dangerous gun control measures that threaten our freedom and safety.**

As a staunch defender of the Constitution, **I refuse to let our rights be infringed upon.** But I can't do it alone. **I need your help to fight back against the anti-gun agenda and preserve our Second Amendment rights for future generations.**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Sorry to bother you over the weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Wisconsin’s Senate race is tied.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2281%2E35263%2E9Nut4P)
Sorry to bother you over the weekend, but this is important: My megamillionaire Republican opponent is gaining ground in Wisconsin — and fast. First, Eric Hovde plastered Wisconsin’s airwaves with $3.1 million worth of ads. Then, the Republican primary field cleared for Hovde, giving him more than 7 uninterrupted months to campaign against me. **Now, the latest polling has us statistically tied.** Republicans are going all in to flip this seat red, and we can’t expect him to let up. Eric Hovde has pledged to self-fund at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to defeat me, _and he’s on pace to spend even more than that._ Look, unlike my wealthy opponent, I can’t self-fund this campaign. I don’t have right-wing dark money groups or GOP megadonors who can spend a fortune to tilt the scales in our favor. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back. We need your help to reach undecided voters, keep our ads on the air, and make sure Hovde’s attacks don’t go unanswered. **[Will you chip in any amount you’re able to today to help me win this toss-up Senate race? All eyes will be on how we respond to this polling update, especially with our first public fundraising deadline since Hovde’s launch coming up.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240323_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2281%2E35263%2E9Nut4P)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-mar24.gV3I8k&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240323_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2281%2E35263%2E9Nut4P)

| | |
---

subject: BIG NEWS: New poll shows Maryland is still anyone’s race

body:
Our Maryland-first message is resonating with voters, but it also means we’ve got a lot of work to do to take the lead, which is why I’m emailing you this late in the day.
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1276%2E52803%2EQ2REHC)

| | The race for this open U.S. Senate seat is wide open, Peter, and here’s the proof:
### **_Washington Post Poll Confirms:
_** **_Angela Alsobrooks Within Striking Distance of David Trone. Closing Gap FAST._**
| | | [Donate Now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15327?t=9&amount=25&akid=1276%2E52803%2EQ2REHC)
---
This confirms what we’ve known all along: **Maryland can’t be bought.**
**In this state, the power of the many will be stronger than the power of the money.**
Despite my multi-millionaire opponent dropping $38 million of his own money to flood the airwaves with his TV ads, we’re closing the gap.
_This is a huge opportunity for our campaign, Peter._
The race for the Senate majority runs STRAIGHT through Maryland – Mitch McConnell made sure of that when he recruited Larry Hogan. In order to hold this seat for Democrats, we are going to need a grassroots movement. And this poll proves that’s exactly what this campaign has built.
Our Maryland-first message is resonating with voters, but it also means we’ve got a lot of work to do to take the lead, which is why I’m emailing you this late in the day.
We need a massive boost of grassroots support immediately to ramp up our ground game, increase visibility on our digital ads, and get our campaign message across to the huge number of persuadable voters.
[**Can I count on you to have my back and rush a quick $25 donation ASAP so we can take advantage of this opportunity and start reaching the voters we need to win?**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15327?t=10&amount=25&akid=1276%2E52803%2EQ2REHC)
